sentences: She was so excited that she began to gabble and I couldn't understand her. 她興奮得開始語無倫次，我都聽不懂她的話。
The children were gabbling away in the playground. 孩子們在操場上嘰嘰喳喳地說個不停。

meaning: 傾向於談論太多，尤其是瑣事。
sentences: Something described as gabby is inclined to talk too much, especially about trivia. 被描述為「饒舌」的人傾向於談論太多，尤其是關於瑣事。
The word gabby is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「gabby」這個字常被用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 與兩個傾斜屋頂表面（坡度）相鄰並終止的外牆頂部的三角形區域。
sentences: The term gable refers to the triangular area at the peak of an external wall adjacent to, and terminating, two sloped roof surfaces (pitches). 術語「山牆」是指與兩個傾斜屋頂表面（坡度）相鄰並終止的外牆頂部的三角形區域。
The lesson introduced gable as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了山牆作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 任何設備或機器，尤其是名字記不起的設備或機器，通常要么聰明要么複雜。
sentences: He bought a neat new gadget for shredding potatoes. 他買了一個漂亮的新玩意兒，用來切馬鈴薯絲。
That's quite a lot of gadgets you have collected. Do you use any of them? 你已經收集了相當多的小工具了。你使用它們中的任何一個嗎？
The kidnappers gagged the victim to prevent him from shouting. 綁匪塞住了受害者的嘴以防止他大喊大叫。
The comedian used a funny gag to start his performance. 喜劇演員用一個滑稽的笑話（惡作劇）開始了他的表演。

meaning: 透過承諾或擔保來約束（某人）；參與。
sentences: To gage means to bind (someone) by pledge or security; to engage. To gage 是指透過保證或擔保來約束（某人）；參與。
People may gage in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行衡量。
Hard work and dedication will help you gain valuable experience. 努力與奉獻將幫助你獲得寶貴的經驗。
The company managed to gain a larger market share this year. 公司今年設法獲得了更大的市場份額。

meaning: 行走或邁步的方式；用腿移動時的軸承或託架。
sentences: Carrying a heavy suitcase, he had a lopsided gait. 他背著沉重的行李箱，步態歪歪扭扭。
The term gait refers to a manner of walking or stepping; a bearing or carriage while moving on legs. 步態一詞是指行走或邁步的方式。用腿移動時的軸承或託架。
a swimming gala 游泳盛會
The term gala refers to a competition. Gala一詞指的是比賽。

meaning: 與星係有關。與銀河係有關。
sentences: Galactic astronomy is the study of the Milky Way. 銀河天文學是對銀河系的研究。
Something described as galactic is relating to a galaxy. Relating to the Milky Way galaxy. 被描述為銀河的東西與星係有關。與銀河係有關。
Our solar system is located in a spiral galaxy called the Milky Way. 我們的太陽系位於一個名為銀河系的螺旋星系中。
The award ceremony was attended by a galaxy of Hollywood stars. 頒獎典禮上有一群顯赫的（星光熠熠的）好萊塢明星出席。

meaning: 非常強的風，大於微風，小於暴風雨； 12 級蒲福風級中的 7 至 9 級風。
sentences: It's blowing a gale outside. 外面刮著大風。
Many parts of the boat were damaged in the gale. 船的許多部分在大風中受損。

meaning: 由於兩個表面之間的摩擦力超過材料在某一點的黏合力，導致被切割表面出現點蝕。
sentences: Improper cooling and a dull milling cutter on titanium can gall the surface. 冷卻不當和鈦合金上的鈍銑刀會磨損表面。
To gall means to cause pitting on a surface being cut from the friction between the two surfaces exceeding the bond of the material at a point. 磨傷是指由於兩個表面之間的摩擦超過材料在一點處的結合而在被切割的表面上造成點蝕。
The gallant soldiers defended the city against the attack. 英勇的士兵保衛城市抵禦攻擊。
He made a gallant effort to help the lady with her heavy bags. 他殷勤地努力幫助那位女士提重包。
The local art gallery is hosting an exhibition of modern painting. 當地藝廊（畫廊）正舉辦一場現代繪畫展。
She decided to display her latest landscape photos in the gallery. 她決定在畫廊（藝廊）展示她最新的風景照片。

meaning: 船舶或飛機上的廚房和烹飪設備；有時在稱為守車的商船上。
sentences: The term galley refers to the cookroom or kitchen and cooking apparatus of a vessel or aircraft; sometimes on merchant vessels called the caboose. 廚房一詞是指船舶或飛機上的廚房和烹飪設備；有時在稱為守車的商船上。
The lesson introduced galley as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了廚房作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
There are four quarts in one single US gallon of liquid. 一美制加侖液體等於四夸脫。
The car's fuel tank has a capacity of over fifteen gallons. 這輛車的油箱容量超過十五加侖。
The horse began to gallop across the wide green fields at sunset. 馬兒在日落時分開始在廣闊的綠色田野上奔馳。
The little boy galloped down the hallway to greet his father. 小男孩飛跑著穿過走廊去迎接父親。

meaning: 一種最初在蘇格蘭加洛韋飼養的小型馬。
sentences: The term galloway refers to a kind of small horse originally bred in Galloway, Scotland. 加洛韋一詞指的是一種最初在蘇格蘭加洛韋飼養的小型馬。
The lesson introduced galloway as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了加洛韋作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 國際象棋中犧牲材料以獲得優勢的開局。
sentences: Her clever gambit gave her an advantage. 她的巧妙策略為她帶來了優勢。
The term gambit refers to An opening in chess in which material is sacrificed to gain an advantage. 術語“棄兵”是指國際象棋中犧牲材料以獲得優勢的開局。
You should never gamble with money that you cannot afford to lose. 你絕對不應該拿你輸不起的錢去賭博。
Starting a new business is always a bit of a financial gamble. 創立新事業總是一場經濟上的冒險（賭博）。

meaning: 玩機會遊戲的人，賭博的人。
sentences: The term gambler refers to one who plays at a game of chance, who gambles. 賭徒一詞指的是玩機會遊戲、賭博的人。
The lesson introduced gambler as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「賭徒」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The kids are playing a computer game in the living room. 孩子們正在客廳玩電腦遊戲。
Our team won the championship game last night. 我們團隊昨晚贏得了冠軍賽。

meaning: 飛行航跡角；飛機的飛行路徑偏離水平面的角度。
sentences: The term gamma refers to flight path angle; the angle by which an aircraft's flight path deviates from the horizontal plane. 術語「伽瑪」指的是飛行航跡角；飛機的飛行路徑偏離水平面的角度。
The lesson introduced gamma as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了伽馬作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The gander is usually larger and more aggressive than the female goose. 公鵝通常比母鵝大且更具攻擊性。
Let me take a gander at your new car. 讓我看一眼你的新車。
The police are investigating several active criminal gangs in the city. 警方正調查城市裡幾個活躍的犯罪幫派。
A gang of young kids was playing happily in the neighborhood park. 一群小孩正在社區公園開心地玩耍。
The patient's leg had to be amputated due to severe gangrene. 由於嚴重的壞疽，病人的腿不得不被截肢。
The wound began to gangrene after it became infected. 傷口在感染後開始出現壞疽。
The movie tells the story of a notorious gangster in the city during the 1920s. 這部電影講述了 1920 年代城內一名臭名昭著的歹徒的故事。
He was arrested for his involvement with a local gangster group. 他因參與當地的幫派組織而被捕。
There is a significant income gap between the rich and the poor. 貧富之間存在著顯著的收入差距。
We need to find a way to bridge the gap between our cultures. 我們需要找到一種方法來彌合我們的文化差距。
There’s a gaping hole in the fence. 柵欄上有一個大洞。
The report describes the result as gaping. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。
He usually parks his car in the garage behind the house. 他通常把車停在房子後面的車庫裡。
The mechanic owns a small garage and repairs older automobiles. 技師擁有一間小修車廠並修理舊汽車。
The actors were dressed in traditional medieval garb. 演員們穿著傳統的中世紀服裝。
He was garbed in a dark suit for the formal event. 他穿著深色西裝參加正式活動。
Please remember to take out the garbage before you leave. 離開前請記得把垃圾拿出去倒。
The beach was littered with garbage after the music festival. 音樂節過後，海灘上到處都是垃圾。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "garbage can" for next week. 老師要我們把「garbage can」背起來，下週要用。
"garbage can" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「garbage can」非常好用。
The garbage truck comes every Tuesday morning to collect the trash. 垃圾車每週二早上來收垃圾。
The loud noise of the garbage truck woke me up early. 垃圾車巨大的響聲早早把我吵醒了。
The garden is full of beautiful colorful flowers in spring. 春天時花園裡開滿了美麗繽紛的花朵。
He likes to spend his weekends working in the garden. 他喜歡在週末在花園裡忙活。
He works as a professional gardener at a large private estate. 他在一個大型私人莊園擔任專業園丁。
The gardener spent the whole afternoon planting colorful spring flowers. 園丁花了一整下午種植繽紛的春季花卉。
The room was filled with the sweet scent of fresh gardenias. 房間裡瀰漫著新鮮梔子花的甜美香氣。
She wore a white gardenia in her hair for the wedding. 她婚禮時在頭髮上戴了一朵白梔子花。

meaning: 耕種土壤的過程或行為，特別是在花園中；照顧花園；園藝。
sentences: His hobby was gardening. 他的興趣是園藝。
The term gardening refers to The process or action of cultivating the soil, particularly in a garden; the care of a garden; horticulture. 園藝一詞是指耕種土壤的過程或行為，特別是在花園中；照顧花園；園藝。
The room was decorated in garish colors that were hard to look at. 房間佈置得花裡胡哨，讓人很難直視。
She wore a garish necklace with huge, bright stones. 她戴了一條鑲有巨大鮮豔寶石的俗氣項鍊。
The winner was presented with a beautiful garland of flowers. 獲勝者獲贈了一個美麗的花環。
The walls were garlanded with festive decorations. 牆上掛滿了節日裝飾。
Garlic is a key ingredient in many delicious Italian dishes. 大蒜是許多美味義大利菜的主要食材。
She added some minced garlic to the pan to enhance the flavor. 她在鍋裡加了一些蒜末以增添風味。
The boutique sells a variety of high-quality silk garments and accessories. 這家精品店出售各式各樣的高品質絲綢服裝和配飾。
Please make sure you clean the delicate garment according to the instructions. 請務必按照說明清洗這件精緻的衣服。

meaning: 去賺取；要得到;透過某種努力或由於某種事實而累積或獲得。
sentences: To garner support 為了獲得支持
He garnered a reputation as a language expert. 他贏得了語言專家的聲譽。

meaning: 一種堅硬透明的礦物，通常用作寶石和磨料。
sentences: The term garnet refers to a hard transparent mineral that is often used as gemstones and abrasives. 石榴石一詞是指一種堅硬透明的礦物，通常用作寶石和磨料。
The lesson introduced garnet as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了石榴石作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She used a slice of lemon to garnish the fish dish. 她用一片檸檬裝飾魚肉料理。
The chef added a sprig of parsley as a garnish to the soup. 廚師加了一枝歐芹作為湯的點綴。

meaning: 駐紮在這樣的哨所的部隊。
sentences: The term garrison refers to the troops stationed at such a post. 駐軍一詞是指駐紮在該哨所的部隊。
The lesson introduced garrison as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「駐軍」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He became very garrulous after a few glasses of wine. 喝了幾杯酒後，他變得非常饒舌。
The garrulous old man spent the afternoon telling stories to the children. 那位饒舌的老人花了一個下午給孩子們講故事。

meaning: 關閉；一個院子；克羅夫特；一個花園。
sentences: a cloister garth 修道院花園
The term garth refers to a close; a yard; a croft; a garden. Garth一詞指的是結束；一個院子；克羅夫特；一個花園。
The room was filled with a mysterious gas. 房間裡充滿了一種神祕的氣體。
Don't forget to turn off the gas after cooking. 別忘了做完飯後關掉瓦斯。

meaning: 與氣體有關或以氣體形式存在（處於液體和等離子體之間的中間狀態的物質）。
sentences: At room temperature, oxygen remains in a gaseous state. 在室溫下，氧氣保持氣態。
The mixture produced a gaseous vapor when heated. 此混合物在加熱時產生氣態蒸氣。

meaning: 做一個又深又長的切口；削減。
sentences: My leg got gashed. 我的腿被刮傷了。
People often gash when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會感到痛苦。
The price of gasoline has increased significantly lately. 汽油的價格最近顯著上漲。
Don't forget to fill up the gas tank before starting the trip. 長途旅行前別忘了加滿油。
The audience gasped in surprise at the magician's final trick. 觀眾對魔術師最後的戲法驚訝地倒抽了一口氣（喘氣）。
He was gasping for breath after running up the steep hill. 他爬上陡峭的山坡後直喘氣。
The patient was suffering from a gastric infection. 病人正患有胃部感染。
Gastric problems can be caused by poor diet and stress. 胃部問題可能是由飲食不當和壓力引起的。

meaning: 胃腸的。與胃和腸道有關的。
sentences: The patient is being treated for a gastrointestinal infection. 病人正在接受胃腸道感染的治療。
Gastrointestinal symptoms include nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. 胃腸症狀包括噁心、嘔吐和腹瀉。
Please remember to lock the front gate when you leave. 離開時請記得鎖上大門。
The passengers are waiting at the boarding gate. 乘客們正在登機口等待。

meaning: 有大門或其他限制通道。
sentences: a gated community; a source control system with gated check-ins 封閉式社群；具有門控簽入功能的原始碼控制系統
The report describes the result as gated. 該報告將結果描述為“門控”。

meaning: 任何可能導致更深入參與的興趣的事物或領域。
sentences: a gateway drug 入門藥物
The term gateway refers to any thing or area of interest that tends to lead to deeper involvement. 術語「網關」指的是任何傾向於導致更深入參與的興趣的事物或領域。
A large crowd gathered in the square to hear the politician's speech. 一大群人聚集在廣場聽政治家的演講。
The children were happily gathering colorful seashells on the beach. 孩子們正在海灘上開心地收集彩色貝殼。
The family gathering at Christmas was a very happy and moving occasion. 聖誕節的家庭聚會是一個非常快樂且動人的場合。
The annual gathering of local artists features exhibitions and workshops. 一年一度的當地藝術家集會（聚會）設有展覽和工作坊。

meaning: 輪胎的一部分，例如在高速公路一側看到的。
sentences: The term gator refers to a portion of a tire, such as seen on the side of a highway. 術語“鱷魚”指的是輪胎的一部分，例如在高速公路一側看到的。
The lesson introduced gator as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 gator 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
He felt very gauche and out of place at the formal event. 在正式活動中，他感到非常笨拙且格格不入。
It was a gauche remark that offended many people. 那是個笨拙的發言，冒犯了許多人。
The hotel was decorated in a gaudy style with too much gold and velvet. 這家飯店裝修得很俗氣，用了太多的金飾和絲絨。
She wore a gaudy outfit that attracted a lot of attention. 她穿了一套俗氣的服裝，引發了很多關注。
The technician used a special tool to gauge the pressure in the tank. 技術員使用特殊工具測量水箱內的壓力。
It is difficult to gauge the success of the project without more data. 沒有更多數據，很難評估專案的成功。

meaning: 手部防護甲，以前作為戰鬥挑戰而被扔下。
sentences: The term gauntlet refers to protective armor for the hands, formerly thrown down as a challenge to combat. 手套一詞指的是手部的防護盔甲，以前是作為戰鬥挑戰而扔下的。
The lesson introduced gauntlet as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「挑戰」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The nurse wrapped the wound in clean medical gauze. 護理師用乾淨的醫用紗布包紮了傷口。
She wore a beautiful dress made of light and delicate gauze. 她穿了一件由輕薄精緻的薄紗製成的漂亮連衣裙。
The city held a colorful parade to celebrate the rights of gay and lesbian people. 這座城市舉行了一場精彩的遊行來慶祝同性戀者的權利。
The children were in a gay mood as they prepared for the summer holiday. 孩子們在準備暑假時心情非常愉快（快樂）。
She stood on the pier and gazed out at the vast ocean at sunset. 她站在碼頭上，日落時分凝視（目光）著廣闊的大海。
He managed to hold her steady gaze for a few intense seconds now. 他現在竟然（能）與她那強烈的目光對視了幾秒鐘。

meaning: 在官方公報上宣布（某人）的地位；這涉及任命和破產。
sentences: To gazette means to announce the status of (someone) in an official gazette; this pertained to both appointments and bankruptcies. 公報是指在官方公報上宣布（某人）的地位；這涉及任命和破產。
People may gazette in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同的情況下發佈公報。
Please remember to pack all your essential camping gear tonight. 請記得今晚帶上妳所有的必備露營裝備（齒輪）。
The new mountain bicycle has over twenty different gears today. 這款新的山地自行車今天有超過二十個不同的檔位（齒輪）。
The mechanic is busy repairing the faulty gearbox. 技工正忙著修理故障的變速箱。
The new model features a smoother and more efficient gearbox. 新車型配備了更平順且更高效的變速箱。
The 4×4 could climb well, as it had relatively low gearing. 4×4 可以很好地爬升，因為它的傳動裝置相對較低。
The term gearing refers to The ratio of a system of gears. 術語“齒輪傳動”是指齒輪系統的比率。

meaning: 一位專門從事怪異和令人倒胃口行為的嘉年華表演者。
sentences: I once saw a geek bite the head off a live chicken. 我曾經看到一個極客咬掉了一隻活雞的頭。
The term geek refers to a carnival performer specializing in bizarre and unappetizing behavior. 極客一詞指的是專門從事怪異和令人倒胃口行為的嘉年華表演者。
A flock of geese was flying across the sky. 一群鵝飛過天空。
The geese were swimming peacefully in the pond. 鵝群在池塘裡安詳地游泳。
Hi, geezer, you alright? 嗨，老兄，你還好嗎？
The term geezer refers to Term of address for a male. 「geezer」一詞是指對男性的稱呼。
She applied some hair gel to style her hair. 她抹了一些髮膠來造型。
The team finally began to gel after several months of working together. 團隊在合作幾個月後終於開始磨合成功了。
The necklace was decorated with several small gems. 這條項鍊裝飾著幾顆小寶石。
The small village is a real hidden gem in the mountains. 這座小村莊真是群山中一顆隱藏的明珠。

sentences: the girdle of the world 世界的腰帶

meaning: 僻靜而狹窄的山谷，尤其是有河流穿過的山谷；山間窪地；戴爾。
sentences: The term glen refers to a secluded and narrow valley, especially one with a river running through it; a depression between hills; a dale. 「glen」一詞指的是僻靜而狹窄的山谷，尤其是有河流穿過的山谷；山間窪地；一個山谷。

The small boat began to glide slowly and peacefully down the narrow canal. 小船開始在狹窄的運河上緩慢而平靜地滑行（滑動）。
The eagle managed to glide high above the mountains without moving its wings. 老鷹成功地在山巒上空高高滑翔，無需扇動翅膀。

meaning: 任何針對無動力飛行進行最佳化的比空氣重的飛機；滑翔機。
sentences: The term glider refers to any heavier-than-air aircraft optimised for unpowered flight; a sailplane. 滑翔機一詞是指任何比空氣重且針對無動力飛行進行優化的飛機；一架滑翔機。
The lesson introduced glider as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了滑翔機作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The glimmer of the fireflies was pleasant to watch. 螢火蟲的閃爍令人賞心悅目。

The speaker responded globally during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了全球性的回應。

meaning: 使（某事）看起來比實際情況更光榮；毫無根據地認為某事或某人優秀。
sentences: Some movies glorify mobsters by making them seem like the cool kids around the block. 有些電影透過讓黑幫看起來像街區裡很酷的孩子來美化他們。
To glorify means to make (something) appear to be more glorious than it is; regard something or someone as excellent baselessly. 榮耀意味著使（某物）看起來比實際情況更榮耀；毫無根據地認為某事或某人優秀。
The view of the city from the mountain top was truly glorious today. 從山頂俯瞰城市的景色今天簡直太輝煌（壯麗）了。
The athlete was proud to win a glorious victory for his country. 那位運動員為能代表國家贏得一場輝煌的勝利感到自豪。
The athlete was proud to represent his country and win glory. 運動員為能代表國家並贏得榮耀感到自豪。
The old castle has lost much of its former glory over time. 這座舊城堡隨著時間的流逝失去了往日的許多榮光。
The new car has a beautiful high-gloss finish. 這輛新車有著漂亮的高光澤飾面。

meaning: 具有光滑、絲綢般的反光（閃亮）表面。
sentences: glossy magazine 光面雜誌
Something described as glossy is having a smooth, silklike, reflective (shiny) surface. 所謂光澤是指具有光滑、絲狀、反光（有光澤）的表面。
Don't forget to wear your gloves; it's freezing outside. 別忘了戴手套；外面冷極了。

The term glover refers to a person who makes or sells gloves. 手套一詞是指製造或銷售手套的人。
The lesson introduced glover as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 glover 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The setting sun cast a beautiful warm glow across the landscape. 落日為大地灑下了一層美麗溫暖的光輝。

The doctor monitored the patient's blood glucose levels. 醫生監測了病人的血糖水平。
I used some strong glue to fix the broken leg of the chair. 我用一些強力膠修好了椅子斷掉的腿。
The children were using glue and glitter to decorate their cards. 孩子們正在用膠水和亮粉裝飾他們的卡片。

Why are you looking so glum today? 你今天為什麼看起來這麼憂鬱？
a glut of the market 市場供過於求
The term glut refers to An excess, too much. 術語「過剩」指的是過量、太多。

meaning: 穀物中的主要蛋白質，尤其是小麥；負責麵團的彈性和烤麵包的結構。
sentences: The term gluten refers to the major protein in cereal grains, especially wheat; responsible for the elasticity in dough and the structure in baked bread. 麩質一詞是指穀物中的主要蛋白質，尤其是小麥；負責麵團的彈性和烤麵包的結構。
The lesson introduced gluten as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了麩質作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
He is a real glutton for chocolate cake. 他是個真正的巧克力蛋糕狂。
She is a glutton for punishment and always takes on extra work. 她是個自討苦吃的人，總是承擔額外的工作。
Gluttony is considered one of the seven deadly sins in some cultures. 在某些文化中，貪食被認為是七宗罪之一。
His gluttony led to several health problems over time. 他的暴飲暴食隨時間導致了幾個健康問題。
He gnashed his teeth in anger after hearing the decision. 聽到決定後，他憤怒地咬牙切齒。

the gnawings of mice 老鼠的啃咬
The term gnawing refers to The process by which something is gnawed. 啃咬一詞是指啃咬某物的過程。

meaning: 銀行家，尤其是一位神秘的國際銀行家。
sentences: the gnomes of Zurich 苏黎世的侏儒
The term gnome refers to a banker, especially a secretive international one. 侏儒一詞指的是銀行家，尤其是一位神秘的國際銀行家。

I have to go now, or I'll miss the last train home. 我現在得走了，否則我會趕不上最後一班回家的火車。

meaning: 擔任守門員、照顧球門、看管球網。
sentences: To goalie means to act as a goalie, to tend the goals, to mind the net. 守門員的意思是擔任守門員，負責射門，負責守門。

He decided to become a goalkeeper because he enjoyed the pressure and challenge. 他決定成為一名守門員，因為他喜歡壓力和挑戰。

Goat milk is considered very healthy and easy to digest for many. 對許多人來說，山羊奶被認為是非常健康且易於消化的。

meaning: 一種惡毒而怪誕的小型人形生物，通常與獸人或巨魔聯繫在一起。
sentences: The term goblin refers to a malevolent and grotesque diminutive humanoid, often associated with orcs or trolls. 妖精一詞指的是一種惡毒且怪誕的小型人形生物，通常與獸人或巨魔聯繫在一起。
The lesson introduced goblin as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了妖精這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Many people pray to God for guidance and support. 許多人向天主祈求指引和支持。

They prayed to God for strength and guidance during the difficult times. 他們祈求上帝在困難時期給予力量和指引。

meaning: 在促進某事物發展中發揮關鍵作用的人。
sentences: The term godfather refers to someone who plays a key role in fostering the development of something. 教父一詞指的是促進某事物發展中發揮關鍵作用的人。
The lesson introduced godfather as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「教父」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 以敬虔的方式；虔誠地；虔誠地；正義地。
sentences: All that will live godly in Christ Jesus shall suffer persecution. — 2. Tim. iii. 12. 凡在基督耶穌裡敬虔度日的人都會遭受迫害。 — 2.提姆.三. 12.
If someone acts godly, they do so in a way that is in a godly manner; piously; devoutly; righteously. 如果有人敬虔行事，他就會以敬虔的方式行事；虔誠地；虔誠地；正義地。

meaning: 地面是否適合騎乘、步行等
sentences: The going was very difficult over the ice. 在冰面上行走非常困難。
The term going refers to The suitability of ground for riding, walking etc. 術語「行走」是指地面是否適合騎行、步行等。

The athlete was proud to win a gold medal for his country. 那位運動員為能代表國家贏得金牌感到自豪。
The sunrise cast a beautiful golden light across the ocean. 日出在海面上灑下了美麗的金色光芒。

meaning: 顏色是金色的東西。金鷹。金鴴。金翅雀。一條金魚。一隻黃金獵犬。
sentences: The term goldie refers to something which is golden in color. The golden eagle. The golden plover. The goldfinch. A goldfish. A Golden Retriever. 「goldie」一詞指的是顏色呈金色的東西。金鷹。金鴴。金翅雀。一條金魚。一隻黃金獵犬。

meaning: 參加代碼高爾夫或正規表示式高爾夫的人。
sentences: The term golfer refers to one who takes part in code golf or regex golf. 高爾夫球手一詞是指參加代碼高爾夫或正規表示式高爾夫的人。

meaning: Goliath 的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term goliath refers to alternative letter-case form of Goliath. 術語“歌利亞”是指“歌利亞”的替代字母大小寫形式。

The days of my youth are gone. 我的青春歲月已經一去不復返了。

meaning: 使用鑼或類似裝置發送訊號。停止（原指才藝表演中的參賽者；後來指表演者、演講者）。警告。
sentences: The driver gonged the pedestrian crossing the tracks, but the pedestrian didn't stop. 司機催促行人過馬路，但行人並沒有停下來。

To gong means to send a signal to, using a gong or similar device. To halt (originally, a contestant in a talent show; later, a performer, a speaker). To warn. 鑼意味著使用鑼或類似設備發送訊號。停止（原指才藝表演中的參賽者；後來指表演者、演講者）。警告。

meaning: 一個丈夫；房子或家庭的主人。
sentences: The term goodman refers to a husband; the master of a house or family. Goodman一詞指的是丈夫；房子或家庭的主人。

meaning: 在文法上需要名詞的片語中用作咒語。
sentences: The term goodyear refers to used as an expletive in phrases grammatically requiring a noun. 術語“固特異”是指在語法上需要名詞的短語中用作咒語。

meaning: 中日漢字發音層，被認為是日本使用的第一個中日漢字閱讀類型。
sentences: The Buddhist term 権化 is read as gonge, using the kanji's goon readings. The Buddhist term 権化 is read as gonge, using the kanji's goon readings.

A flock of wild geese was flying south for the cold winter. 一群大雁正向南飛去度過寒冬。

To gore means to pierce with a horn or tusk. To gore 的意思是用角或獠牙刺穿。

meaning: 通道或通道被障礙物阻塞或阻塞；障礙本身。
sentences: an ice gorge in a river 河中的冰峽谷

meaning: 可恥的，而且常常令人不快。 （我們應該刪除這個感覺嗎？）
sentences: Her autobiography gives all the gory details of her many divorces. 她的自傳講述了她多次離婚的所有血腥細節。

meaning: 驚訝或熱情的溫和表達。
sentences: Gosh, I didn’t realize I’d cause so much trouble! 天哪，我沒想到我會惹這麼多麻煩！

meaning: 吃喝行家；認真對待食物的人。
sentences: The term gourmet refers to a connoisseur in eating and drinking; someone who takes their food seriously. 美食家一詞指的是飲食方面的鑑賞家；認真對待食物的人
The lesson introduced gourmet as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「美食」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 治理的過程或權力；政府或行政部門。
sentences: The term governance refers to the process, or the power, of governing; government or administration. 治理一詞是指治理的過程或權力；政府或行政部門。

meaning: 一位 女士 向自己家裡的 教育 教育 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki="ren" 兒童。
sentences: The term governess refers to A woman paid to educate children in their own home. 家庭教師這個字是指在自己家裡為 教育 孩子 wikiman:Wikirel="m/wiki="m" href="m/Cadman" href/wikiman)。 家庭女教師一詞是指受僱在自己家中教育孩子的婦女。 家庭教師這個字是指在自己家裡為教育孩子wikiman:Wikirel="m/wiki="m" href="m/Cadman" href/wikiman)。
The lesson introduced governess as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了家庭女教師這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了家庭女教師這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了家庭女教師這個易於理解的有用術語。

governmental agency 政府機構
governmental decision 政府決定

She was recently elected as the first female governor of the state. 她最近被選為該州的第一位女州長。
She wore a beautiful long white silk gown to the grand gala dinner. 她穿了一件漂亮的白色長絲綢袍（禮服）參加盛大的正式晚宴。
The graduates were proudly wearing their academic gowns and caps. 畢業生們正自豪地穿著他們的學士袍與帽子。
Please grab your coat and umbrella; we need to leave now. 請拿好妳的大衣和傘；我們現在得走了。

meaning: 以親切的方式；帶著優雅和禮貌。
sentences: The team responded graciously to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了慷慨的回應。

meaning: Grad 的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term grad refers to alternative letter-case form of Grad. 術語 grad 是指 Grad 的替代字母大小寫形式。

meaning: 評分者，或透過其完成或促進評分的人。
sentences: the graders of a school examination 學校考試的評分者
The term grader refers to one who grades, or that by means of which grading is done or facilitated. 術語「評分者」是指評分的人，或透過其完成或促進評分的人。

meaning: 以規則的傾斜度上升或下降。
sentences: the gradient line of a railroad 鐵路的坡度線
Something described as gradient is rising or descending by regular degrees of inclination. 被描述為梯度的東西是按規則的傾斜度上升或下降。
There has been a gradual improvement in his health over the weeks. 在過去的幾週裡，他的健康狀況有了逐漸的改善。
The transition to the new system will be a gradual process. 向新系統的過渡將是一個漸進的過程。

meaning: 循序漸進；進展緩慢；慢慢地。
sentences: If someone acts gradually, they do so in a way that is in a gradual manner; making slow progress; slowly. 如果某人採取漸進的方式，那麼他們會以漸進的方式這樣做；進展緩慢；慢慢地。
The speaker responded gradually during the discussion. 發言者在討論中逐漸做出回應。
My elder sister is a recent graduate of a top university in Taipei. 我姐姐是台北一所頂尖大學的應屆畢業生。
The graduation ceremony was attended by thousands of graduates. 數以千計的畢業生參加了畢業典禮。
Everyone gathered together to attend the university graduation today. 大家今天都聚在一起參加大學畢業典禮。
Next year marks the tenth anniversary of his high school graduation. 明年是他高中畢業十週年。
We had to put in a lot of hard graft to get the job done. 我們必須投入大量的精力才能完成這項工作。
The term graft refers to work; labor requiring effort. 「嫁接」一詞指的是工作；需要努力的勞動。

meaning: 研磨小麥漿果（包括麩皮）製成的麵粉。
sentences: The term graham refers to flour made by grinding wheat berries including the bran. 全麥一詞是指研磨包括麩皮在內的小麥漿果製成的麵粉。
The lesson introduced graham as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了格雷厄姆這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 熱切尋求或尋求的東西。
sentences: Becoming an astronaut was his grail. 成為太空人是他的夢想。
The term grail refers to something eagerly sought or quested for. 聖杯一詞指的是熱切尋求或尋求的東西。
Wheat and rice are the most important types of grain crops. 小麥和稻米是最重要的穀類作物種類。
The sand on the beach was very fine, almost like grains of sugar. 海灘上的沙子非常細，幾乎像糖粒一樣。
There are one thousand grams in one kilogram. 一公斤等於一千公克。
The recipe requires fifty grams of butter and two eggs. 這份食譜需要五十公克的奶油和兩個雞蛋。
Reading books is a great way to improve your English grammar now. 讀書是提升妳英文文法的一種好方法。
The teacher corrected the student's grammar errors during class. 老師在課堂上糾正了學生的文法錯誤。
The report contained several serious grammatical errors and typos. 報告包含了幾項嚴重的語法（文法）錯誤與拼寫錯誤。
You should pay close attention to grammatical structure in writing. 寫作時妳應密切注意語法結構。
The grand entrance of the hotel was decorated with fresh flowers. 飯店宏偉的入口裝飾著鮮花。
They are planning a grand celebration for their anniversary. 他們正計劃為他們的週年紀念日舉行盛大的慶祝活動。
The term grandchild refers to a child of someone's child. 孫子一詞是指某人孩子的孩子。
The lesson introduced grandchild as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了孫子這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 偉大 或 輝煌 的狀態；
sentences: The term grandeur refers to The state of being grand or splendid; magnificence. 宏偉一詞指的是 宏偉 或 輝煌 的狀態； 輝煌 的狀態； 宏偉一詞是指宏偉或輝煌的狀態；壯麗。 宏偉指的是宏偉或輝煌的狀態；輝煌的狀態；
The lesson introduced grandeur as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「宏偉」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了「宏偉」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了「宏偉」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
My grandfather tells the most amazing stories about his youth. 我祖父會講許多關於他年輕時精彩的故事。
We always visit our grandfather in the countryside during the holidays. 我們假期總是去鄉下探望祖父。
To grandma means to address (someone) as “grandma”. 奶奶的意思是稱呼（某人）為「奶奶」。
People may grandma in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下使用奶奶。
My grandmother makes the best apple pie in the world. 我祖母做的蘋果派是世界上最棒的。
She lives with her grandmother in a quiet little village. 她和祖母住在一個安靜的小村莊裡。

meaning: 表現得戲劇化或華麗，以給觀眾或觀察者留下深刻印象；迎合人群。
sentences: Many politicians prefer to grandstand on hot-button issues rather than enact tough policy changes. 許多政客更喜歡在熱門議題上譁眾取寵，而不是實施強硬的政策改變。
People often grandstand when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會譁眾取寵。

meaning: 農場及其相關建築物；農舍，尤指與修道院或莊園相關的農舍。
sentences: The term grange refers to a farm, with its associated buildings; a farmhouse, particularly one associated with a monastic order, or manor. 「grange」一詞指的是農場及其相關建築物；農舍，尤指與修道院或莊園相關的農舍。
The lesson introduced grange as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了田莊這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 田莊、國家畜牧贊助人田莊的成員，該協會是一個代表農民的協會。
sentences: The term granger refers to a member of the Grange, National Grange of the Patrons of Husbandry, an association representing farmers. 格蘭傑一詞指的是農莊、國家畜牧贊助人農莊（一個代表農民的協會）的成員。
The lesson introduced granger as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了格蘭傑這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 韌性;臉皮厚或粗糙的品質。
sentences: The term granite refers to toughness; the quality of having a thick skin or being rough. 花崗岩一詞指的是韌性；臉皮厚或粗糙的品質。
The lesson introduced granite as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了花崗岩作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 任何老年婦女，無論她是否有孫子。
sentences: That granny over there needs your assistance. 那邊的那位奶奶需要你的幫忙。
The term granny refers to any elderly woman, regardless of if she has grandchildren. 奶奶一詞指的是任何老年婦女，無論她是否有孫子。
The university decided to grant him a scholarship for his academic achievement. 大學決定因他的學術成就授予他獎學金。
The government provided a generous grant to support the new research project. 政府提供了一筆優厚的補助金（撥款）來支持這項新研究計畫。

meaning: 由顆粒或顆粒組成或類似。
sentences: a granular substance 顆粒狀物質
Something described as granular is consisting of, or resembling, granules or grains. 被描述為顆粒狀的東西由顆粒或顆粒組成，或類似顆粒或顆粒。
You should use granulated sugar for this recipe. 你應該為這個食譜使用顆粒砂糖。
Granulated fertilizers are easy to apply to the soil. 顆粒狀肥料很容易施用於土壤。
Taiwan is famous for its delicious and sweet black grapes. 台灣以其美味香甜的黑葡萄聞名。
Would you like some fresh red grapes or green grapes? 你想來點新鮮的紅葡萄還是綠葡萄？
She enjoys having half a fresh grapefruit for her breakfast every morning. 她喜歡每天早餐吃半個新鮮葡萄柚。
Grapefruit is a great source of Vitamin C and is good for your health. 葡萄柚是維生素 C 的重要來源，對健康有益。
The manager wrote down grapevine with the note "葡萄藤". 經理把 grapevine 記下來，並註記「葡萄藤」。
We practiced using grapevine in two different sentences. 我們練習把 grapevine 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The sales graph shows a significant increase in profit this quarter. 銷售圖形（圖表）顯示本季度利潤顯著增加。
Please look at the graph on page twenty of your science textbook. 請看妳科學課本第二十頁的圖形。
The report contains many graphic illustrations to explain the complex data. 報告中包含了許多圖表說明來解釋複雜數據。
She gave a very graphic account of the accident, which shocked everyone. 她對事故做了非常形象（生動）的描述，震驚了每個人。

meaning: 書寫或雕刻；由字母或線條組成。
sentences: Something described as graphical is written or engraved; formed of letters or lines. 被描述為圖形的東西被書寫或雕刻；由字母或線條組成。
The word graphical is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 圖形這個字通常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 電腦顯示的藝術或視覺表現。
sentences: This game is really fun, but the graphics aren't very good. 這個遊戲確實很有趣，但是圖形不是很好。
The term graphics refers to The art or visual representations displayed by a computer. 術語圖形是指電腦顯示的藝術或視覺表示。

meaning: 石墨增強塑料是一種由石墨纖維製成的複合塑料，具有輕質強度和剛度。
sentences: Modern tennis racquets are made of graphite, fibreglass and other man-made materials. 現代網球拍由石墨、玻璃纖維和其他人造材料製成。
The term graphite refers to graphite-reinforced plastic, a composite plastic made with graphite fibers noted for lightweight strength and stiffness. 石墨一詞是指石墨增強塑料，這是一種由石墨纖維製成的複合塑料，以輕質強度和剛度而聞名。

meaning: 思考並認真評估問題；努力應對。
sentences: to grapple with one's conscience 與自己的良心奮戰
To grapple means to ponder and intensely evaluate a problem; to struggle to deal with. 解決問題意味著思考並認真評估問題；去掙扎去應對。
It took me a while to grasp the meaning of the complex theory. 我花了一段時間才理解（掌握）這個複雜理論的含義。
She managed to grasp the heavy suitcase with both of her hands. 她設法用雙手抓住了那個沉重的行李箱。
The children were running barefoot on the soft green grass. 孩子們赤腳在柔軟的綠草地上跑著。
Don't walk on the grass; please stay on the path. 請勿踐踏草地，請走步道。
A large green grasshopper was happily jumping in the field. 一隻綠色大蚱蜢正開心地在田野裡跳躍。
Grasshoppers are known for their strong legs and loud chirping. 蚱蜢以其強壯的腿和響亮的鳴叫聲聞名。

meaning: 以草或草狀植被為主的區域。
sentences: The term grassland refers to An area dominated by grass or grasslike vegetation. 草原一詞是指以草或草狀植被為主的區域。
We learned the meaning of grassland during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了草原的涵義。
The children were happily playing on the soft grassy hill. 孩子們正開心地在柔軟的草坡上玩耍。
We spent the afternoon having a picnic in a quiet grassy area. 我們下午在一個安靜的草地上野餐度過。

meaning: 配備格柵；用格柵或橫桿保護。
sentences: to grate a window 磨碎窗戶
To grate means to furnish with grates; to protect with a grating or crossbars. 格柵意味著配備格柵；用格柵或橫桿進行保護。
I am truly grateful for all the help and support you've given me. 我對妳給我的一切幫助與支持深表感激（感激的）。
She was grateful that the accident didn't result in any injuries. 她慶幸（感激）那場事故沒有導致任何受傷。

meaning: 使心靈、食慾或味覺得滿足或愉悅的行為。
sentences: gratification of the heart gratification of the palate 心靈的滿足 味覺的滿足
The term gratification refers to The act of gratifying or pleasing, either the mind, or the appetite or taste. 滿足一詞是指使心靈、食慾或味覺得滿足或愉悅的行為。

meaning: 來自被磨碎的東西的鬆散材料。
sentences: Add a few gratings of nutmeg to the hot milk. 在熱牛奶中加入幾碎肉荳蔻。
The term grating refers to The loose material that comes from something being grated. 術語“光柵”是指來自被磨碎的物體的鬆散材料。
Everyone expressed their deep gratitude to the brave firefighters. 每個人都向勇敢的消防員們表達了深深的感激（之情）。
She sent a beautiful bouquet of flowers as a token of gratitude. 她送了一束鮮花作為感激的象徵。
The situation managed to become very grave as the crisis continued. 隨著危機持續，局勢竟然變得非常嚴重（沉重）。
The doctor warned him that the condition was grave and serious. 醫生警告他病況（沉重）非常嚴重。
The path was covered with fresh gray gravel. 小徑上鋪滿了新鮮的灰色碎石。
We heard the sound of footsteps on the gravel driveway. 我們聽到碎石路面上傳來的腳步聲。

meaning: 清晨的一段時間，活動很少。
sentences: graveyard shift, graveyard slot, graveyard watch 墓地輪班、墓地老虎機、墓地守望
The term graveyard refers to a period very early in the morning in which there is very little activity. 「墓地」一詞指的是清晨，活動很少的時期。

meaning: 傾向於或漂向某人或某物，就好像被重力拉著一樣。
sentences: Children naturally gravitate to such a big, friendly man. 孩子自然會被這樣一個大而友善的男人所吸引。
The guests slowly gravitated to the kitchen. 客人們慢慢被吸引到廚房。
The force of gravity keeps our feet on the ground and the planets in orbit. 重力使我們站在地面上，並使行星保持在軌道上。
We must all understand the gravity of the situation regarding climate change. 我們都必須了解氣候變遷局勢的嚴重性。

meaning: 一種由高湯和通常是肉汁製成的深色鹹味醬汁；棕色肉汁。
sentences: A roast dinner isn't complete without gravy. 沒有肉汁的烤晚餐是不完整的。
The term gravy refers to a dark savoury sauce prepared from stock and usually meat juices; brown gravy. 肉汁一詞是指由高湯和通常是肉汁製成的深色鹹味醬汁；棕色肉汁。
The sky turned gray just before the heavy rain started. 下大雨前天空變成了灰色。
He started to turn gray in his late thirties. 他在三十多歲末開始長白頭髮。
The cows were peacefully grazing in the green fields near the small village. 牛群正在小村莊附近的綠色田野裡平靜地吃草。
He managed to graze his knee when he tripped and fell on the stony path. 他絆倒在石頭路上時，擦傷了膝蓋。
The mechanic's hands were covered with black grease after repairing the engine. 技工修好引擎後，手上沾滿了黑色的油脂。
You should apply some grease to the door hinges to stop them from squeaking. 你應該在門鉸鏈上塗些潤滑脂，以免發出吱吱聲。
The fried chicken was a bit too greasy for my personal taste now. 炸雞對我現在的口味來說有點太油膩（膩）了。
You should avoid eating too much greasy food for your health today. 為了健康，妳現今應避免吃太油膩的食物。
The Great Wall of China is one of the seven wonders of the world. 中國長城是世界七大奇觀之一。
We had a great time at the concert last night. 我們昨晚在音樂會上玩得很開心。

meaning: 兩個（或很少超過兩個）事物：規模較大（更大）、價值、重要性等。
sentences: greater yellowlegs 大黃腿
Something described as greater is of two (or, rarely, more than two) things: the larger in size (bigger), in value, in importance etc. 被描述為「更大」的東西是由兩個（或很少是兩個以上）事物組成的：尺寸較大（更大）、價值較大、重要性較大等。

meaning: 在很大程度上或程度上。
sentences: Expenses greatly exceeded revenues this year, much to nobody's surprise. 今年的支出大大超過了收入，這並不奇怪。
He was more greatly beloved than anyone in living memory. 他比人們記憶中的任何人都更受愛戴。

meaning: 偉大的狀態、條件或品質
sentences: Due to the greatness of his size, he was an effective bodyguard. 由於他的體型巨大，他是一名有效的保鑣。
The term greatness refers to The state, condition, or quality of being great. 偉大一詞指的是偉大的狀態、條件或品質。
His greed for power and money eventually led to his downfall. 他對權力和金錢的貪婪最終導致了他的垮台。
The company was accused of putting its greed for profit above the environment. 該公司被指控將其對利潤的貪心置於環境之上。
You should not be so greedy; try to share with other people. 你不應該這麼貪心；試著與他人分享。
The greedy merchant was criticized for charging excessive prices. 那個貪婪的商人因收取過高價格而受到批評。
The fields are lush and green after the spring rain. 春雨過後，田野一片翠綠。
Green is my favorite color because it represents nature and life. 綠色是我最喜歡的顏色，因為它代表自然與生命。
The term greener refers to a newcomer; a recent immigrant. 綠色者一詞指的是新來者；新移民。
The lesson introduced greener as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「綠色」是一個易於理解的有用術語。
The farmer uses a greenhouse to grow fresh tropical plants. 農夫使用溫室來種植新鮮的熱帶植物。
The greenhouse effect is a major factor in global warming. 溫室效應是全球暖化的主要因素。

meaning: 木頭是綠色的；換句話說，沒有經過調味。
sentences: The term greenwood refers to wood that is green; in other words, not seasoned. 綠木一詞指的是綠色的木材；換句話說，沒有經驗豐富。
The lesson introduced greenwood as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了綠林這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He greeted everyone with a warm and friendly smile. 他帶著溫暖友善的笑容向每個人打招呼。
The host stood at the door to greet the guests as they arrived. 主人站在門口迎接抵達的客人。
The two friends exchanged warm greetings after not seeing each other for years. 兩位朋友在多年未見後互致親切問候。
She received a birthday greeting from her favorite aunt. 她收到了她最喜歡的姨媽寄來的生日祝福。
The host gave a warm and friendly greeting to all of the guests. 主人對所有的賓客給予了溫暖友好的問候（打招呼）。
Season's greetings to you and your entire family for the holiday! 祝妳和妳全家節日快樂（問候）！

meaning: 一種小型爆炸裝置，設計用於用手投擲或使用步槍、榴彈發射器或火箭發射。
sentences: The term grenade refers to a small explosive device, designed to be thrown by hand or launched using a rifle, grenade launcher, or rocket. 手榴彈一詞是指一種小型爆炸裝置，設計用於用手投擲或使用步槍、榴彈發射器或火箭發射。
The lesson introduced grenade as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了手榴彈作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 灰色的英聯邦標準拼寫。
sentences: Something described as grey is commonwealth standard spelling of gray. 被描述為灰色的東西是灰色的英聯邦標準拼寫。
The word grey is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 灰色這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
Greyhounds are known for their incredible speed and grace. 靈緹犬以其驚人的速度和優雅著稱。
He rescued a retired racing greyhound from a local shelter. 他在當地的收容所救出了一隻退役的比賽用靈緹犬。
On the SAT, to answer a grid-in question, you grid in your answer by filling out the ovals. 在 SAT 考試中，要回答網格問題，您可以透過填寫橢圓形來將答案網格化。
To grid means to enter in a grid. 進入網格意味著進入網格。
Everyone felt a deep sense of grief after the news of the accident. 每個人在聽到事故的消息後都感到深深的悲傷。
Time is often considered the best healer for intense human grief. 時間通常被認為是癒合人類極度悲傷的最佳良藥。
Employees can submit their grievances to the human resources department. 員工可以向人力資源部門提交他們的不滿。
She felt she had a legitimate grievance about the way she was treated. 她覺得自己對受到的對待有正當的怨言。
The family gathered to grieve for their beloved grandfather who had passed away. 全家人聚集在一起，哀悼（悲傷）他們去世的祖父。
It takes time to grieve the loss of a loved one and find peace again. 哀悼失去所愛的人並重新找到平靜需要時間。

meaning: 一種具有獅子身體、鷹翼和頭的神獸。
sentences: The term griffin refers to a mythical beast having the body of a lion and the wings and head of an eagle. 獅鷲這個字指的是一種神話中的野獸，有獅子的身體和鷹的翅膀和頭。
The lesson introduced griffin as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「格里芬」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
We decided to grill some steaks and vegetables in the backyard for dinner. 我們決定在後院烤一些牛排和蔬菜當晚餐。
The police spent hours grilling the suspect about his whereabouts. 警方花了幾個小時盤問嫌疑人的去向。

meaning: 就像在烤架上煮熟一樣。
sentences: After a day in the sun, he looked more grilled than his hamburger. 在陽光下曬了一天后，他看起來比他的漢堡還要烤。
The report describes the result as grilled. 報告將結果描述為「烤焦」。
The economic outlook for the next year remains grim and uncertain. 明年的經濟前景依然嚴峻且充滿不確定性。
The soldiers' faces were grim as they prepared for the difficult battle. 士兵們準備迎接艱難戰鬥時，臉上表情沈重（嚴峻）。
He let out a grimace of pain after hitting his thumb. 大拇指被砸到後，他露出痛苦的表情。
The child made a funny grimace at his mother. 孩子對母親扮了個滑稽的鬼臉。

meaning: 根深蒂固且難以清除的污垢、油脂、煙灰等。
sentences: Underneath all that soot, dirt and grime is the true beauty of the church in soft shades of sandstone. 在所有煙灰、污垢和污垢之下，是教堂在柔和的砂岩色調下的真正美麗。
The term grime refers to dirt, grease, soot, etc. that is ingrained and difficult to remove. 污垢一詞是指根深蒂固且難以清除的污垢、油脂、煙灰等。
He had a wide grin on his face when he heard the good news. 聽到好消息時，他臉上帶著燦爛的咧嘴笑。
She grinned at me and waved her hand from across the street. 她對我咧嘴一笑，並從街道對面揮了揮手。
She used a traditional stone mortar to grind the fresh spices. 她用傳統的石臼來研磨新鮮香料。
The machine manages to grind the hard coffee beans into powder. 這台機器竟然（能）將堅硬的咖啡豆磨成（研磨）粉末。

meaning: 無情地徵稅；繁重的；嚴格到精疲力盡的地步。
sentences: A week of filled with grinding toil. 一週的時間充滿了艱辛的勞動。
The report describes the result as grinding. 報告將結果描述為研磨。

meaning: grin 的現在分詞與動名詞
sentences: I’m grinning because someone told me a joke. 我笑了，因為有人跟我講了個笑話。
People often grinning when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會微笑。
She had a firm grip on the handle of the heavy suitcase. 她緊緊握住沈重手提箱的把手。
The city was in the grip of a severe winter storm for several days. 這座城市連續幾天都籠罩在嚴重的冬季風暴之中（受掌控）。

meaning: 所掌握的；一個把手；握力。
sentences: the gripe of a sword 劍的握力
The term gripe refers to That which is grasped; a handle; a grip. 抱怨這個字指的是被抓住的東西；一個把手；握力。
The sand was full of tiny pieces of grit. 沙子裡充滿了細小的沙礫。
It takes a lot of grit and determination to succeed in this industry. 要在這個產業成功需要很大的勇氣與決心。
That goth woman is very gritty. 那個哥德女人非常堅韌。
Something described as gritty is spirited; resolute; unyielding. 被描述為堅韌的東西是充滿活力的；堅決;不屈。

meaning: 脾氣暴躁或煩躁地哭泣或抱怨。
sentences: a grizzly baby 灰熊寶寶
Something described as grizzly is crying or whingeing in a bad-tempered or irritable way. 被描述為灰熊的東西是指以脾氣暴躁或易怒的方式哭泣或抱怨。
The patient began to groan in pain as the medication began to wear off. 隨著藥效開始消退，病人開始因痛苦而呻吟。
He's always groaning about how much work he has to do every single day. 他總是抱怨（呻吟）自己每天有做不完的工作。

meaning: 負載沉重，彷彿在壓力下嘎吱作響。
sentences: We sat down to a groaning table and feasted all evening. 我們坐在一張嘎吱作響的桌子旁，吃了一整晚的大餐。
The report describes the result as groaning. 報告將結果描述為“呻吟”。
To grocer means to sell groceries; to act as a grocer. Togrocer 指的是出售雜貨；充當雜貨商。
People may grocer in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下去雜貨店。
I need to go to the grocery store to buy some milk and eggs. 我需要去雜貨店買點牛奶和雞蛋。
We usually do our grocery shopping on Saturday morning. 我們通常在週六早上買雜貨。
The athlete suffered a strain in his groin during practice. 這位運動員在練習時拉傷了腹股溝。
The doctor examined the patient's groin area for any abnormalities. 醫生檢查了病人的腹股溝區域是否有任何異常。

meaning: 表演、跳舞或享受有節奏的音樂。
sentences: I was just starting to groove to the band when we had to leave. 當我們不得不離開時，我正開始跟著樂團一起律動。
To groove means to perform, dance to, or enjoy rhythmic music. 律動意味著表演、跳舞或享受有節奏的音樂。

meaning: 屬於、關於或具有凹槽的。
sentences: The back of the tile was groovy so that it could hold the adhesive compound. 磁磚的背面有凹槽，可以容納黏合劑。
Something described as groovy is of, pertaining to, or having grooves. 被描述為「groovy」的東西是屬於、屬於或具有凹槽的。
The company's gross income has increased significantly over the past year. 公司的總收入在過去一年中顯著增加。
That's gross! Please don't pick your nose in front of everyone. 太噁心了！請不要在大家面前挖鼻子。

meaning: 大大;在很大程度上，尤其是大到足以坦率地評價的程度。
sentences: grossly inflated expectations 嚴重誇大的期望
grossly enlarged hepatic lobes, evident on palpation 肝葉明顯增大，觸診明顯

meaning: 形狀或大小扭曲且不自然；異常的，尤其是以一種可怕的方式。
sentences: Something described as grotesque is distorted and unnatural in shape or size; abnormal, especially in a hideous way. 被描述為怪誕的事物是指形狀或大小扭曲且不自然的事物；不正常，尤其是以一種可怕的方式。
The word grotesque is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 怪誕這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
The ground was covered with colorful fallen leaves in autumn. 地面覆蓋著繽紛的落葉。
Be careful not to sit on the cold and damp ground. 小心別坐在寒冷潮濕的地上。

meaning: 液體底部的沉積物，或液體已從中過濾出來的沉積物。
sentences: The term grounds refers to The sediment at the bottom of a liquid, or from which a liquid has been filtered. 術語「渣」是指液體底部的沉積物，或液體已從中過濾出來的沉積物。
We learned the meaning of grounds during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了理由的含義。

meaning: 基金會 ；支持或允許其餘部分的 基本 或<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/tiftlement" 基本部分。
sentences: The discovery of the laws of electricity laid the groundwork for a century of innovation. 電定律的發現為一個世紀的創新奠定了 基礎 。 電定律的發現為一個世紀的創新奠定了基礎。 電動力學的發現為一個世紀的創新奠定了基礎。

The term groundwork refers to The foundation; the basic or fundamental parts that support or allow for the rest. 「基礎」一詞指的是 基金會 ；支持或允許其餘部分的 基本 或<a rel="m=") 基本部分。 「基礎」一詞是指基礎；支持或允許其餘部分的基本或基本部分。 「基礎」指的是基金會；支持或允許其餘部分的基本部分或<a rel="m=") 基本部分。
A group of students was discussing the project in the library. 一群學生正在圖書館討論專案。
The company is divided into several different work groups. 公司被分成幾個不同的工作小組。
The term grouse refers to a cause for complaint; a grumble. 松雞一詞指的是抱怨的原因；一聲抱怨。
The lesson introduced grouse as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了松雞作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I spent the whole afternoon grouting the kitchen floor. 我花了整個下午給廚房地板灌漿。
People often grout when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會發牢騷。

meaning: 在樹林中耕種；自然生長，形成樹林。
sentences: To grove means to cultivate in groves; to grow naturally so as to form groves. To grove的意思是在樹林裡耕種；自然生長，形成樹林。
People may grove in different situations depending on the context. 根據環境的不同，人們可能會陷入不同的情況。
He had to grovel to his boss to keep his job. 他不得不對老闆卑躬屈膝以保住工作。
The beggar was groveling on the ground, asking for money. 乞丐蜷伏在地上乞討錢財。
Rice and vegetables grow well in this fertile soil. 水稻和蔬菜在這種肥沃的土壤中生長良好。
Children grow up so fast these days! 現在的孩子長大得真快！
He was an orange grower from Florida. 他是來自佛羅裡達州的一名橙子種植者。
The term grower refers to a farmer; one who grows things. 種植者一詞指的是農民；種植東西的人。
The growing season here begins in March. 這裡的生長季節從三月開始。
The term growing refers to The raising of plants. 術語“種植”是指植物的培育。
The large dog began to growl at the stranger who was approaching the gate. 大狗對著靠近大門的陌生人低吼（咆哮）。
I could hear his stomach growl, as he hadn't eaten anything all day. 我能聽到他肚子咕咕叫（低吼），因為他一整天都沒吃東西。

meaning: 持續發出咆哮聲或喉音。
sentences: The growling from her stomach told us she was hungry. 她的肚子咕嚕咕嚕叫，告訴我們她餓了。
The term growling refers to A sustained instance of growls or guttural noises. 咆哮一詞是指持續的咆哮或喉音。
What once was a farm was grown with trees. 曾經的農場現在種滿了樹木。
Something described as grown is covered by growth; overgrown. 被描述為「成長」的東西被「成長」所覆蓋；雜草叢生。
Regular exercise is essential for the healthy growth of children. 定期運動對於兒童的健康成長至關重要。
The company has experienced rapid growth in the international market. 公司在國際市場經歷了快速增長。

meaning: 挖掘；連根拔起；藉由挖掘來連根拔起；經常跟隨 up。
sentences: to grub up trees, rushes, or sedge 拔除樹木、燈芯草或莎草
To grub means to dig; to dig up by the roots; to root out by digging; often followed by up. grub 的意思是挖掘；連根拔起；透過挖掘來連根拔起；經常跟著up。
He's a grubby little boy, always playing around by the stream. 他是個 骯髒 的小男孩，總是在溪邊玩耍。 他是個髒兮兮的小男孩，總是在小溪邊玩耍。 他是個骯髒的小男孩，總是在溪邊。
The report describes the result as grubby. The report describes the result as grubby. 報告將結果描述為骯髒不堪。報告將結果描述為骯髒不堪。

meaning: 對某事或某人的根深蒂固和/或長期的敵意或惡意，尤其是由於感知到的虐待。
sentences: to have, hold, owe or bear a grudge against someone 對某人有、持有、欠某人或懷有怨恨
The term grudge refers to deep-seated and/or long-term animosity or ill will about something or someone, especially due to perceived mistreatment. 怨恨一詞指的是對某事或某人的根深蒂固和/或長期的敵意或惡意，尤其是由於感知到的虐待而產生的。
The team was so unprepared that the way it played was just gruesome. 球隊毫無準備，比賽的方式非常可怕。
Something described as gruesome is awful, terrible. 形容為可怕的東西是可怕的、可怕的。
Stop grumbling about the weather and try to enjoy your summer holiday. 別再為天氣發牢騷（抱怨）了，試著享受你的暑假吧。
We could hear the distant grumble of thunder as the storm approached. 我們能聽到暴風雪臨近時遠處隆隆的雷聲。
He is always grumpy in the morning before he has his coffee. 他在早晨喝咖啡前總是很暴躁。
The grumpy old man shouted at the children playing in front of his house. 那個脾氣暴躁的老人對著在他家門前玩耍的孩子大喊大叫。
Who just grunted? 剛才是誰咕噥了一聲？
To grunt means to break wind; to fart. 咕嚕聲意味著放屁；放屁。
The company provides a one-year guarantee for its new products. 公司為其新產品提供一年保證（保固）。
I can guarantee that everything will be fine in the end, really. 我可以保證最後一切都會好起來的，真的。
The security guard checked my identification at the entrance. 保全人員在入口處檢查了我的身分證。
You should always be on your guard against online scams. 你應該時刻警惕，防範網路詐騙。
His elder brother was appointed as his legal guardian lately. 他的哥哥最近被任命為他的法定監護人。
The organization aims to act as a guardian of the environment. 該組織旨在擔任環境的守護者（監護人）。

meaning: 擔任監護人或保管人（尤其是具有法律身分）的職務或職位。
sentences: The term guardianship refers to The office or position of one acting as a guardian or conservator, especially in a legal capacity. 監護權一詞是指擔任監護人或保管人的職務或職位，尤其是具有法律身分的人。
We learned the meaning of guardianship during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了監護的意義。
Guava is a tropical fruit that is rich in Vitamin C and fiber. 番石榴是一種富含維生素 C 和纖維的熱帶水果。
Taiwanese guavas are very sweet and crunchy, and everyone loves them. 台灣的番石榴又甜又脆，每個人都喜歡吃。

meaning: 海員針織羊毛衫，類似運動衫。
sentences: The term guernsey refers to a seaman's knitted woolen sweater, similar to a jersey. 根西島一詞指的是海員針織羊毛衫，類似運動衫。
The lesson introduced guernsey as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了根西島作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 獨立小團體中的士兵，透過突襲與政府或正規軍作戰。
sentences: The right-wing paramilitary's offensive against the Marxist guerrillas failed because they did not know the terrain well enough. 右翼準軍事部隊對馬克思主義遊擊隊的攻擊失敗，是因為他們對地形不夠了解。
The term guerrilla refers to a soldier in a small independent group, fighting against the government or regular forces by surprise raids. 遊擊隊一詞指的是一個小型獨立團體中的士兵，透過突襲與政府或正規部隊作戰。
Can you guess how old she is? 她看起來非常年輕。 你能猜出她幾歲嗎？
I guess that we will reach our destination in about an hour. 我猜我們大約在一小時後會到達目的地。
We are expecting some guests for dinner tomorrow evening. 我們預計明晚會有一些客人來家裡吃晚餐。
The hotel provides various amenities to ensure its guests' comfort. 飯店提供各種設施以確保客人的舒適。
The counselor provided professional guidance to the students. 顧問為學生提供了專業的指導。
We need more guidance from the manager on how to finish the task. 我們需要經理就如何完成任務提供更多指導。
The experienced guide led us through the dense mountain forest. 經驗豐富的導遊帶領我們穿過茂密的森林。
This handbook is a useful guide for new employees at the company. 這本手冊是公司新員工的實用指南。
The government issued new guidelines for healthy eating and physical exercise. 政府發布了新的健康飲食和體育鍛煉指導方針。
Please make sure you follow the guidelines provided in the instruction manual. 請確保您遵循說明書中提供的準則。

meaning: 一群具有共同特徵或習慣的不同物種。
sentences: The term guild refers to a group of diverse species that share common characteristics or habits. 行會一詞是指具有共同特徵或習慣的不同物種的群體。
The lesson introduced guild as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「行會」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The detective used a bit of guile to catch the suspect. 探員用了一點計謀抓住了嫌犯。
He is a man of great intelligence and guile. 他是一個非常聰明且有心機的人。

meaning: 使用斷頭台（對某人或某事）。用斷頭台處決（某人）。
sentences: Many counterrevolutionaries were guillotined during the French Revolution. 法國大革命期間，許多反革命分子被送上斷頭台。
People often guillotine when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會被送上斷頭台。
He felt a sense of deep guilt for his dishonest behavior earlier. 他對自己早先不誠實的行為感到深深的內疚（有罪感）。
The prisoner managing to admit his guilt in the court today. 囚犯今天在法庭上竟然（設法）承認了自己的罪行（有罪）。
The jury found the defendant guilty of all the serious charges. 陪審團判定被告所有嚴重指控罪名成立（有罪的）。
She felt very guilty about forgetting her best friend's birthday. 她對忘記好友的生日感到非常內疚（有罪的）。
The antique vase was sold for five hundred guineas at the auction. 這只古董花瓶在拍賣會上以五百幾尼的價格成交。
Guinea was a currency used in Britain before decimalization. 幾尼是英國在實行十進制前使用的貨幣。

meaning: 具有誤導性的外觀；一個罩子，一件斗篷。
sentences: Under the guise of patriotism 打著愛國主義的幌子
The term guise refers to a misleading appearance; a cover, a cloak. 偽裝一詞指的是具有誤導性的外觀；蓋，斗篷。
My brother is a talented musician who plays the guitar and piano. 我哥哥是一位有才華的音樂家，會彈吉他和鋼琴。
She is learning how to play the guitar through online tutorials. 她正在透過線上教學學習如何彈吉他。
The term guitarist refers to someone who plays a guitar. 吉他手一詞是指彈吉他的人。
The lesson introduced guitarist as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了吉他手這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The city is located on the beautiful coast of the Persian Gulf. 這座城市位於波斯灣美麗的海岸上。
There is a significant income gulf between the rich and the poor. 貧富之間存在著顯著的收入鴻溝（海灣，指差距）。

meaning: 容易受騙或受騙；天真，容易被欺騙或愚弄。
sentences: Andrew is so gullible, the way he still believes in Santa Claus, the Easter Bunny, the Tooth Fairy, and the Sandman at the age of fourteen. 安德魯太容易受騙了，他在十四歲的時候仍然相信聖誕老人、復活節兔子、牙齒仙子和睡魔。
The report describes the result as gullible. 報告稱這一結果是容易受騙的。

meaning: 守備位置位於方陣後方約 30 度的偏側，位於卡位和點之間；處於此位置的外野手。
sentences: The term gully refers to a fielding position on the off side about 30 degrees behind square, between the slips and point; a fielder in such a position. 術語「溝壑」是指在方陣後方約 30 度的邊線防守位置，位於卡瓦和點之間；處於這種位置的外野手。
The lesson introduced gully as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了溝壑作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
It is considered impolite to chew gum during an interview. 在面試中嚼口香糖被認為是不禮貌的。
The dentist checked his gums to ensure they were healthy. 牙醫檢查了他的牙齦，以確保它們健康。
The police officer was required to carry a gun for safety reasons. 警察出於安全原因被要求攜帶槍支。
Hunting with a gun is strictly regulated in many world countries. 在許多國家，持槍狩獵受到嚴格管制。

meaning: 用槍射擊，通常會發出響亮的聲音。
sentences: Let's hide in the trees to avoid the gunfire. 我們躲到樹上躲避槍聲吧。
Sergeant, direct your gunfire toward that copse of trees. 中士，將你的槍口對準那片樹林。

meaning: 持槍的罪犯，尤其是職業殺手。
sentences: The term gunman refers to a criminal armed with a gun, especially a professional killer. 槍手一詞是指持有槍枝的犯罪分子，尤其是職業殺手。
The lesson introduced gunman as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「槍手」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 過於積極進取的人；表現出過度野心的人。
sentences: The term gunner refers to an excessive go-getter; one exhibiting over-ambition. 砲手一詞指的是過度進取的人。一個表現出過度野心的人。
The lesson introduced gunner as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「槍手」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 硝石（硝酸鉀）、木炭和硫磺的爆炸性混合物；以前用於射擊，但現在主要用於煙火。
sentences: The term gunpowder refers to an explosive mixture of saltpetre (potassium nitrate), charcoal and sulfur; formerly used in gunnery but now mostly used in fireworks. 火藥一詞是指硝石（硝酸鉀）、木炭和硫磺的爆炸性混合物；以前用於射擊，但現在主要用於煙火。
The lesson introduced gunpowder as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了火藥，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 槍的射擊距離；槍的射程或射程。
sentences: The term gunshot refers to the distance to which shot can be thrown from a gun; the reach or range of a gun. 槍聲一詞是指從槍中射出子彈的距離；槍的射程或射程。
The lesson introduced gunshot as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了槍聲作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 充當導師；提供明智的建議。
sentences: To guru means to act as a guru; to give wise advice. To guru（上師）意味著充當上師；提供明智的建議。
People may guru in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下擔任導師。
The term gust refers to a strong, abrupt rush of wind. 陣風一詞指的是強烈、突然的風。
The lesson introduced gust as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了陣風這個非常有用的術語，需要理解。

meaning: 熱情; 享受 ，<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="ti="/vigor" href="
sentences: He sang with more gusto than talent. 他唱歌時 熱情 多於才華。 他唱歌的熱情多於才華。 他歌唱時熱情多於才華。
The term gusto refers to Enthusiasm; enjoyment, vigor. 「gusto」一詞指的是 熱情; 享受 ，<a rel="m="w/ikitt gusto 這個字指的是熱情；享受，活力。 「熱情」指的是熱情； 享受，<a rel="m="w/ikitt
I have a gut feeling that something is not quite right about this situation. 我有種直覺，覺得這種情況有些不對勁。
It took a lot of guts for her to quit her stable job and start her own business. 她辭掉穩定工作去創業需要很大的勇氣。

meaning: 建築物屋簷下輸送雨水的管道或通道；屋簷。
sentences: The gutters must be cleared of leaves a few times a year. 每年必須清除排水溝幾次樹葉。
The term gutter refers to a duct or channel beneath the eaves of a building to carry rain water; eavestrough. 天溝一詞是指建築物屋簷下用於輸送雨水的管道或渠道；屋簷。
He is a nice guy who is always willing to help others. 他是個好人，總是樂於助人。
Who is that guy standing over there by the door? 站在門邊的那個人是誰？
He goes to the local gym every morning before work to exercise. 他每天早上上班前去當地的健身房鍛煉。
The school gymnasium was renovated with new basketball courts. 學校體育館經過翻修，增加了新的籃球場。

meaning: 一項需要進行一系列動作的運動，需要體力、靈活性和動覺意識。
sentences: Gymnastics was a significant part of the physical education curriculum. 體操是體育課程的重要組成部分。
The term gymnastics refers to A sport involving the performance of sequences of movements requiring physical strength, flexibility, and kinesthetic awareness. 體操一詞是指一項需要體力、靈活性和動覺意識的一系列動作的運動。
Women should have regular gynecological check-ups. 女性應定期進行婦科檢查。
The hospital has a specialized gynecological department. 這家醫院設有專門的婦科部門。

meaning: 流動人士或任何人，不一定是羅姆人；修補匠、旅行者或狂歡者。
sentences: The term gypsy refers to an itinerant person or any person, not necessarily Romani; a tinker, a traveller or a carny. 吉卜賽一詞指的是流動的人或任何人，不一定是羅姆人；修補匠、旅行者或狂歡者。
The lesson introduced gypsy as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「吉普賽人」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種希臘三明治，通常填入烤肉、番茄、洋蔥和酸奶黃瓜醬。
sentences: I'll have a gyro, please. 請給我一個陀螺儀。
The term gyro refers to A style of Greek sandwich commonly filled with grilled meat, tomato, onions, and tzatziki sauce. 陀螺儀一詞指的是一種希臘三明治，通常填入烤肉、番茄、洋蔥和酸奶黃瓜醬。
The metal was galvanically coated with a thin layer of zinc. 這種金屬被以電流方式鍍上了一層薄薄的鋅。
The two metals reacted galvanically in the salt water. 這兩種金屬在鹽水中產生了電流反應。
Galvanism was a popular subject of study in the 18th century. 流電學是 18 世紀熱門的研究主題。
The experiment demonstrated the principles of galvanism. 該實驗展示了流電的原理。

meaning: 流電學家；流電療法專家
sentences: The galvanist treated the patient using low-voltage currents. 這位流電療法專家使用低壓電流治療病人。
As a skilled galvanist, he understood the effects of electricity on muscles. 作為一名熟練的流電學家，他了解電力對肌肉的影響。
Galvanization protects the steel from rusting. 鍍鋅保護鋼材免於生鏽。
The speech led to the galvanization of the entire community. 這場演講促使了整個社區的積極響應。
We need to galvanize the metal pipes to prevent corrosion. 我們需要給金屬管鍍鋅以防止腐蝕。
The tragedy served to galvanize public opinion. 這場悲劇激發了公眾輿論。
The fence is made of galvanized steel. 圍欄是由鍍鋅鋼製成的。
A galvanized group of activists marched to the city hall. 一群受到激勵的活動人士向市政廳前進。
The company is a leading galvanizer of industrial components. 該公司是工業零件的主要鍍鋅廠商。
He was a natural galvanizer, always inspiring his team. 他是一個天生的激勵者，總能鼓舞他的團隊。
The doctor used galvanocauterization to remove the small growth. 醫生使用電烙術切除了這個小贅生物。
Galvanocauterization is a common surgical procedure. 電烙術是一種常見的手術程序。
The surgeon prepared the galvanocautery for the operation. 外科醫生為手術準備了電烙器。
Galvanocautery helps to minimize bleeding during surgery. 電烙法有助於減少手術過程中的出血。
The researchers studied the galvanocontractility of the muscle tissue. 研究人員研究了肌肉組織的電收縮性。
Impaired galvanocontractility can be a sign of nerve damage. 電收縮性受損可能是神經損傷的跡象。

meaning: 聯合電療法 (直流電與感應電聯合應用)
sentences: Galvanofaradization was used to treat the patient's paralysis. 聯合電療法被用來治療病人的癱瘓。
The therapist explained the benefits of galvanofaradization. 治療師解釋了聯合電療法的益處。
The antique book featured a beautiful galvanoglyph illustration. 這本古籍中有一幅美麗的電鍍版插圖。
He carefully cleaned the delicate galvanoglyph. 他小心地清洗了這塊精緻的電鍍版。
Galvanoglyphy was a major advancement in 19th-century printing. 電鍍版印刷術是 19 世紀印刷技術的一大進步。
She researched the history of galvanoglyphy. 她研究了電鍍版印刷術的歷史。
The scientist used a galvanograph to record the electrical changes. 科學家使用電記錄器來記錄電學變化。
This rare galvanograph shows great detail. 這幅罕見的電鍍版畫展示了極大的細節。

meaning: 電記錄器的；電鍍版畫的
sentences: The lab used galvanographic equipment for the study. 實驗室使用電記錄設備進行研究。
She analyzed the galvanographic patterns on the plate. 她分析了金屬板上的電鍍版畫圖案。

meaning: 電鍍版術；電生理記錄法
sentences: Galvanography allows for the creation of high-quality printing plates. 電鍍版術可以製作高品質的印刷版。
The report detailed the findings of the galvanography test. 報告詳細說明了電生理記錄測試的結果。
The galvanologist conducted experiments on animal electricity. 這位流電學家對動物電進行了實驗。
He is a renowned galvanologist in the field of physics. 他是物理學領域著名的流電學家。
Galvanology deals with the chemical production of electricity. 流電學研究電力的化學產生。
The course covers the fundamentals of galvanology. 該課程涵蓋了流電學的基礎知識。
Galvanolysis is used to break down compounds into their elements. 電解被用來將化合物分解成其元素。
The process of galvanolysis requires a continuous current. 電解過程需要持續的電流。
The galvanomagnet was used to lift heavy metal scraps. 電磁鐵被用來吊起沉重的金屬碎片。
He studied the properties of the galvanomagnet. 他研究了電磁鐵的性質。
The galvanomagnetic effect was observed in the semiconductor. 在半導體中觀察到了電磁效應。
They measured the galvanomagnetic properties of the material. 他們測量了該材料的電磁性質。
Galvanomagnetism explores the relationship between electricity and magnetism. 電磁學探索電力與磁力之間的關係。
The textbook provides an introduction to galvanomagnetism. 這本教科書介紹了電磁學。
A galvanometer is used to detect small electric currents. 檢流計用於檢測微弱電流。
The student connected the galvanometer to the circuit. 學生將檢流計連接到電路中。
The galvanometric readings were highly accurate. 檢流計的讀數非常準確。
He used a galvanometric method to measure the resistance. 他使用檢流計方法來測量電阻。
They performed a galvanometrical analysis of the signals. 他們對信號進行了檢流計分析。
The lab is equipped with galvanometrical devices. 實驗室配備了檢流計設備。
The current was measured galvanometrically. 電流是用檢流計測量的。
Data was collected galvanometrically throughout the experiment. 整個實驗過程中，數據都是用檢流計收集的。
Galvanometry is an essential technique in electrical engineering. 電流測量法是電機工程中的一項基本技術。
He specialized in the field of galvanometry. 他專攻電流測量法領域。
The museum has several galvanoplastic copies of ancient statues. 博物館有幾件古雕像的電鑄複製品。
They used a galvanoplastic process to create the mold. 他們使用電鑄工藝製作模具。
The artist preferred galvanoplastical methods for his metalwork. 藝術家在他的金屬製品中偏好電鑄方法。
He studied galvanoplastical techniques in Europe. 他在歐洲學習了電鑄技術。
The medal was produced galvanoplastically. 這枚獎牌是電鑄生產的。
They replicated the artifact galvanoplastically. 他們以電鑄方式複製了這件文物。
Galvanoplastics allows for precise reproduction of intricate designs. 電鑄術可以精確複製複雜的設計。
The workshop specialized in galvanoplastics. 該工作室專門從事電鑄術。
Galvanoplasty is used to create metal objects by electrodeposition. 電鑄術是用電沉積法製作金屬物品。
He wrote a book on the principles of galvanoplasty. 他寫了一本關於電鑄術原理的書。

meaning: 電心理的 (指與皮膚電反應相關的)
sentences: The galvanopsychic reflex is often measured in lie detector tests. 電心理反射常在測謊測試中測量。
They studied the galvanopsychic responses to emotional stimuli. 他們研究了對情感刺激的電心理反應。
Galvanopuncture combines acupuncture with electrical stimulation. 電針術將針灸與電刺激結合起來。
The therapist used galvanopuncture to relieve the patient's pain. 治療師使用電針術來減輕病人的疼痛。
The galvanoscope detected a weak current in the wire. 驗電流器檢測到電線中有微弱電流。
He built a simple galvanoscope for the science fair. 他為科學展覽製作了一個簡單的驗電流器。
They performed a galvanoscopic examination of the circuit. 他們對電路進行了驗電流器檢查。
The galvanoscopic method proved to be effective. 驗電流器方法被證明是有效的。
Galvanoscopy is used to detect the presence of electricity. 驗電流法用於檢測電力的存在。
He demonstrated the technique of galvanoscopy. 他演示了驗電流法的技術。
Galvanosurgery involves the use of electricity in surgical procedures. 電外科涉及在手術過程中使用電力。
The advancement of galvanosurgery has improved patient outcomes. 電外科的進步改善了病人的預後。
Some microorganisms exhibit galvanotactic behavior. 一些微生物表現出趨電行為。
The galvanotactic response was dependent on the voltage. 趨電反應取決於電壓。
Galvanotaxis is the movement of organisms in response to an electric field. 趨電性是生物對電場做出反應的移動。
The researchers studied galvanotaxis in fish. 研究人員研究了魚類的趨電性。
Galvanotherapy was used to treat various nervous disorders. 流電療法被用來治療各種神經障礙。
The clinic offers galvanotherapy as part of its rehabilitation program. 該診所提供流電療法作為其康復計畫的一部分。
The galvanothermometer measured the subtle changes in temperature. 電熱溫度計量測了溫度的細微變化。
He used a galvanothermometer in his physics experiment. 他在物理實驗中使用了電熱溫度計。
Galvanothermy uses electrical heat for medical treatment. 電熱療法使用電熱進行醫療。
The patient received galvanothermy for muscle stiffness. 病人因肌肉僵硬接受了電熱療法。
The galvanotonic state of the muscle was analyzed. 肌肉的電緊張狀態被分析了。
They studied the galvanotonic effects of different currents. 他們研究了不同電流的電緊張效應。
The plant roots showed a galvanotropic orientation. 植物根部表現出向電性取向。
Galvanotropic stimuli can influence growth patterns. 向電性刺激可以影響生長模式。
Galvanotropism is the growth response of organisms toward an electric current. 向電性是生物朝向電流的生長反應。
Scientists are investigating the mechanisms of galvanotropism in plants. 科學家們正在研究植物向電性的機制。

meaning: 加爾文氏法 (鑑定馬齒的方法)
sentences: The expert showed us how to galvayne a horse to determine its age. 專家向我們展示如何透過加爾文氏法鑑定馬的年齡。
The Galvayne's groove is a clear indicator of a horse's maturity. 加爾文氏溝是馬匹成熟的清晰指標。
Galvayning requires experience and careful observation. 加爾文氏法鑑定需要經驗和仔細觀察。
He is an expert in galvayning horses. 他是馬匹加爾文氏法鑑定的專家。

meaning: 高威 (愛爾蘭城市名，複數形式或指相關事物)
sentences: He spent his summers in the Galways region of Ireland. 他在愛爾蘭的高威地區度過了夏天。
The Galways are known for their beautiful coastal scenery. 高威地區以其美麗的海岸景色而聞名。
She has a distinct Galwegian accent. 她有明顯的高威口音。
The Galwegian locals were very welcoming to tourists. 高威當地人對遊客非常熱情。

meaning: 羔羊皮 (產於西藏或附近的)
sentences: The coat was lined with soft galyac. 這件外套內襯著柔軟的羔羊皮。
He bought a galyac hat in the market. 他在市場上買了一頂羔羊皮帽子。
Galyak is valued for its fine, curly wool. 羔羊皮因其細緻且捲曲的毛而受到重視。
The artisan worked with high-quality galyak. 工匠使用高品質的羔羊皮工作。

meaning: 膽病 (南非的一種家畜疾病)
sentences: The farmer lost several cows to galziekte. 農夫因膽病損失了幾頭牛。
Galziekte is a serious threat to livestock in the region. 膽病是對該地區家畜的嚴重威脅。

meaning: 腿；社交聚會 (尤指水手間的)
sentences: She has long, slender gams. 她有一雙纖細的長腿。
The whaling ships had a gam in the middle of the ocean. 捕鯨船在洋中心舉行了一次社交聚會。
The sorcerer carried a mysterious gamahe. 巫師帶著一顆神秘的符文寶石。
An ancient gamahe was found in the ruins. 在遺址中發現了一顆古代符文寶石。

meaning: 迦瑪列 (聖經人物名；智者)
sentences: Gamaliel was a respected teacher of the law. 迦瑪列是一位受人尊敬的律法教師。
He was known as a Gamaliel of his time. 他被譽為那個時代的智者。
He wore leather gamashes to protect his legs. 他穿著皮製護腳脛來保護雙腿。
The historical costume included colorful gamashes. 這套歷史服裝包括了鮮豔的長統襪。
The gamasid mite is a parasite of some insects. 革蟎是某些昆蟲的寄生蟲。
He studied gamasid anatomy under the microscope. 他在顯微鏡下研究革蟎的解剖結構。
Gamasidae is a family of predatory mites. 革蟎科是一類捕食性蟎蟲。
The classification of Gamasidae has undergone changes. 革蟎科的分類已經歷了變動。
Gamasoidea includes several families of mites. 革蟎總科包括幾個蟎蟲科。
Research on Gamasoidea is important for pest control. 對革蟎總科的研究對害蟲防治很重要。
The shield featured a golden gamb. 盾牌上繪有一個金色的獸腿紋章。
A lion's gamb was a common heraldic symbol. 獅腿是常見的紋章符號。
He played the viola da gamba beautifully. 他優美地彈奏著古大提琴。
Gamba is the Italian word for leg. Gamba 是義大利語中腿的意思。
The foal performed a playful gambade. 小馬駒做了一個調皮的蹦跳。
His sudden gambade surprised the audience. 他突然的跳躍讓觀眾感到驚訝。
The horse gave a great gambado. 馬跳了一個大步。
He pulled on his heavy gambados. 他穿上沉重的長靴。
The gambang is an essential part of a gamelan orchestra. 甘邦是甘美蘭管弦樂隊的重要組成部分。
The musician struck the wooden keys of the gambang. 音樂家敲擊著甘邦的木鍵。

meaning: 甘比爾 (一種植物提取物，用於鞣革或染料)
sentences: Gambeer is extracted from the leaves of a tropical shrub. 甘比爾是從熱帶灌木的葉子中提取的。
They used gambeer to dye the fabric brown. 他們使用甘比爾將布料染成褐色。

meaning: 棉甲 (中世紀的一種護身衣)
sentences: The soldier wore a padded gambeson under his mail. 士兵在鎖子甲下面穿著一件填充棉甲。
A gambeson provided basic protection against blunt force. 棉甲提供了對鈍力的基本保護。
We spotted a gambet by the marsh. 我們在沼澤邊發現了一隻赤足鷸。
The gambet is a migratory shorebird. 赤足鷸是一種遷徙性岸鳥。
The gambette has long red legs. 赤足鷸有著紅色的長腿。
He photographed a gambette in flight. 他拍攝了一隻飛行中的赤足鷸。
Gambia is the smallest country in mainland Africa. 甘比亞是非洲大陸最小的國家。

The gaffsman stood ready at the edge of the boat. 魚叉手站在船邊準備就緒。
A skilled gaffsman is vital for bringing in large catches. 一位熟練的魚叉手對於捕獲大魚至關重要。
Gagate is a type of lignite used in making jewelry. 煤玉是一種用於製作珠寶的褐煤。
She wore a necklace made of polished gagate. 她戴著一條磨光的煤玉項鍊。
The property is gageable as security for the loan. 該房產可作為貸款擔保進行抵押。
We need to determine if the volume is gageable. 我們需要確定體積是否可以計量。
The gagee holds the rights to the property until the debt is paid. 受質押者擁有該財產的權利，直到債務清償為止。
The bank acted as the gagee in the transaction. 銀行在交易中充當受質押者。
Gageite is a rare mineral found in certain geological formations. 矽錳鋅礦是在某些地質構造中發現的一種稀有礦物。
The geologist identified the sample as gageite. 地質學家鑑定該樣本為矽錳鋅礦。
The situation felt gagelike, full of risk and uncertainty. 這種情況感覺像是挑戰，充滿了風險和不確定性。
He made a gagelike offer that we couldn't ignore. 他提出了一個我們無法忽視的類似抵押的提議。
The gager measured the contents of the storage tank. 計量員測量了儲罐的內容物。
He was hired as a gager for the oil company. 他被聘為石油公司的計量員。
He held the gagership for over twenty years. 他擔任計量員之職超過二十年。
The duties of the gagership include regular inspections. 計量員之職的職責包括定期檢查。
The thick smoke was a real gagger. 濃煙真讓人作嘔。
He used a piece of cloth as a gagger. 他用一塊布當作塞口物。
The office was known for its harmless gaggery. 辦公室以其無害的玩笑而聞名。
They enjoyed a bit of gaggery during the party. 他們在派對上玩了一些惡作劇。
A gaggle of geese crossed the road. 一群鵝穿過了馬路。
There was a gaggle of tourists waiting outside the museum. 有一群遊客在博物館外等候。
The gaggler in the front row wouldn't stop talking. 前排那個喋喋不休的人不停地說話。
We could hear the gaggler's voice from across the room. 我們可以從房間的另一頭聽到那個喋喋不休的人的聲音。
The gagman wrote all the jokes for the show. 這位喜劇編劇為節目寫了所有的笑話。
He started his career as a gagman in Hollywood. 他的職業生涯始於在好萊塢擔任喜劇編劇。
The gagor provided the property as security. 質押者提供了房產作為擔保。
As a gagor, he is responsible for the loan. 作為質押者，他對貸款負有責任。
Gagroot is another name for the Indian tobacco plant. 山梗菜是印第安煙草植物的另一個名稱。
Gagroot has been used in traditional herbal medicine. 山梗菜已被用於傳統草藥中。
He had a noticeable gagtooth that gave him a unique smile. 他有一顆明顯的齙牙，這讓他有著獨特的微笑。
The term gagtooth is sometimes used to describe a projecting tooth. 齙牙一詞有時用來形容突出的牙齒。
Gahnite is a mineral belonging to the spinel group. 鋅尖晶石是一種屬於尖晶石族的礦物。
The dark green crystals were identified as gahnite. 那些深綠色的晶體被鑑定為鋅尖晶石。
Gahrwali is an Indo-Aryan language spoken in northern India. 嘉瓦里語是北印度使用的一種印歐語系語言。
He belongs to the Gahrwali community. 他屬於嘉瓦里社群。
The trainer is focusing on the horse's gaiting. 教練正專注於這匹馬的步法。
Proper gaiting is essential for a show dog. 對於參賽犬來說，正確的步法至關重要。

meaning: 蓋斯石（一種含雲母的砂岩）
sentences: Gaize is often found in specific geological formations in France. 蓋斯石常見於法國特定的地質地層中。
The scientist analyzed the composition of the gaize sample. 科學家分析了蓋斯石樣本的成分。
The gaj is a traditional unit of length used in parts of India. 迦闍是印度部分地區使用的傳統長度單位。
One gaj is approximately equal to a yard. 一迦闍大約等於一碼。

meaning: 伽（重力加速度單位）；女孩（口語）
sentences: The gal is a unit of acceleration used in gravimetry. 伽是重力測量中使用的加速度單位。
She's a smart gal who knows what she wants. 她是個聰明的女孩，知道自己想要什麼。

meaning: 蓋裂木科（植物學名，現多歸於其他科）
sentences: Some older botanical texts refer to the Galacaceae family. 一些較舊的植物學文獻提到了蓋裂木科。
Classification of Galacaceae has changed over the years. 蓋裂木科的分類多年來發生了變化。
Certain herbs are used as a natural galactagogue. 某些草藥被用作天然催乳劑。
The doctor recommended a galactagogue to help the nursing mother. 醫生建議使用催乳劑來幫助哺乳期的母親。
The plant has galactagoguic properties. 這種植物具有催乳特性。
Studies are being conducted on galactagoguic substances. 科學家正在對催乳物質進行研究。
Galactan is a polysaccharide found in many plants. 半乳聚糖是許多植物中發現的一種多醣。
The lab analyzed the galactan content in the fruit fibers. 實驗室分析了水果纖維中的半乳聚糖含量。
Galactase is an enzyme that helps break down milk sugars. 半乳糖酶是一種有助於分解乳糖的酶。
The presence of galactase is essential for milk digestion. 半乳糖酶的存在對於乳汁消化至關重要。
Galactemia is a rare genetic disorder. 半乳糖血症是一種罕見的遺傳性疾病。
Newborns are screened for galactemia shortly after birth. 新生兒在出生後不久就會接受半乳糖血症篩查。
Galacthidrosis is a condition where sweat contains milk-like substances. 乳汁汗症是一種汗液中含有類乳汁物質的狀況。
Cases of galacthidrosis are extremely rare in medical history. 乳汁汗症在醫學史上極其罕見。
Galactia is a genus of flowering plants in the legume family. 乳豆屬是豆科中的一個開花植物屬。
We found several species of Galactia in the tropical forest. 我們在熱帶森林中發現了幾種乳豆屬植物。
Galactidrosis is a synonym for galacthidrosis. Galactidrosis 是 galacthidrosis 的同義詞。
The patient was diagnosed with galactidrosis after clinical observation. 經過臨床觀察，該患者被診斷出患有乳汁汗症。
Galactite is a type of mineral belonging to the zeolite group. 鈉沸石是屬於沸石族的一種礦物。
The crystal structure of galactite was examined under a microscope. 在顯微鏡下檢查了鈉沸石的晶體結構。
A galactocele is a milk-filled cyst that can form in the breast. 乳腺囊腫是乳房中可能形成的一種充滿乳汁的囊腫。
The doctor used ultrasound to confirm the galactocele. 醫生使用超音波確認了乳腺囊腫。
The galactodendron tree produces a sap that looks like milk. 乳汁樹產出一種看起來像乳汁的樹汁。
Explorers were amazed by the properties of the galactodendron. 探險家們對乳汁樹的特性感到驚訝。
The technician used a galactodensimeter to check the milk's purity. 技術員使用乳汁密度計檢查乳汁的純度。
A galactodensimeter measures the specific gravity of milk. 乳汁密度計測量乳汁的比重。
The medicine has a galactogenetic effect on the patient. 這種藥物對患者有催乳作用。
Research focuses on the galactogenetic pathways in mammals. 研究重點在於哺乳動物的生乳途徑。
Galactohemia is an alternative spelling for galactemia. Galactohemia 是 galactemia 的另一種拼法。
Special dietary management is required for children with galactohemia. 患有半乳糖血症的兒童需要特殊的飲食管理。
The liquid has a thick, galactoid appearance. 這種液體具有黏稠的乳狀外觀。
Galactoid secretions were observed during the experiment. 實驗過程中觀察到了乳狀分泌物。
Galactolipide is a lipid containing galactose. 半乳糖脂是含有半乳糖的一種脂質。
Galactolipides are major components of chloroplast membranes. 半乳糖脂是葉綠體膜的主要成分。
Galactolipin is another term for galactolipide. Galactolipin 是 galactolipide 的另一個術語。
The research team isolated galactolipin from plant tissues. 研究小組從植物組織中分離出了半乳糖脂。
Galactolysis is the metabolic process of breaking down galactose. 半乳糖分解是分解半乳糖的代謝過程。
Enzymes play a crucial role in galactolysis. 酶在半乳糖分解中起著至關重要的作用。
The bacteria showed galactolytic activity in the culture. 這些細菌在培養物中顯示出半乳糖分解活性。
Galactolytic enzymes are used in various industrial processes. 半乳糖分解酶被用於各種工業過程中。
Galactoma is a term sometimes used for a milk cyst in the breast. Galactoma 有時被用來指代乳房中的乳汁囊腫。
The biopsy results confirmed the benign nature of the galactoma. 活檢結果確認了該乳腺瘤的良性性質。
The dairy farmer used a galactometer to test the milk quality. 奶農使用乳汁比重計測試牛奶品質。
Testing with a galactometer is a quick way to detect added water. 使用乳汁比重計測試是檢測是否加水的快速方法。
Galactometry is the science of measuring the components of milk. 乳汁測定法是測量乳汁成分的科學。
Advancements in galactometry have improved food safety standards. 乳汁測定法的進步提高了食品安全標準。
Galactonic acid is produced through the oxidation of galactose. 半乳糖酸是通過半乳糖的氧化產生的。
The galactonic properties were analyzed in the laboratory. 在實驗室分析了其半乳糖酸特性。
Galactopathy refers to any disease or disorder of the mammary glands. 乳腺病是指乳腺的任何疾病或功能障礙。
Early diagnosis is key in managing various forms of galactopathy. 早期診斷是管理各種形式乳腺病的關鍵。
A galactophagist is someone whose diet consists mainly of milk. 食乳者是指飲食主要由乳汁組成的人。
Historically, certain nomadic tribes were known as galactophagists. 歷史上，某些遊牧部落被稱為食乳者。
Infants are naturally galactophagous during their first months of life. 嬰兒在出生後的頭幾個月自然是食乳的。
The study observed the habits of galactophagous animals. 該研究觀察了食乳動物的習性。
Galactophlebitis is an inflammation of the veins in the breast. 乳腺靜脈炎是乳房靜脈的炎症。
Treatment for galactophlebitis usually involves antibiotics. 乳腺靜脈炎的治療通常涉及抗生素。
Galactophlysis is characterized by the formation of vesicles on the nipple. 乳頭水皰症的特徵是乳頭上形成水皰。
The nurse provided ointment to treat the patient's galactophlysis. 護士提供了藥膏來治療患者的乳頭水皰症。
Each galactophore carries milk toward the nipple. 每條輸乳管都將乳汁輸送到乳頭。
The anatomy of the galactophore system is quite complex. 輸乳管系統的解剖結構相當複雜。
Galactophoritis can cause pain and discomfort for nursing mothers. 輸乳管炎會給哺乳期的母親帶來疼痛和不適。
Symptoms of galactophoritis include swelling and localized heat. 輸乳管炎的症狀包括腫脹和局部發熱。
The galactophorous ducts are essential for breastfeeding. 輸乳管對母乳餵養至關重要。
We studied the galactophorous tissue in the specimen. 我們研究了標本中的輸乳組織。
Galactophthysis is a term for the wasting away of the mammary glands. 耗乳症是乳腺萎縮的一個術語。
The condition of galactophthysis was documented in the medical journal. 醫學期刊記錄了耗乳症的情況。
Sage tea is sometimes used for its galactophygous properties. 鼠尾草茶有時因其止乳特性而被使用。
The doctor prescribed a galactophygous medication to stop lactation. 醫生開了止乳藥物以停止泌乳。
Galactopoiesis is the process of maintaining milk production. 泌乳是維持乳汁分泌的過程。
Hormones like prolactin are key to galactopoiesis. 泌乳素等激素是泌乳的關鍵。
The drug has a strong galactopoietic effect on cows. 這種藥物對母牛有很強的泌乳作用。
She researched galactopoietic hormones for her thesis. 她為論文研究了泌乳激素。

meaning: 英語字母的第七個字母
sentences: G is the seventh letter of the alphabet. G 是英語字母的第七個字母。
The note G is played on the piano. 鋼琴上彈奏出 G 音。

meaning: 英語字母的第七個字母（小寫）
sentences: Please write a small g on the line. 請在線上寫一個小寫的 g。
The letter g can represent gravity in physics. 字母 g 在物理學中可以代表重力。

meaning: 鎵（化學元素符號）；喬治亞州（美國州名縮寫）
sentences: Ga is the chemical symbol for gallium. Ga 是鎵的化學符號。
He lives in Atlanta, Ga. 他住在喬治亞州的亞特蘭大。
The baby said ga and laughed. 嬰兒發出咿呀聲並笑了起來。
He mimicked the baby's ga sounds. 他模仿嬰兒咿呀的聲音。
They like to gab about fashion for hours. 他們喜歡聊好幾個小時的時尚。
She has the gift of the gab. 她口才很好。

meaning: 華達呢（一種堅韌的斜紋織物）
sentences: He wore a gabardine suit to the wedding. 他穿著華達呢西裝參加婚禮。
Gabardine is a durable fabric often used for raincoats. 華達呢是一種常用於雨衣的耐用織物。

meaning: （蘇格蘭或北英格蘭的）載重駁船
sentences: The gabbard moved slowly down the river. 駁船在河上緩慢移動。
They used a gabbard to transport heavy goods. 他們使用駁船來運輸沉重的貨物。
My neighbor is a real gabber. 我的鄰居真的很愛說話。
The gabber wouldn't stop talking during the movie. 那個愛說話的人在看電影時不停地說話。

meaning: 喋喋不休；急促而不清的談話
sentences: The hall was filled with the gabblement of students. 大廳裡充滿了學生們喋喋不休的說話聲。
I couldn't understand anything through the gabblement. 在那一陣急促不清的談話聲中，我什麼也聽不懂。
The teacher told the gabbler to be quiet. 老師叫那個喋喋不休的人安靜。
She is such a gabbler when she is nervous. 她緊張時就會變得喋喋不休。

meaning: 輝長岩（一種深色粗粒火成岩）
sentences: The geologist collected a sample of gabbro. 地質學家採集了一個輝長岩樣本。
Gabbro is often found in the deep oceanic crust. 輝長岩常見於深層海洋地殼中。
The mountain has a gabbroic structure. 這座山具有輝長岩結構。
We found several gabbroic rocks in the valley. 我們在山谷裡發現了幾塊輝長岩質的岩石。

meaning: 類輝長岩的；似輝長岩的
sentences: This rock has a gabbroid appearance but different composition. 這塊岩石具有類輝長岩的外觀，但成分不同。
The scientist described the texture as gabbroid. 科學家將這種紋理描述為類輝長岩狀。
The gabbroitic minerals were analyzed in the laboratory. 輝長岩質的礦物在實驗室進行了分析。
Gabbroitic intrusions are common in this region. 輝長岩質侵入體在該地區很常見。

meaning: 蓋布（男子名，Gabriel 的暱稱）
sentences: Gabe is my best friend from high school. 蓋布是我高中的好朋友。
Everyone calls him Gabe instead of Gabriel. 每個人都叫他蓋布，而不是加百列。
The gabelle was a major cause of discontent in old France. 鹽稅是舊時法國不滿情緒的主要原因。
Citizens were forced to pay the gabelle to the king. 公民被迫向國王繳納鹽稅。

meaning: 被徵收鹽稅的；被徵稅的
sentences: The gabelled goods were sold at a higher price. 被徵稅的貨物以較高價格出售。
He complained about the gabelled cost of essential items. 他抱怨必需品被徵稅後的成本。
The gabelleman arrived to collect the annual tax. 鹽稅徵收員到了，來收取年度稅金。
Villagers avoided the gabelleman whenever possible. 村民們儘可能避開鹽稅徵收員。
The gabeller was known for being very strict. 那個稅吏以非常嚴厲著稱。
He worked as a gabeller for many years. 他當了多年的鹽稅徵收員。

meaning: 長袍；華達呢（gabardine 的變體）
sentences: The old man wore a loose gaberdine. 那位老人穿著一件寬鬆的長袍。
This coat is made of fine gaberdine. 這件大衣是由優質的華達呢製成的。

meaning: （蘇格蘭語）領有執照的乞丐；流浪乞丐
sentences: In old Scotland, a gaberlunzie was a beggar who had been granted a license to solicit alms. 在古老的蘇格蘭，gaberlunzie 是指獲得特許可以乞討的乞丐。
The gaberlunzie wandered from village to village. 這位流浪乞丐在村莊之間穿梭。

meaning: 珊瑚刺桐；蒟蒻薯（熱帶植物名）
sentences: The gabgab tree is known for its vibrant scarlet flowers. 珊瑚刺桐以其鮮紅奪目的花朵而聞名。
Local communities use the tubers of the gabgab plant to produce starch. 當地社區使用 gabgab 植物的塊莖來製造澱粉。
Gabi is a staple root crop in many parts of the Philippines. 芋頭是菲律賓許多地區的主食作物。
She cooked a delicious stew using gabi leaves and roots. 她用芋頭的葉子和根部煮了一鍋美味的燉菜。

meaning: 蛇籠；裝滿石塊的筐籃（用於土木工程或軍事防禦）
sentences: Engineers used gabions to stabilize the riverbank and prevent erosion. 工程師使用蛇籠來加固河岸並防止侵蝕。
The military fort was reinforced with heavy gabions filled with earth. 這座軍事堡壘用裝滿土的沉重蛇籠進行了加固。

meaning: 蛇籠工事；以蛇籠建成的防禦工事
sentences: A temporary gabionade was erected to protect the soldiers from gunfire. 建立了一座臨時的蛇籠工事，以保護士兵免受炮火襲擊。
The construction of the gabionade was completed within a few hours. 蛇籠工事的建設在幾小時內就完成了。
The project involved extensive gabionage along the coastal highway. 該項目涉及沿海公路大規模的蛇籠工法運用。
Gabionage provides a flexible and permeable solution for slope stability. 蛇籠結構為邊坡穩定提供了一種靈活且具有滲透性的解決方案。

meaning: 裝有蛇籠的；由蛇籠構成的
sentences: The gabioned wall stood firm against the rising floodwaters. 由蛇籠構成的牆壁在不斷上漲的洪水面前依然屹立不搖。
They inspected the gabioned sections of the embankment. 他們檢查了堤防中裝有蛇籠的部分。

meaning: （中世紀法律）納稅人；支付租金者
sentences: The gablatores were required to pay their dues to the lord every year. 納稅人每年都必須向領主繳納應繳費用。
Ancient records list the names of the gablatores in the village. 古老記錄中列出了村子裡納稅人的姓名。

meaning: 山牆板；鑲在屋頂山頭邊緣的裝飾板
sentences: The ornate gableboard added a decorative touch to the Victorian house. 華麗的山牆板為這座維多利亞式建築增添了裝飾感。
He replaced the rotting gableboard with a new one made of cedar. 他用一塊新的雪松木板更換了腐爛的山牆板。
The rock formation had a distinct gablelike shape. 這塊岩層具有明顯的類似山牆的形狀。
The windows were capped with gablelike decorations. 窗戶頂部裝飾有山牆狀的圖案。

meaning: 小山牆；屋頂上的小裝飾性尖頂
sentences: Small gablets were positioned above the niches of the cathedral. 大教堂的神龕上方安置了裝飾性的小山牆。
The architect included several gablets in the design of the cottage. 建築師在別墅的設計中加入了幾個小山牆。

meaning: 以山牆方式地；山牆朝向地
sentences: The houses were built gablewise to the street. 這些房子建造時山牆正對著街道。
The roof was structured gablewise to allow for better drainage. 屋頂採用山牆式結構，以便更好地排水。
