The use of gablocks in cockfighting is banned in many regions. 許多地區禁止在鬥雞過程中使用人造距。

meaning: 加彭（非洲地區名）；加彭紅木
sentences: Gaboon mahogany is highly prized for furniture making. 加彭紅木在家具製造中備受推崇。
He traveled to the Gaboon region to study the local wildlife. 他前往加彭地區研究當地的野生動物。

meaning: 加百列（男子名；大天使名）
sentences: Gabriel is often depicted as a messenger of God in religious texts. 在宗教文獻中，加百列經常被描繪成上帝的使者。
Their son was named Gabriel after his grandfather. 他們的兒子跟隨祖父的名字命名為加百列。
Gabriella is a popular name in many Spanish-speaking countries. 蓋比瑞拉在許多西班牙語國家是一個受歡迎的名字。
She introduced herself as Gabriella. 她自我介紹說她叫蓋比瑞拉。

meaning: （英國民間傳說）加百列的獵犬（預示死亡的幽靈犬）
sentences: According to legend, the howling of the Gabrielrache portends a coming death. 根據傳說，加百列獵犬的嚎叫預示著死亡將至。
The story of the Gabrielrache has been passed down through generations. 加百列獵犬的故事代代相傳。
The Gabunese delegation arrived for the international summit. 加彭代表團抵達參加國際峰會。
He is a Gabunese artist living in Paris. 他是一位居住在巴黎的加彭藝術家。

meaning: 笨蛋；呆子；容易受騙的人
sentences: Don't be such a gaby; think before you act. 別像個呆子一樣，三思而後行。
The old man called the foolish boy a young gaby. 老人稱那個愚蠢的男孩為年輕的小呆子。

meaning: 迦得（聖經人物名；以色列部落名）；天哪（感嘆詞）
sentences: Gad was the seventh son of Jacob in the Bible. 聖經中，迦得是雅各的第七個兒子。
By Gad, that was a close call! 天哪，好險！
The gadid family includes important commercial fish like cod and haddock. 鱈科魚類包括鱈魚和黑線鱈等重要的經濟魚類。
Researchers studied the migration patterns of various gadid species. 研究人員研究了各種鱈科魚類的遷徙模式。
Gadidae is a family of marine fish that contains many well-known food fishes. 鱈科是一個包含許多著名食用魚類的海洋魚科。
Taxonomists classify cod under the family Gadidae. 分類學家將鱈魚歸入鱈科。
Gadinine is a ptomaine found in decomposing cod. 鱈魚鹼是在腐爛的鱈魚中發現的一種屍毒。

He studied Gaditan architecture during his trip to Spain. 他在西班牙旅行期間研究了加的斯的建築。
The knight's gauntlets were reinforced with sharp gadlings. 騎士的手套上加固了鋒利的尖刺。

Life as a gadman required great patience and strength. 作為一名驅牛者，生活需要極大的耐心和體力。
Gadoid fish are characterized by having three dorsal fins. 鱈類魚類的特徵是具有三個背鰭。
The industry relies heavily on the catch of gadoid species. 該產業高度依賴鱈類物種的漁獲。

The evolutionary history of Gadoidea is complex. 鱈總科的演化史非常複雜。
Gadolinia is used in the manufacturing of special glass and ceramics. 氧化釓被用於製造特種玻璃和陶瓷。
The chemist isolated gadolinia from the mineral sample. 化學家從礦物樣本中分離出氧化釓。
The experiment involved the use of gadolinic compounds. 該實驗涉及釓化合物的使用。
Gadolinic properties were measured at low temperatures. 釓的特性在低溫下被測量。
Gadolinite is a silicate mineral containing rare earth elements. 釓鐮礦是一種含有稀土元素的矽酸鹽礦物。
The mineral gadolinite was named after the Finnish chemist Johan Gadolin. 釓鐮礦是以芬蘭化學家約翰·加多林的名字命名的。
Gadolinium is a rare earth element used as a contrast agent in MRI. 釓是一種在核磁共振成像中用作顯影劑的稀土元素。
The symbol for gadolinium on the periodic table is Gd. 釓在週期表上的符號是 Gd。
The silver bowl was decorated with an elegant gadroon border. 這隻銀碗裝飾著優雅的繩紋邊緣。
Gadroon patterns were popular in 18th-century furniture design. 繩紋圖案在 18 世紀的家具設計中非常受歡迎。
The architect added gadroonage to the cornices of the building. 建築師在建築的簷口添加了繩紋裝飾。
The intricate gadroonage gave the piece a classical look. 複雜的繩紋裝飾使這件作品具有古典外觀。
"Gadsbodikins!" he cried when he saw the mess. 「老天爺呀！」他看到一片狼藉時大喊道。
Gadsbodikins was a common mild oath in old English literature. 「Gadsbodikins」是古英語文學中常見的輕微誓言。
Gadsbud, I never expected to see you here! 哎呀，我真沒想到會在這裡見到你！
The character in the play often used Gadsbud as an exclamation. 劇中的人物經常使用「Gadsbud」作為感嘆詞。
Gadslid! That was a close call. 老天爺！那真是千鈞一髮。
He muttered "Gadslid" under his breath in frustration. 他沮喪地低聲嘀咕著「老天爺」。
The gadsman's job was to keep the team of oxen moving. 驅牛者的工作是保持牛群移動。
Traditional farming relied on the skill of the gadsman. 傳統農業依賴於驅牛者的技巧。
Gadswoons! I've lost my keys again. 老天爺！我又弄丟鑰匙了。
The archaic term Gadswoons is rarely heard today. 古語「Gadswoons」今天已很少聽到了。
Gaduin is a constituent of cod liver oil. 鱈肝醇是鱈魚肝油的一種成分。
Researchers investigated the biological effects of gaduin. 研究人員調查了鱈肝醇的生物學效應。
In Greek mythology, Gaia is the personification of the Earth. 在希臘神話中，蓋亞是地球的化身。
The Gaia hypothesis proposes that living organisms and their inorganic surroundings evolve as a single, self-regulating system. 蓋亞假說認為，生物及其無機環境作為一個單一的、自我調節的系統共同演化。

meaning: 蓋亞薩（尼羅河上的大載重貨船）
sentences: The gaiassa is a traditional cargo boat used on the Nile River. 蓋亞薩是尼羅河上使用的一種傳統貨船。
We watched the gaiassa sail slowly down the river with its large lateen sails. 我們看著蓋亞薩帶著巨大的三角帆在河上緩緩航行。

meaning: 三鬚鱈科（魚類的一個科）
sentences: Gaidropsaridae is a family of marine fishes commonly known as rocklings. 三鬚鱈科是一類常見名稱為岩鱈的海洋魚類。
Scientists study the distribution of Gaidropsaridae in the North Atlantic. 科學家研究三鬚鱈科在北大西洋的分布。
The sound of laughter and music added to the gaiety of the party. 歡笑聲和音樂增添了派對的歡樂氣氛。
She was known for her infectious gaiety and spirit. 她以其富有感染力的快樂和精神而聞名。
Gail is a common English name for women. 蓋爾是一個常見的女子英文名。
My friend Gail is planning a trip to Taiwan next year. 我的朋友蓋爾計畫明年去台灣旅遊。
Gaillardia is a genus of flowering plants in the sunflower family. 天人菊屬是向日葵家族中的一個開花植物屬。
The bright red and yellow flowers of the Gaillardia are popular in gardens. 天人菊屬亮紅和鮮黃的花朵在花園中很受歡迎。
The room was gaily decorated for the holiday. 房間為了節日佈置得非常華麗。

Success is gainable through hard work and determination. 透過努力和決心是可以獲得成功的。
The goal is difficult but definitely gainable. 這個目標雖然困難，但絕對是可以達成的。
The farmer calculated the annual gainage from his crops. 農夫計算了他作物的年度收益。
The term gainage was historically used to refer to the profit from land. 收益（gainage）一詞在歷史上曾被用來指代土地的利潤。
The concept of gainbirth refers to spiritual regeneration. 再生（gainbirth）的概念指的是精神上的重生。
In older religious texts, gainbirth was used instead of the word regeneration. 在較舊的宗教文本中，使用 gainbirth 來代替 regeneration 一詞。

meaning: 收回；撤回；對抗性的呼喊（古語）
sentences: He attempted to gaincall his previous statement. 他試圖收回他之前的聲明。
There was no gaincall for the order once it was issued. 命令一旦發出就無法撤回。
Everyone celebrated his sudden gaincome to the village. 每個人都慶祝他突然回到村子裡。
They awaited the gaincome of spring after a long winter. 在漫長的寒冬過後，他們等待著春天的歸來。

meaning: （建築）護牆；鞘；下窄上寬的台座
sentences: The sculptor placed the bust on a decorative marble gaine. 雕塑家將半身像放在裝飾性的的大理石台座上。
In architecture, a gaine is a support that tapers towards the base. 在建築中，gaine 是一種向底部逐漸變細的支撐物。

meaning: 獲利者；獲勝者；（跳水）向後翻騰
sentences: He was one of the biggest gainers in the stock market today. 他是今天股市中獲利最多的人之一。
The diver performed a perfect gainer off the high board. 跳水運動員在高台上完美地完成了一次向後翻騰跳水。

meaning: 有利的；有報酬的；賺錢的
sentences: He is looking for gainful employment in the tech industry. 他正在科技產業尋找有報酬的工作。
The program helps people acquire skills for gainful activities. 該計畫幫助人們獲得賺錢活動所需的技能。
She has been gainfully employed since she graduated from college. 她大學畢業後一直有著穩定的有償工作。
They spent their time gainfully by learning new languages. 他們透過學習新語言來有意義地打發時間。
The gainfulness of the investment was apparent within a few months. 這項投資的營利性在幾個月內就顯現出來了。
We evaluated the project based on its potential gainfulness. 我們根據該專案的潛在獲利能力對其進行了評估。
Gaining access to the facility requires a special security clearance. 獲得進入該設施的權限需要特殊的安全許可。

He realized that arguing with them was a gainless effort. 他意識到與他們爭論是徒勞的。
The gainlessness of the project led to its eventual cancellation. 該專案的無利可圖導致它最終被取消。
She was frustrated by the gainlessness of her repetitive work. 她對自己重複性工作的徒勞感感到沮喪。
Her natural gainliness made her a perfect fit for ballet. 她天生的優美姿態使她非常適合芭蕾舞。
There was a certain gainliness in the way the deer moved. 這隻鹿移動的方式有一種雅致感。
The gainly swan glided across the lake. 優美的天鵝在湖面上滑行。
He was a gainly dancer, moving with ease and precision. 他是一位姿態優美的舞者，動作輕鬆且精準。
The company reported significant financial gains this year. 公司報告今年有顯著的財務收益。
What one gains in speed, one often loses in accuracy. 一個人在速度上獲得的，往往在準確性上失去。
No one can gainsay the fact that she worked hard. 沒有人能否認她工作努力的事實。
It is difficult to gainsay his logic when he presents such clear evidence. 當他提出如此明確的證據時，很難反駁他的邏輯。
Despite the success, there were still a few gainsayers in the audience. 儘管取得了成功，觀眾中仍有一些反對者。
He ignored his gainsayers and continued with his plan. 他無視那些反對他的人，繼續執行他的計劃。
The soldiers tried to gainset the enemy's advance. 士兵們試圖反抗敵人的進攻。
There was no gainset to his decision. 對他的決定沒有任何反對意見。
The investment proved to be a gainsome venture. 這項投資被證明是一次有利可圖的冒險。
Her gainsome personality won her many friends. 她迷人的個性為她贏得了許多朋友。
Every reformer must face a gainspeaker at some point. 每一位改革者在某個時刻都必須面對反對者。
The gainspeaker challenged every point of the proposal. 反對者對提案的每一點都提出了挑戰。
The room was filled with the noise of gainspeaking. 房間裡充滿了反對的喧鬧聲。
Her gainspeaking attitude made collaboration difficult. 她那種反駁的態度使合作變得困難。
He leaned gainst the wall to catch his breath. 他靠在牆上喘口氣。
They fought gainst all odds to achieve their goal. 他們排除萬難為實現目標而奮鬥。
To gainstrive against fate is often futile. 反抗命運往往是徒勞的。
The rebels gainstrived against the oppressive regime. 反抗者們對抗壓迫政權。
He awaited a gainturn for his kindness. 他期待著對他善意的回報。
The path had a sudden gainturn toward the valley. 這條小路突然轉向山谷。
The rifle barrel was designed with a gaintwist for better accuracy. 步槍槍管設計有漸增膛線以獲得更好的準確性。
Gaintwist rifling increases the rotation of the bullet as it travels down the barrel. 漸增膛線會增加子彈在槍管中移動時的旋轉。
The land will gainyield a rich harvest this year. 這片土地今年將產出豐收。
The investment's gainyield was higher than expected. 這項投資的回報高於預期。
The shepherd found a small gair of green grass on the hillside. 牧羊人在山坡上發現了一小塊綠草地。
A gair of color decorated the otherwise plain fabric. 一條色彩條紋裝飾了原本平淡的布料。
We saw a gairfish jumping in the Tay estuary. 我們看到一隻鼠海豚在泰灣跳躍。
The local fishermen often spotted gairfish near the coast. 當地漁民經常在海岸附近發現鼠海豚。
The mother goose led her gaislings to the water. 母鵝帶著牠的小鵝走向水邊。
He called the boy a silly gaisling for his mistake. 他因為那個男孩犯的錯而稱他為一隻愚蠢的小鵝。
A well-gaited horse is a pleasure to ride. 步態良好的馬騎起來是一種享受。
The trainer worked on making the horse more consistently gaited. 訓練員致力於讓這匹馬的步態更加一致。
He put on his gaiters before hiking through the snow. 他在雪地健行前穿上了護腿。
The old soldier's gaiters were worn and dusty. 那位老兵的綁腿又破又髒。
The gaiterless hikers suffered from wet socks and muddy boots. 沒穿護腿的徒步旅行者深受濕襪子和泥濘靴子之苦。
He felt exposed walking gaiterless through the thick brush. 沒穿護腿走在茂密的灌木叢中，他感到缺乏保護。
Galactopyra is a condition that can affect nursing mothers. 產乳熱是可能影響哺乳期母親的一種狀況。
Symptoms of galactopyra include fever and malaise after childbirth. 產乳熱的症狀包括分娩後的發燒和不適。
Galactorrhea involves the spontaneous flow of milk from the breast. 乳漏症涉及乳房自發性的乳汁流出。
The doctor diagnosed her with galactorrhea after several tests. 經過幾次檢查後，醫生診斷她患有乳漏症。
Galactorrhoea is the British spelling for the condition of excessive milk production. Galactorrhoea 是指乳汁過度分泌狀況的英式拼法。
She sought treatment for galactorrhoea and hormonal imbalance. 她尋求乳漏症和荷爾蒙失調的治療。
A galactoscope is used to determine the quality of milk by its transparency. 乳液濃度計用於通過其透明度來確定乳汁的品質。
The technician used a galactoscope to analyze the sample. 技術員使用乳液濃度計來分析樣本。
Galactose is a monosaccharide sugar that is less sweet than glucose. 半乳糖是一種單醣，甜度低於葡萄糖。
The body converts galactose into glucose for energy. 身體將半乳糖轉化為葡萄糖以提供能量。
A galactoside is a glycoside in which the sugar component is galactose. 半乳糖苷是一種糖成分為半乳糖的糖苷。
Enzymes break down galactoside during the metabolic process. 酶在代謝過程中分解半乳糖苷。
Galactosis is the physiological process of milk formation. 乳汁分泌是乳汁形成的生理過程。
The study examined the factors influencing galactosis in mammals. 該研究探討了影響哺乳動物乳汁分泌的因素。
Galactostasis refers to the abnormal collection or cessation of milk flow. 乳滯是指乳汁流動的異常積聚或停止。
Severe galactostasis can lead to breast engorgement and pain. 嚴重的乳滯可能導致乳房脹痛。
Galactosuria is characterized by the presence of galactose in the urine. 半乳糖尿症的特徵是尿液中存在半乳糖。
Early detection of galactosuria is important for infant health. 早期發現半乳糖尿症對嬰兒健康非常重要。
Galactotherapy is a treatment method that uses a milk-based diet. 乳食療法是一種使用以乳製品為主的飲食的治療方法。
The physician suggested galactotherapy for the patient's recovery. 醫生建議對病人的康復採用乳食療法。
Galactotrophy refers to the nourishment of offspring with milk. 乳汁營養是指用乳汁哺育後代。
The importance of galactotrophy in early development is well-documented. 乳汁營養在早期發育中的重要性已有充分記錄。
Galacturia is a condition where the urine has a milky appearance. 乳糜尿是尿液呈現乳白色外觀的一種狀況。
The presence of fat in the urine can lead to galacturia. 尿液中存在脂肪可能導致乳糜尿。
Galagala is a type of cement made from lime and oil used in the East Indies. 嘎拉嘎拉混合料是東印度群島使用的一種由石灰和油製成的水泥。
They used galagala to seal the seams of the wooden boat. 他們使用嘎拉嘎拉混合料來密封木船的接縫。
Galaginae is a subfamily of small nocturnal primates. 嬰猴亞科是小型夜行性靈長類動物的一個亞科。
Members of Galaginae are known for their large eyes and leaping ability. 嬰猴亞科的成員以其大眼睛和跳躍能力而聞名。
The Galago is commonly known as a bush baby. 嬰猴通常被稱為叢林嬰兒。
A Galago can jump several meters to catch insects. 嬰猴可以跳躍數公尺來捕捉昆蟲。
The galah is a widespread and common cockatoo in Australia. 粉紅鳳頭鸚鵡是澳洲分布廣泛且常見的鳳頭鸚鵡。
In Australian slang, 'galah' can also mean a fool or a loud person. 在澳洲俚語中，「galah」也可以指傻瓜或大聲嚷嚷的人。
Galanas was a fine paid for homicide in ancient Welsh law. 命價金是古威爾斯法律中為殺人罪支付的罰金。
The amount of galanas depended on the social status of the victim. 命價金的數額取決於受害者的社會地位。
Galanga is a rhizome used as a spice in Southeast Asian cuisine. 南薑是東南亞料理中用作香料的根莖。
He added sliced galanga to the soup for a peppery flavor. 他在湯裡加入了切片的南薑以增加辛辣風味。
Galangin is a flavonol found in the rhizome of Alpinia officinarum. 高良薑素是發現於高良薑根莖中的一種黃酮醇。
Researchers are studying the potential antioxidant properties of galangin. 研究人員正在研究高良薑素潛在的抗氧化特性。
The galant knight was honored for his bravery in battle. 這位勇敢的騎士因其在戰鬥中的英勇而受到表彰。
He made a galant effort to save the stranded cat. 他做出勇敢的努力來營救那隻受困的貓。
Galanthus is a genus of about 20 species of bulbous perennial herbaceous plants. 雪滴花屬是約有 20 種球根多年生草本植物的一個屬。
The most famous species in the genus Galanthus is the common snowdrop. 雪滴花屬中最著名的物種是普通雪滴花。
A galantine is a dish of boned stuffed meat that is poached and served cold. 蓋朗帝凍肉捲是一種去骨填充後煮熟並冷食的肉類菜餚。
The chef prepared a beautiful chicken galantine for the banquet. 主廚為宴會準備了精美的雞肉蓋朗帝凍肉捲。
In some old dialects, a galany refers to a guinea-fowl. 在一些古老的方言中，galany 指的是珠雞。
The galany was once common in the farmyards of the region. 珠雞曾是該地區農家院子裡常見的禽類。
The galapago is the largest living species of tortoise. 加拉巴哥象龜是現存體型最大的陸龜物種。
Visitors travel to the islands to see the giant galapago in its natural habitat. 遊客們前往群島，在自然棲息地觀察巨大的加拉巴哥象龜。
The Galatae were a group of Celtic people who settled in Anatolia. 加拉太人是定居在安納托利亞的一群塞爾特人。
Historical texts describe the migrations of the Galatae. 歷史文獻描述了加拉太人的遷徙。

meaning: 條紋棉布；（希臘神話）伽拉忒亞
sentences: Galatea is a durable, striped cotton fabric used for children's clothes. Galatea 是一種耐用的條紋棉布，常用於製作兒童服裝。
In Greek mythology, Galatea was a statue brought to life by Aphrodite. 在希臘神話中，伽拉忒亞是被阿芙蘿黛蒂賦予生命的雕像。
The Galatian language was spoken by the people of Galatia. 加拉太語是由加拉太人使用的語言。
He is studying the Galatian period of history. 他正在研究加拉太時期的歷史。
Galatic territory expanded during the Hellenistic period. 加拉太領土在希臘化時期有所擴張。
The researcher analyzed Galatic cultural influences. 研究人員分析了加拉太文化的影響。
The galatotrophic stage is crucial for the development of mammals. 以乳汁營養的階段對哺乳動物的發育至關重要。
Scientists study the galatotrophic processes in newborn animals. 科學家研究新生動物的乳汁營養過程。
Galax is a genus of plants native to the southeastern United States. 蓋勒草屬是原產於美國東南部的一類植物。
The leaves of Galax turn a beautiful bronze color in the winter. 蓋勒草的葉子在冬天會變成美麗的青銅色。
The galaxian system contains billions of stars. 銀河系包含數十億顆恆星。
Is there any evidence of galaxian life forms? 是否有銀河系生命形式的證據？
Galaxias is a genus of freshwater fish found in the Southern Hemisphere. 南乳魚屬是發現於南半球的一類淡水魚。
Many species of Galaxias are endangered due to habitat loss. 由於棲息地喪失，許多南乳魚屬物種瀕臨滅絕。
The Galaxiidae family includes various small freshwater fishes. 南乳魚科包括多種小型淡水魚類。
Ecologists are monitoring the populations of Galaxiidae in the stream. 生態學家正在監測溪流中南乳魚科的數量。
Galban is an aromatic gum resin obtained from certain plants. 楓香脂是從某些植物中獲得的一種芳香性膠脂。
The ancient recipe called for a small amount of galban. 古代配方要求加入少量的楓香脂。
Galbanum is used in perfumes for its green, woody scent. 楓香脂因其青綠、木質的香味而被用於香水中。
The resinous galbanum has been used in incense for centuries. 樹脂狀的楓香脂數世紀以來一直被用於製作薰香。
Galbula is a genus of tropical birds known as jacamars. 鶲鴷屬是熱帶鳥類中被稱為 jacamars 的一個屬。
The bright plumage of the Galbula species makes them easy to spot. 鶲鴷屬物種鮮豔的羽毛使它們容易被發現。
Galbulae is a suborder that includes jacamars and puffbirds. 鶲鴷亞目是包括鶲鴷和噴鴷的一個亞目。
The classification of Galbulae has been debated among ornithologists. 鶲鴷亞目的分類在鳥類學家中一直存在爭論。
Galbulidae are insectivorous birds found in the Neotropics. 鶲鴷科是分佈於新熱帶界的食蟲鳥類。
Members of the family Galbulidae have long, slender bills. 鶲鴷科成員擁有長而細的喙。
The Galbulinae subfamily consists of several genera of birds. 鶲鴷亞科由數個鳥屬組成。
Researchers studied the breeding behavior of Galbulinae. 研究人員研究了鶲鴷亞科的繁殖行為。
A galbulus is a fleshy, berry-like cone found on junipers. Galbulus 是在杜松上發現的一種肉質、漿果狀的球果。
The galbulus contains the seeds of the plant. 球果包含該植物的種子。

meaning: 伽爾查人（帕米爾高原的塔吉克族群）
sentences: The Galcha people live in the high Pamir Mountains. 伽爾查人居住在帕米爾高原的高山上。
Anthropologists studied the unique dialects of the Galcha. 人類學家研究了伽爾查人獨特的方言。

meaning: 伽爾查人的；伽爾查語的
sentences: He is an expert in Galchic linguistics. 他是伽爾查語言學的專家。
The Galchic culture has been preserved for centuries. 伽爾查文化已經保存了數個世紀。

meaning: 盔狀結構（解剖學、植物學或動物學）
sentences: The flower's upper petal forms a protective galea. 花朵的上部花瓣形成了一個保護性的盔狀結構。
In anatomy, the galea aponeurotica covers the upper part of the cranium. 在解剖學中，帽狀腱膜覆蓋了顱骨的上部。

meaning: 採掘稅（礦區特許權使用費）
sentences: The coal miners were required to pay a galeage to the landowner. 採煤工被要求向地主支付採掘稅。
Galeage was a common form of mineral royalty in historical mining districts. 在歷史上的礦區，採掘稅是礦產使用費的一種常見形式。
The plant is recognized by its galeate flowers. 這種植物因其盔狀的花朵而被辨識。
Some insect species possess a galeate head structure. 某些昆蟲物種具有盔狀的頭部結構。
The galeated helmet was designed for maximum protection. 披盔的頭盔旨在提供最大的保護。
Many species of birds have galeated crests. 許多鳥類都有盔狀的冠羽。
As a galee, he had the right to extract minerals from the designated area. 作為一名租礦人，他有權從指定區域開採礦物。
The galee must comply with the mining regulations of the district. 租礦人必須遵守該地區的採礦規定。
The farm was filled with the noisy calls of the galeeny. 農場裡充滿了珍珠雞吵鬧的叫聲。
He raised galeeny for their unique eggs and meat. 他養殖珍珠雞是為了它們獨特的蛋和肉。
Galega officinalis is known as goat's rue. 藥用山羊豆被稱為山羊豆。
The genus Galega contains several species of perennial herbs. 山羊豆屬包含幾種多年生草本植物。
Galegine is an alkaloid that can be toxic if consumed in large quantities. 山羊豆鹼是一種如果大量攝入可能會中毒的生物鹼。
Researchers studied the chemical properties of galegine for potential medical use. 研究人員研究了山羊豆鹼的化學特性，以尋求潛在的醫療用途。

meaning: 鯊魚類（尤指真鯊類舊稱）
sentences: Galei was a term used in older zoological classifications to describe certain sharks. Galei 是舊分類學中用來描述某些鯊魚的術語。
The evolution of the Galei group is of interest to marine biologists. Galei 類群的演化是海洋生物學家感興趣的課題。
Scientists examined the galeid fossils found in the seabed. 科學家檢查了在海底發現的真鯊科化石。
The galeid features are prominent in this species of shark. 在這種鯊魚中，真鯊科的特徵非常明顯。
Galeidae is a family of sharks that includes many well-known species. 真鯊科是一個包含許多著名物種的鯊魚科。
Members of the Galeidae family are found in oceans worldwide. 真鯊科的成員分布於全球海洋。
The artist created a sculpture with a galeiform shape. 藝術家創作了一個具有盔狀形狀的雕塑。
Some early fish species had a galeiform appearance. 一些早期的魚類具有鯊魚狀的外觀。

meaning: 加蘭普（印尼的一種音樂樂器）
sentences: The musician played a traditional melody on the galempung. 音樂家用加蘭普彈奏了一段傳統旋律。
Galempung is an important part of the local gamelan ensemble. 加蘭普是當地甘美朗樂團的重要組成部分。
Galen was one of the most influential physicians in history. 蓋倫是歷史上最有影響力的醫生之一。
Many medical terms are derived from the works of Galen. 許多醫學術語都源自蓋倫的著作。
Galena is the primary ore for lead production. 方鉛礦是生產鉛的主要礦石。
The miners discovered a rich vein of galena in the mountain. 礦工在山中發現了一條豐富的方鉛礦脈。
The museum displayed several Galenian mineral specimens. 博物館展示了幾個方鉛礦的礦物標本。
Galenian medicine was practiced for over a millennium. 蓋倫醫學被實踐了一千多年。
Galenic preparations involve the use of natural ingredients. 蓋倫製劑涉及使用天然成分。
He studied Galenic theories of human anatomy. 他研究了蓋倫的人體解剖學理論。
The galenic properties of the ore were carefully analyzed. 礦石的方鉛礦性質被仔細分析。
This cough syrup is a traditional galenic formulation. 這種止咳糖漿是一種傳統的蓋倫製劑配方。

meaning: 蓋倫製劑；按蓋倫方法製備的藥物。
sentences: A Galenical is a medicine prepared from plants by a standard process. 蓋倫製劑是通過標準工藝從植物中製備的藥物。
The pharmacist prepared a Galenical for the patient. 藥劑師為患者準備了一種蓋倫製劑。
He has a deep interest in galenical preparations. 他對蓋倫製劑的製備有著濃厚的興趣。
The galenical traditions are still studied by some researchers today. 蓋倫製劑的傳統至今仍被一些研究人員研究。

meaning: 蓋倫學說；蓋倫醫學體系。
sentences: Galenism was the dominant medical doctrine for over a thousand years. 在一千多年的時間裡，蓋倫學說一直是占統治地位的醫學學說。
The Renaissance brought about a decline in the influence of Galenism. 文藝復興導致蓋倫學說影響力的下降。

meaning: 蓋倫派醫生；蓋倫學說的追隨者。
sentences: As a Galenist, he strictly followed the teachings of Galen. 作為一名蓋倫派醫生，他嚴格遵循蓋倫的教義。
Galenists often clashed with other medical schools of thought. 蓋倫派信徒經常與其他醫學思想流派發生衝突。
Galenite is a common mineral composed of lead sulfide. Galenite 是一種由硫化鉛組成的常見礦物。
The museum has a large specimen of galenite on display. 博物館展出了一個巨大的方鉛礦標本。
Galenobismutite is a rare mineral containing lead and bismuth. 輝鉛鉍礦是一種含有鉛和鉍的稀有礦物。
The chemical composition of galenobismutite was analyzed in the lab. 實驗室分析了輝鉛鉍礦的化學成分。
The mineral had a galenoid luster. 該礦物具有類似方鉛礦的光澤。
Geologists found several galenoid samples in the region. 地質學家在該地區發現了幾個類似方鉛礦的樣本。
Galeodes is a genus of solifuges commonly known as sun spiders. Galeodes 是避日蛛的一屬，通常被稱為太陽蜘蛛。
Galeodes species are known for their speed and large jaws. Galeodes 物種以其速度和大顎而聞名。
Galeodidae is a family of arachnids within the order Solifugae. Galeodidae 是避日目中的一個蛛形綱科。
Members of Galeodidae are primarily found in arid regions. 避日蛛科的成員主要分佈在乾旱地區。
The fossil remains showed galeoid characteristics. 化石遺骸顯示出鯊魚狀的特徵。
He is studying the evolution of galeoid sharks. 他正在研究鯊魚狀鯊魚的進化。

meaning: 鼯猴屬（現通常稱為 Cynocephalus）。
sentences: Galeopithecus is an older name for the genus of flying lemurs. Galeopithecus 是鼯猴屬的一個較舊的名稱。
The Galeopithecus can glide between trees in the rainforest. 鼯猴可以在熱帶雨林的樹木之間滑翔。
Galeopsis is a genus of annual herbs in the mint family. 鼬瓣花屬是唇形科中的一個一年生草本植物屬。
Some Galeopsis species are considered weeds in agricultural fields. 一些鼬瓣花屬物種在農田中被視為雜草。

meaning: 盔蘭屬（蘭科植物的一個屬）。
sentences: Galeorchis is a genus of orchids found in parts of Asia. 盔蘭屬是分佈在亞洲部分地區的一種蘭花屬。
The flowers of Galeorchis are often small and delicate. 盔蘭屬的花朵通常小巧而精緻。

meaning: 翅鯊科（現通常歸入 Triakidae）。
sentences: The Galeorhinidae were once considered a distinct family of sharks. 翅鯊科曾被認為是一個獨特的鯊魚科。
Classification changes have moved species from Galeorhinidae to other families. 分類學的變化已將物種從翅鯊科移至其他科。
Galeorhinus galeus is commonly known as the school shark. Galeorhinus galeus 通常被稱為翅鯊。
The Galeorhinus genus is widely distributed in temperate waters. 翅鯊屬廣泛分佈在溫帶海域。
The roof was designed to be galeproof. 屋頂被設計成防強風的。
They sought shelter in a galeproof building during the storm. 暴風雨期間，他們在一個防強風的建築中尋求庇護。

meaning: （昔日被判在軍艦上服役者的）工作室或居所。
sentences: The galera was a harsh environment for the workers. 對於工人來說，galera 是一個惡劣的環境。
Historical records describe the conditions inside the galera. 歷史記錄描述了 galera 內部的條件。
The fungus was identified as a galericulate species. 該真菌被鑑定為一種具有帽狀構造的物種。
Some seeds exhibit galericulate features to aid in dispersal. 一些種子表現出帽狀特徵以輔助傳播。
The Roman priest wore a galerum during the ceremony. 羅馬祭司在儀式期間戴著 galerum。
Ancient artifacts include several examples of the galerum. 古代文物包括幾個 galerum 的例子。

meaning: （古羅馬人的）皮帽；（角鬥士的）護肩。
sentences: The gladiator's galerus protected his left shoulder. 角鬥士的護肩（galerus）保護著他的左肩。
A galerus could also refer to a simple leather skullcap. Galerus 也可以指一種簡單的皮質便帽。

meaning: （過去用來趕家畜的）尖頭棒，刺棍；到處閒晃，遊蕩
sentences: The farmer used a gad to keep the cattle moving in the right direction. 農民用一根刺棍讓牲畜朝正確的方向前進。
She spent the whole afternoon gadding about the shops in the city. 她整個下午都在城裡的商店裡閒逛。

meaning: 加達巴人（主要居住在印度奧里薩邦的一個主要部落）
sentences: The Gadaba tribe is well-known for their vibrant Dhemsa dance performed during festivals. 加達巴部落因其在節日期間表演的充滿活力的德姆薩舞而聞名。
Anthropologists studied the unique social structure of the Gadaba people. 人類學家研究了加達巴人獨特的社會結構。

meaning: 愛到處閒逛的人，愛交際的人
sentences: Since he retired, he has become quite a gadabout, traveling to different countries every month. 自從退休後，他變得非常愛到處跑，每個月都去不同的國家旅行。
She is a bit of a gadabout and is rarely found at home on weekends. 她有點愛社交，週末很少待在家裡。

meaning: 衝向災難的（源自聖經中格拉森的豬群）；加達林的
sentences: The investors made a Gadarene rush to sell their stocks as the market crashed. 市場崩盤時，投資者紛紛盲目地衝去拋售股票。
He warned against the Gadarene slide into a full-scale regional conflict. 他警告不要像格拉森的豬群一樣陷入全面的區域衝突。

meaning: 加達里亞（印度的一個傳統從事牧羊與畜牧的種姓）
sentences: The Gadaria community has a long history of sheep farming in Northern India. 加達里亞群體在北印度擁有悠久的牧羊歷史。
The traditional occupation of the Gadaria caste involves raising livestock. 加達里亞種姓的傳統職業包括飼養牲畜。

meaning: 牛虻（一種會叮咬家畜的蒼蠅，同 gadfly）
sentences: The cows were constantly swishing their tails to keep the gadbees away. 那些牛不斷地搖著尾巴，試圖趕走牛虻。
A gadbee's bite can be very painful and irritating for animals. 牛虻的叮咬對動物來說可能非常痛苦且令人煩躁。

meaning: 槲寄生狀的寄生植物（西印度群島對這類植物的常用名）
sentences: The locals in Belize refer to the parasitic vines growing on the trees as gadbush. 伯利茲當地人將樹上生長的寄生藤蔓稱為 gadbush。
The gadbush can sometimes weaken the host tree by draining its nutrients. 這種寄生植物有時會因吸取養分而削弱宿主樹木。

meaning: 加當人（菲律賓呂宋島北部的原住民群體）
sentences: The Gaddang people are known for their colorful traditional costumes and beadwork. 加當人以其鮮豔的傳統服飾和珠飾而聞名。
The Gaddang language is primarily spoken in parts of the Cagayan Valley. 加當語主要在卡加延河谷的部分地區使用。

meaning: 閒晃，遊蕩（gad 的過去式）
sentences: They gadded about the countryside all summer without a care in the world. 他們整個夏天都在鄉間遊蕩，無憂無慮。
He gadded from one party to another throughout the entire week. 他整整一週都在參加一個又一個的派對。
The old town square was filled with gadders enjoying the warm evening air. 老城廣場上擠滿了在那裡閒逛、享受溫暖夜色的人。
He was known as a gadder who could never stay in one place for long. 他是個出名的浪子，從來不在一個地方待太久。

meaning: 加迪人（印度北部喜馬拉雅地區的一個半遊牧民族）
sentences: The Gaddi shepherds migrate to higher pastures during the summer months. 加迪牧羊人在夏季會遷徙到海拔較高的牧場。
Traditional Gaddi music reflects the rugged beauty of the mountains. 傳統的加迪音樂反映了山區崎嶇之美。

meaning: 寶座，墊子（在南亞指統治者、王室或宗教領袖的座位）
sentences: The young prince was formally installed on the gaddi in a grand ceremony. 小王子在盛大的儀式中正式登上了王座。
The guru sat on a velvet gaddi while addressing his followers. 大師坐在天鵝絨墊座上對信徒講話。

meaning: 閒逛，遊蕩（gad 的現在分詞）
sentences: Instead of studying, he's always gadding about with his friends. 他總是不讀書，而是和朋友們到處閒晃。
She's been gadding across Europe for the past three months. 過去三個月她一直在歐洲各處遊歷。
They wandered gaddingly through the museum, not really focusing on any one exhibit. 他們在博物館裡閒逛，沒有真正專注於任何一件展品。
The river flowed gaddingly through the meadow, twisting and turning. 小河在草地上悠閒地流淌，蜿蜒曲折。
The kitten was in a gaddish mood, running from room to room. 這隻小貓正處於好動不安分的狀態，在房間之間跑來跑去。
Her gaddish nature made it difficult for her to settle down in a quiet office job. 她那喜好閒逛的性格使她很難安於一份安靜的辦公室工作。

meaning: 喜好閒逛的習性，不安分
sentences: Her gaddishness meant that she was rarely at home during the weekends. 她的愛社交閒逛習性意味著她週末很少待在家裡。
The teacher complained about the student's gaddishness in the hallways. 老師抱怨這名學生在走廊裡到處閒晃的習性。

meaning: 鱈科魚類（如岩鱈）；刺棒（goad 的古拼法）
sentences: The gade is a type of small fish related to the cod family. 岩鱈是一種與鱈魚家族相關的小型魚類。
In old texts, the term gade was sometimes used to refer to a cattle goad. 在古籍中，gade 這個術語有時被用來指代趕牛的刺棒。

meaning: 牛虻；討厭而又不停騷擾他人或提出批評的人
sentences: The journalist acted as a political gadfly, constantly questioning the government's decisions. 這位記者充當了政治上的「刺頭」，不斷質疑政府的決定。
The horse tried to shake off the persistent gadfly. 那匹馬試圖甩掉那隻討厭的牛虻。

meaning: 測量儀器（同 gauge）；（蘇格蘭方言）傢伙，人
sentences: He used a gadge to check the pressure in the tires. 他使用測量儀檢查輪胎壓力。
In some parts of Scotland, 'gadge' or 'gadgie' is a common term for a man. 在蘇格蘭的部分地區，「gadge」或「gadgie」是對男人的常見稱呼。

meaning: 乞丐，小販（cadger 的變體）；（歷史上的）稅務員
sentences: The gadger went from door to door, hoping for a few coins or some food. 那個乞丐挨家挨戶乞討，希望能得到幾枚硬幣或一些食物。
In the old days, the gadger was responsible for measuring spirits to collect taxes. 在過去，稅務員負責測量烈酒以收取稅金。

meaning: 雅利龍屬（一種生活在三疊紀早期的已滅絕犬齒獸類）
sentences: Galesaurus fossils were first discovered in the Karoo Basin of South Africa. 雅利龍屬的化石最早是在南非的卡魯盆地發現的。
Paleontologists study Galesaurus to understand the evolution of early mammals. 古生物學家研究雅利龍屬以了解早期哺乳動物的演化。

meaning: 小卵石；圓石（法語，指經水磨圓的平滑石頭）
sentences: The beach was covered in smooth galets that had been polished by the sea. 海灘上鋪滿了被海水磨光的平滑小卵石。
She picked up a beautiful galet and skipped it across the surface of the lake. 她撿起一顆漂亮的圓石，在湖面上打起了水漂。

meaning: 鋸尾鯊屬（貓鯊科的一屬，以其尾部的鋸狀邊緣著稱）
sentences: Galeus melastomus, commonly known as the blackmouth catshark, is found in the Atlantic. 鋸尾鯊屬中的黑口貓鯊分佈於大西洋。
Members of the Galeus genus are typically found in deep-water habitats. 鋸尾鯊屬的成員通常生活在深海棲息地。

meaning: 香楊梅（Myrica gale 的俗名，一種具香味的灌木）
sentences: Galewort was traditionally used in some parts of Europe to flavor beer before hops became common. 在啤酒花普及之前，歐洲部分地區傳統上使用香楊梅來為啤酒調味。
The leaves of the galewort bush release a pleasant aroma when crushed. 香楊梅灌木的葉子揉碎時會散發出一股清香。

meaning: 快樂地（gaily 的變體）；暴風雨的；（罕見）像大帆船的
sentences: The children skipped galey through the meadow, singing their favorite songs. 孩子們快樂地在草地上蹦跳，唱著他們最喜歡的歌。
The sailors prepared for a galey night as the clouds gathered on the horizon. 隨著雲層在海平線聚集，水手們為一個暴風雨之夜做好了準備。

meaning: 迦格屬（半翅目的一屬，包含某些類型的蝽象）
sentences: Galga is a genus of bugs that belongs to the family Pentatomidae. 迦格屬是屬於蝽科的一種昆蟲。
Entomologists identified several new species within the Galga genus last year. 昆蟲學家去年在迦格屬中鑑定出幾個新物種。

meaning: 滾動；圓圈（希伯來語，指圓形物體或古代石圈）
sentences: In Hebrew, 'galgal' literally means wheel or something that rolls. 在希伯來語中，「galgal」字面意思是輪子或滾動的東西。
The archaeological site of Galgal Refaim features a massive prehistoric stone circle. 迦格瑞法因考古遺址以巨大的史前石圈為特色。

meaning: 佛法僧科（佛法僧鳥的舊分類名稱，現多用 Coraciidae）
sentences: The term Galgulidae was once used to classify various types of roller birds. Galgulidae 術語曾被用來分類各種類型的佛法僧鳥。
Modern avian taxonomy has largely replaced Galgulidae with more updated family names. 現代鳥類分類學已在很大程度上用更新的科名取代了 Galgulidae。

meaning: 罵人的話（印地語/烏爾都語）；小巷（gully 的變體）
sentences: In some South Asian cultures, using a 'gali' during an argument is considered very disrespectful. 在某些南亞文化中，爭吵時使用「罵人的話」被認為是非常不尊重的行為。
The narrow gali between the buildings was barely wide enough for a person to pass. 建築物之間狹窄的小巷幾乎只夠一個人通過。

meaning: 加勒比人（居住在南美洲東北部沿海地區的 Kali'na 原住民）
sentences: The Galibi people have a rich history of maritime navigation and storytelling. 加勒比人有著豐富的航海與敘事歷史。
Galibi communities can be found in French Guiana, Suriname, and Brazil. 加勒比人社群分佈於法屬圭亞那、蘇利南與巴西。

meaning: 加利西亞的；加利西亞人；加利西亞語（西班牙西北部或東歐歷史地區）
sentences: Galician is a Romance language closely related to Portuguese. 加利西亞語是一種與葡萄牙語密切相關的羅曼語系語言。
The Galician landscape is known for its green hills and rugged coastline. 加利西亞的風景以其綠色丘陵和崎嶇的海岸線而聞名。

meaning: 巢鼬屬（分佈於中南美洲的食肉目鼬科動物，如大巢鼬）
sentences: Members of the Galictis genus, such as the greater grison, are native to South America. 巢鼬屬的成員（如大巢鼬）原產於南美洲。
A Galictis is recognizable by its long body, short legs, and distinctive facial markings. 巢鼬屬動物以其長形的身體、短腿和獨特的面部標記而易於辨認。

meaning: 環尾獴屬（馬達加斯加特有的獴科動物，包含環尾獴）
sentences: Galidia elegans, the ring-tailed mongoose, is the only species in its genus. 環尾獴是環尾獴屬中唯一的物種。
The Galidia is an agile climber found primarily in the rainforests of Madagascar. 環尾獴是馬達加斯加雨林中常見的敏捷攀爬者。

meaning: 寬尾獴屬（馬達加斯加特有的食肉目動物，包含寬帶獴）
sentences: The Galidictis genus includes two species of striped mongooses endemic to Madagascar. 寬尾獴屬包含馬達加斯加特有的兩種帶狀獴。
Researchers are studying the nocturnal behavior of the Galidictis in their natural habitat. 研究人員正在研究寬尾獴在其自然棲息地中的夜間行為。

meaning: 阿里嘎里字母（一種用於轉寫梵文和藏文的傳統蒙古文字母）
sentences: The Galik alphabet was created in the 16th century to facilitate the study of Buddhist texts. 阿里嘎里字母創製於16世紀，旨在方便研究佛教典籍。
It is an extension of the traditional Mongolian vertical script. 它是傳統蒙古垂直腳本的一種延伸。

meaning: 加利利人的；伽利略的（指以色列加利利地區或科學家伽利略）
sentences: The Galilean moons are the four largest moons of Jupiter, discovered by Galileo Galilei. 伽利略衛星是木星最大的四顆衛星，由伽利略·伽利萊發現。
He was a Galilean fisherman who later became an apostle. 他是一位後來成為使徒的加利利漁夫。

meaning: 教堂前廊；（教堂西端的）門廊或小禮拜堂
sentences: A galilee is often found at the west end of large English cathedrals. 英格蘭大型大教堂的西端常能見到教堂前廊。
The penitents were sometimes restricted to the galilee of the church. 懺悔者有時被限制在教堂的前廊區域。

meaning: 語無倫次的話；胡言亂語；廢話
sentences: The politician's speech was dismissed as mere galimatias by his critics. 那位政治家的演講被他的批評者斥為純屬胡言亂語。
I couldn't make any sense of the galimatias he was muttering in his sleep. 我完全聽不懂他夢話裡那些語無倫次的話。

meaning: 高良薑（一種常用作香料或中藥的植物根莖）；莎草
sentences: Galingale is a common ingredient in many Thai and Indonesian curry pastes. 高良薑是許多泰國和印尼咖哩醬中的常見成分。
The wild galingale grows abundantly in wet, marshy areas along the river. 野生莎草在河邊潮濕的沼澤地區大量生長。

meaning: 粗毛菊屬（菊科下的一屬，常見於溫暖地區的雜草）
sentences: Galinsoga parviflora is often referred to as quickweed due to its rapid growth. 小花粗毛菊因其生長迅速而常被稱為「快草」。
Gardeners often struggle to eliminate Galinsoga once it establishes itself in the soil. 一旦粗毛菊在土壤中紮根，園丁們通常很難將其清除。

meaning: 土耳其水手（尤指與大帆船有關者）
sentences: The galiongee spent most of his life navigating the Mediterranean on Ottoman vessels. 這名土耳其水手一生大部分時間都在奧斯曼船隻上航行於地中海。
Historical records describe the galiongee as a skilled and resilient mariner. 歷史記錄將這名土耳其水手描述為一名技術嫻熟且堅韌的航海家。
The pirate used a swift galiot to intercept merchant ships in the narrow straits. 海盜利用一艘輕快的快船在狹窄的海峽攔截商船。
A galiot was often equipped with both sails and oars for maximum maneuverability. 小型長船通常配備風帆和船槳，以獲得最大的機動性。

meaning: 葛利普定（取自安哥斯杜拉樹皮的生物鹼）
sentences: Galipidine is one of the quinoline alkaloids isolated from the bark of Galipea officinalis. 葛利普定是從安哥斯杜拉樹皮中分離出的喹啉生物鹼之一。
Researchers studied the chemical structure of galipidine to understand its potential medicinal properties. 研究人員研究了葛利普定的化學結構，以了解其潛在的藥用價值。

meaning: 葛利普鹼（取自安哥斯杜拉樹皮的生物鹼）
sentences: Galipine has been investigated for its possible antimalarial activities in laboratory settings. 葛利普鹼在實驗室環境中被研究其可能的抗瘧疾活性。
The extraction process yielded a significant amount of pure galipine from the herbal samples. 提取過程從草藥樣本中產生了大量的純葛利普鹼。

meaning: 葛利普定（取自安哥斯杜拉樹皮的另一種生物鹼）
sentences: Galipoidin is a rare nitrogenous compound found in certain South American plants. 葛利普定是發現於某些南美植物中的罕見含氮化合物。
The concentration of galipoidin in the bark varies depending on the region and harvesting season. 樹皮中葛利普定的含量取決於地區和採收季節。

meaning: 葛利普定（與 galipoidin 相關或同義的生物鹼）
sentences: In some older pharmacopoeias, galipoidine is listed alongside other Angostura alkaloids. 在一些較舊的藥典中，葛利普定與其他安哥斯杜拉生物鹼並列。
The scientist identified galipoidine using advanced mass spectrometry techniques. 科學家利用先進的質譜技術鑑定出了葛利普定。

meaning: 葛利普因（安哥斯杜拉樹皮中的化學成分）
sentences: Galipoipin is among the minor constituents extracted during the chemical analysis of the plant. 葛利普因是在該植物化學分析過程中提取的次要成分之一。
The role of galipoipin in the plant's overall biological activity is still being explored. 葛利普因在植物整體生物活性中的作用仍在探索中。

meaning: 松脂；法國松脂（產自海岸松的白色樹脂）
sentences: Galipot is often used in the production of certain varnishes and sealing waxes. 松脂常用於生產某些漆料和封蠟。
The resin, known as galipot, exudes naturally from the trunk of the maritime pine. 這種被稱為法國松脂的樹脂會從海岸松的樹幹自然滲出。

meaning: 豬殃殃屬（茜草科的一屬植物）
sentences: Galium aparine, commonly known as cleavers, is a familiar plant in many temperate gardens. 豬殃殃（學名 Galium aparine）是許多溫帶花園中常見的植物。
Some species of Galium have been used historically as a source of red dye for fabrics. 某些豬殃殃屬植物在歷史上曾被用作織物的紅色染料來源。

meaning: 蓋拉人（奧羅莫人的舊稱，現具貶義）
sentences: The term 'Galla' was used by outsiders for centuries but is now considered offensive by the Oromo people. 「蓋拉」這個詞被外人使用了幾個世紀，但現在被奧羅莫人視為具有冒犯性。
Historical texts often refer to the Galla regions of East Africa when describing trade routes. 歷史文獻在描述貿易路線時，經常提到東非的蓋拉地區。

meaning: 蟲癭（植物因昆蟲等刺激產生的贅生物）
sentences: The oak tree was covered in small galla caused by the larvae of a specific wasp. 這棵橡樹上長滿了由特定胡蜂幼蟲引起的微小蟲癭。
In Latin, 'galla' literally means a gall nut, which was historically used to make ink. 在拉丁語中，「galla」字面意思是指五倍子（蟲癭），歷史上曾被用來製作墨水。

meaning: 沒食子苯乙酮（用作染料或防腐劑的化合物）
sentences: Gallacetophenone can be synthesized through the condensation of pyrogallol and acetic acid. 沒食子苯乙酮可以透過焦性沒食子酸和乙酸的縮合反應合成。
In medicine, gallacetophenone was once used topically to treat parasitic skin infections. 在醫學上，沒食子苯乙酮曾被局部用於治療寄生性皮膚感染。

meaning: 粉紅鳳頭鸚鵡（常用 Galah）；笨蛋（澳洲俚語）
sentences: We saw a flock of pink and grey gallahs feeding in the Australian outback. 我們看到一群粉紅鳳頭鸚鵡在澳洲內陸覓食。
Don't be such a gallah and check the directions before you drive! 別像個笨蛋一樣，開車前先確認好方向！

meaning: 沒食子醯苯胺（用於治療皮膚病的化合物）
sentences: Gallanilide was traditionally employed as an alternative to chrysarobin in dermatological treatments. 沒食子醯苯胺在皮膚科治療中傳統上被用作柯椏素的替代品。
The pharmacist prepared an ointment containing gallanilide for the patient's psoriasis. 藥劑師為病人的牛皮癬準備了含有沒食子醯苯胺的藥膏。

meaning: 獻慇勤；表現出紳士風度或風流倜儻
sentences: He attempted to gallantize all the ladies at the party with his charming stories. 他試圖用他迷人的故事向派對上的所有女士獻慇勤。
In the Victorian era, it was common for young men to gallantize their potential suitors. 在維多利亞時代，年輕男子向潛在的求婚對象展現紳士風度是很常見的。

meaning: 勇敢地；彬彬有禮地；獻慇勤地
sentences: The soldiers gallantly defended the fortress against the overwhelming enemy forces. 士兵們英勇地保衛堡壘，抵禦勢不可擋的敵軍。
He gallantly offered his seat to the elderly woman on the crowded bus. 他在擁擠的公車上彬彬有禮地將座位讓給了那位年長的婦女。
The captain was awarded a medal for his exceptional gallantness in the face of danger. 隊長因其面對危險時卓越的勇氣而被授予勳章。
Her grandfather's old-fashioned gallantness always made her feel like a princess. 她祖父那種老派的彬彬有禮總是讓她覺得自己像個公主。

meaning: 勇敢；英勇；（對女性的）慇勤
sentences: The firefighter was cited for his gallantry after saving three children from the burning building. 這名消防員因從燃燒的建築中救出三名兒童的英勇行為而受到表彰。
In literature, gallantry often refers to the courtly manners of knights and noblemen. 在文學中，gallantry 通常是指騎士和貴族的宮廷禮儀。

meaning: 沒食子酸鹽；沒食子酸酯
sentences: Propyl gallate is a common antioxidant used as a food additive to prevent fats from spoiling. 沒食子酸丙酯是一種常見的抗氧化劑，用作食品添加劑以防止脂肪變質。
The lab analysis confirmed the presence of various gallates in the green tea extract. 實驗室分析證實了綠茶提取物中存在各種沒食子酸酯。

meaning: 繫帶（雞蛋中固定蛋黃的螺旋狀構造，現已罕用）
sentences: The term 'gallature' was once used to describe the chalaza that anchors the yolk within an egg. 「gallature」一詞曾被用來描述將蛋黃固定在雞蛋內的繫帶。
Old biological texts sometimes refer to the gallature as a sign of the egg's structural integrity. 舊的生物學文獻有時將繫帶視為雞蛋結構完整性的標誌。

meaning: 癭莓（一種常綠冬青屬灌木，分佈於美國東南部）
sentences: Bees often collect nectar from the white flowers of the gallberry bush. 蜜蜂經常從癭莓灌木的白色花朵中採集花蜜。
Gallberry honey is a popular local product in parts of Florida and Georgia. 癭莓蜂蜜是佛羅里達州和喬治亞州部分地區受歡迎的特產。
The sandy soil of the coastal plain is ideal for the growth of gallbush. 沿海平原的沙質土壤非常適合癭灌木的生長。
We spotted several gallbushes while hiking through the wetlands. 我們在穿越濕地健行時發現了幾株癭灌木。

meaning: 大型帆船（16至17世紀結合划槳與風帆的大型戰船）
sentences: The galleass was a formidable hybrid vessel used in the Battle of Lepanto. 大型帆船是勒班陀戰役中一種強大的混合型艦船。
Heavier than a galley, the galleass could carry more cannons and supplies. 比起一般長船，大型帆船能攜帶更多的加農炮和物資。

meaning: 擦傷的；惱怒的；（植物）生癭的
sentences: The rider checked the horse's galled back for signs of infection. 騎手檢查了馬匹擦傷的背部是否有感染跡象。
She felt galled by his constant criticism of her work. 她對他不斷批評她的工作感到十分惱怒。

meaning: 加利西亞人；加利西亞語（Galician 的變體）
sentences: The Gallegan culture has deep Celtic roots that distinguish it from the rest of Spain. 加利西亞文化有著深厚的凱爾特根源，使其與西班牙其他地區有所不同。
Many Gallegan immigrants settled in Argentina during the early 20th century. 許多加利西亞移民在20世紀初定居於阿根廷。

meaning: 棓因（一種紅紫色染料，實驗室常用作指示劑）
sentences: Gallein is synthesized by heating pyrogallol with phthalic anhydride. 棓因是透過加熱鄰苯三酚與鄰苯二甲酸酐合成的。
The chemist used gallein to test for the presence of certain metal ions. 化學家使用棓因來檢測某些金屬離子的存在。

meaning: 大帆船（15至18世紀西班牙等國使用的大型多桅帆船）
sentences: Spanish galleons once transported vast treasures across the Atlantic Ocean. 西班牙大帆船曾橫跨大西洋運送大量的寶藏。
Divers discovered the remains of an old galleon at the bottom of the Caribbean Sea. 潛水員在加勒比海海底發現了一艘古老帆船的殘骸。

meaning: （罕見）住在走廊的人；畫廊常客（俚語）
sentences: In the old theater, the 'gallers' were those who could only afford the cheapest seats in the gallery. 在舊劇院裡，「畫廊客」是指那些只能負擔得起畫廊最廉價座位的人。
As a frequent galler, he knew every painting in the museum by heart. 作為一名畫廊常客，他對博物館裡的每一幅畫都了如指掌。

meaning: 購物中心；走廊式商場；畫廊
sentences: The new galleria features dozens of high-end boutiques and international cafes. 這家新的購物中心擁有數十家高端精品店和國際咖啡館。
They walked through the sunlit galleria, admiring the glass ceiling and modern architecture. 他們走過陽光充足的長廊，欣賞著玻璃天花板和現代建築。

meaning: 畫廊工作人員；畫廊愛好者
sentences: The gallerian carefully arranged the new sculptures for the upcoming exhibition. 畫廊工作人員為即將舉行的展覽精心佈置了新的雕塑作品。
She has been a dedicated gallerian for years, supporting local artists whenever possible. 她多年來一直是一位忠實的畫廊愛好者，盡可能地支持當地藝術家。
The galleried courtyard of the historic mansion was filled with blooming flowers. 這座歷史豪宅的有長廊庭院裡開滿了鮮花。
The hotel offers galleried suites that overlook the bustling city square. 這家飯店提供設有露台的套房，可俯瞰繁華的城市廣場。

meaning: 螟蛾科（蠟螟亞科，大蠟螟所屬的科）
sentences: Species in the family Galleriidae are often pests in beehives. 螟蛾科中的物種通常是蜂箱中的害蟲。
The researcher studied the life cycle of various moths within the Galleriidae group. 研究人員研究了螟蛾科中各種蛾類的生命週期。
The spacious hallway had a gallerylike feel with its high ceilings and rows of paintings. 寬敞的走廊因其高聳的天花板和成排的繪畫而給人一種像畫廊的感覺。
They transformed the attic into a gallerylike space to display their photography collection. 他們將閣樓改造出一個像畫廊般的空間，用來展示他們的攝影收藏。

meaning: 碎石片（嵌入灰漿中用以加固牆壁的石片）
sentences: The mason used gallets to fill the gaps between the larger stones in the wall. 石匠使用碎石片填補牆中大石頭之間的縫隙。
Galleting is a traditional building technique that adds both strength and visual interest to stone structures. 鑲嵌碎石片是一種傳統建築技術，既能增加石造建築的強度，也能增添視覺趣味。

meaning: 像長船的；像船上廚房的
sentences: The narrow apartment had a galleylike kitchen that maximized every inch of space. 這間狹窄的公寓有一個像船上廚房一樣的廚房，充分利用了每一寸空間。
The sleek, galleylike design of the rowing boat made it incredibly fast in the water. 划艇那流線型且像長船的設計使其在水中的速度極快。

meaning: 槳手（划長船的人）；船上廚房工作人員
sentences: Life as a galleyman in ancient times was incredibly grueling and dangerous. 在古代，作為一名長船槳手的生活是非常艱辛且危險的。
The galleyman prepared a simple meal for the crew during the long voyage. 在漫長的航行中，廚房人員為船員們準備了一頓簡單的飯菜。

meaning: 蚰蜒（一種多足類節肢動物，或指千足蟲）
sentences: The galleyworm scurried across the basement floor with its many legs. 蚰蜒帶著牠那許多的足在地下室的地板上飛奔。
Some people find galleyworms frightening, but they actually help control other house pests. 有些人覺得蚰蜒很嚇人，但牠們實際上助於控制其他家庭害蟲。

meaning: 癭花（無花果中供榕小蜂產卵的特殊花朵）
sentences: The symbiotic relationship between the fig wasp and the gallflower is essential for pollination. 榕小蜂與癭花之間的共生關係對授粉至關重要。
Inside the fig, the gallflower provides a safe nursery for the wasp larvae. 在無花果內部，癭花為榕小蜂幼蟲提供了一個安全的育嬰室。

meaning: 癭蜂；癭蠅（在植物上引起蟲癭的昆蟲）
sentences: The gallfly lays its eggs in the stems of goldenrod plants, causing a protective swelling to form. 癭蠅將卵產在一枝黃花的莖中，導致保護性的腫脹（蟲癭）形成。
Naturalists study gallflies to understand how they manipulate plant growth for their own benefit. 動植物研究者研究癭蠅，以了解牠們如何為了自身利益而操縱植物生長。

meaning: 高盧人（複數）；（古羅馬）庫柏勒女神的閹割祭司
sentences: The Romans fought many battles against the Galli tribes in what is now modern-day France. 羅馬人與現今法國境內的高盧部落進行了多次戰鬥。
The Galli were known for their ecstatic rituals and devotion to the Great Mother goddess. 高盧祭司以其狂喜的儀式和對大地之母女神的虔誠而聞名。
The poet used a galliambic meter for his new work. 詩人為他的新作品使用了嘉利安比克體韻律。
Classical scholars analyzed the galliambic verses. 古典學者分析了嘉利安比克體詩句。

meaning: 嘉利安比克體（一種古希臘詩體）
sentences: The galliambus was often used in religious hymns. 嘉利安比克體常用於宗教讚美詩。
Catullus wrote a famous poem in galliambus. 卡圖盧斯用嘉利安比克體寫了一首著名的詩。
The Gallian tribes resisted the Roman invasion. 高盧部落抵抗了羅馬的入侵。
Archaeologists found Gallian artifacts in France. 考古學家在法國發現了高盧文物。

meaning: 嘉拉德舞（十六世紀歐洲舞）；活潑的
sentences: The dancers performed a galliard at the royal court. 舞者在皇室宮廷表演了一場嘉拉德舞。
He was a galliard young man, always full of energy. 他是個活潑的年輕人，總是充滿活力。
The festival was filled with music and galliardise. 節日充滿了音樂和歡樂。
She missed the galliardise of her childhood. 她懷念童年的歡樂。
The knight rode galliardly into the battle. 騎士勇敢地騎馬進入戰鬥。
She danced galliardly across the stage. 她在舞台上活潑地跳舞。
His galliardness made him popular among his peers. 他的活潑使他在同齡人中很受歡迎。
The galliardness of the sailors was inspiring. 水手們的勇敢令人鼓舞。
He has a very Gallic sense of humor. 他有一種非常法式的幽默感。
The museum features a collection of Gallic art. 博物館收藏了大量的高盧藝術品。

meaning: 棓樹的；五倍子的；沒食子酸的
sentences: Gallic acid is found in many plants. 五倍子酸存在於許多植物中。
The chemist analyzed the gallic content of the sample. 化學家分析了樣本中的五倍子含量。

meaning: 高盧教會的；高盧教會主義者
sentences: The Gallican movement sought independence from Rome. 高盧教會運動尋求從羅馬獨立。
He was a prominent Gallican theologian. 他是一位著名的高盧教會神學家。
Gallicanism emphasizes the autonomy of the national church. 高盧教會主義強調國家教會的自主權。
The king supported Gallicanism to maintain control. 國王支持高盧教會主義以維持控制。
His English is full of Gallicisms. 他的英語充滿了法語慣用語。
She noticed a certain Gallicism in his manners. 她注意到他的舉止中帶有一種法國風氣。
The Gallicization of the border regions took several decades. 邊境地區的法國化花了幾十年的時間。
Cultural Gallicization was a goal of the administration. 文化法國化是政府的一個目標。
The government tried to Gallicize the local language. 政府試圖將當地語言法國化。
He chose to Gallicize his name when he moved to Paris. 他搬到巴黎時選擇將自己的名字法國化。
The Gallicizer promoted French culture in the colonies. 這位法國化者在殖民地推廣法國文化。
He was known as a fervent Gallicizer of modern literature. 他被公認為現代文學的熱心法國化者。

meaning: 癭棲者（如住在植物癭中的昆蟲）
sentences: The gallicola spends its larval stage inside the plant gall. 癭棲者在植物癭內度過其幼蟲期。
The researcher studied the life cycle of the gallicola. 研究人員研究了癭棲者的生命週期。
Gallicolae are responsible for forming various types of galls. 癭棲類負責形成各種類型的癭。
He specialized in the classification of Gallicolae. 他專攻癭棲類的分類。
The gallicole is protected from predators by the gall's hard shell. 癭棲者受到癭硬殼的保護，免受捕食者的侵害。
A gallicole can be found in many types of trees. 在許多類型的樹木中都可以發現癭棲者。
Gallicolous insects are adapted to life within plant tissues. 癭棲昆蟲適應了在植物組織內的生活。
The scientist documented various gallicolous species. 科學家記錄了各種癭棲物種。
The galliferous plant had several large growths on its stems. 這棵產癭植物的莖上有幾個巨大的生長物。
He examined the galliferous leaves under a microscope. 他在顯微鏡下檢查了產癭的葉子。

meaning: 法國化（使具有法國特徵或適應法國規範的過程）
sentences: The gallification of the local dialect occurred over several centuries. 當地語言的法國化過程持續了幾個世紀。
Historians discussed the gallification of European culture during the Enlightenment. 歷史學家討論了啟蒙運動期間歐洲文化的法國化。

meaning: 法國化；使具有法國特色
sentences: The gallification of the administrative system was a priority for the new governor. 使行政系統法國化是新任州長的優先事項。
Local customs resisted the gradual gallification imposed by the ruling class. 當地習俗抵制了統治階級強加的逐漸法國化。
Pheasants and turkeys are examples of galliform birds. 山雉和火雞是雞形目鳥類的例子。
The museum has a collection of galliform skeletons for study. 博物館收藏了一系列雞形目鳥類的骨骼供研究。

meaning: 雞形目（鳥綱的一目，包括雞、雉、鵪鶉等）
sentences: Galliformes is an order of heavy-bodied ground-feeding birds. 雞形目是體型重、在地面覓食的一目鳥類。
Many species in the order Galliformes are important for agriculture. 雞形目中的許多物種對農業非常重要。

meaning: 使法國化；賦予法國特徵
sentences: They attempted to gallify the local laws to match those of Paris. 他們試圖使當地法律法國化，以與巴黎的法律相匹配。
It is difficult to gallify a culture that has such deep regional roots. 要使一個具有深厚地域根基的文化法國化是非常困難的。

meaning: 寬大的馬褲；長統襪；（保護用的）皮護腿
sentences: The sailor wore a pair of sturdy galligaskins while on deck. 那個水手在甲板上穿著一條結實的寬大馬褲。
In the 17th century, galligaskins were a fashionable choice for men. 在17世紀，寬大馬褲是男性的時尚選擇。

meaning: 大雜燴；雜七雜八的東西
sentences: The antique shop was a gallimaufry of old furniture and strange gadgets. 那家古董店裡擺滿了舊家具和奇特小玩意，簡直是大雜燴。
His latest book is a gallimaufry of personal anecdotes and historical facts. 他的新書是個人軼事和歷史事實的大雜燴。
Gallinaceae was once a common term for birds related to domestic fowl. Gallinaceae 曾是與家禽相關鳥類的常用術語。
Scientific classification has evolved since the term Gallinaceae was widely used. 自 Gallinaceae 一詞被廣泛使用以來，科學分類已經發生了演變。
The peacock is a magnificent gallinacean found in South Asia. 孔雀是一種發現於南亞的壯麗雞類動物。
He studied the behavioral patterns of various gallinacean species. 他研究了各種雞類物種的行為模式。

meaning: 雞類（舊分類名，通常指雞形目）
sentences: Old textbooks often categorized these birds under the heading Gallinacei. 舊教科書經常將這些鳥類歸入 Gallinacei 標題下。
The curator explained the history of the taxonomic name Gallinacei. 館長解釋了分類名稱 Gallinacei 的歷史。

meaning: 雞類的；似雞的；雞形目的
sentences: The forest is home to several gallinaceous species like the wild turkey. 這片森林是幾種雞類鳥類（如野生火雞）的家園。
Domestication of gallinaceous birds significantly changed human nutrition. 雞類鳥類的馴化顯著改變了人類的營養。
In older systems of taxonomy, Gallinae included many ground-dwelling birds. 在舊的分類系統中，Gallinae 包括許多地面棲息的鳥類。
The library has historical records using the term Gallinae in bird descriptions. 圖書館保存著在鳥類描述中使用 Gallinae 一詞的歷史記錄。
Gallinago is a genus of birds known for their long bills and camouflage. 田鷸屬是一類以長嘴和偽裝著稱的鳥類。
We observed a common snipe, which belongs to the genus Gallinago, in the wetlands. 我們在濕地中觀察到了一隻屬於田鷸屬的普通田鷸。
The gallinazo is frequently seen soaring over the Andes mountains. 黑禿鷲經常被看見在安地斯山脈上空翱翔。
Local people respect the gallinazo for its essential role as a scavenger. 當地人尊重黑禿鷲作為食腐動物的重要角色。
The researcher focused on galline diseases that could affect local poultry. 研究人員專注於可能影響當地禽類的雞類疾病。
She has a galline interest in everything that happens on the farm. 她對農場發生的一切都有著像雞一樣的好奇心。

meaning: 使人煩惱的；羞辱性的；惱人的
sentences: It was galling to have to admit that she was wrong in front of everyone. 在眾人面前必須承認自己錯了，這件事真讓人惱火。
He found it galling to work under someone with far less experience than himself. 他覺得在一個經驗遠比自己少的人手下工作很令人氣憤。
The project was gallingly slow to produce any tangible results. 該項目的進展慢得令人惱火，沒能產生任何實質性結果。
He remained gallingly cheerful despite the bad news we received. 儘管我們收到了壞消息，他還是愉快得讓人受不了。
She complained about the gallingness of the constant interruptions to her work. 她抱怨工作不斷被打擾真讓人受不了。
The gallingness of the situation was evident to everyone involved. 每個相關人員都看出了情況的惱人之處。

meaning: 大蚊；大型昆蟲（特別指大型蚊子）
sentences: We were plagued by gallinippers during our camping trip near the swamp. 在沼澤附近露營時，我們深受大蚊子的困擾。
A gallinipper bite can be quite painful compared to that of a normal mosquito. 與一般蚊子相比，大蚊子的叮咬可能相當疼痛。

meaning: 黑水雞屬（秧雞科的一屬）
sentences: The common moorhen is a well-known member of the Gallinula genus. 普通黑水雞是黑水雞屬中著名的成員。
Gallinula species are typically found in various wetlands and marshes. 黑水雞屬物種通常出現在各種濕地和沼澤中。
The common gallinule is a bird that lives in marshes. 紅冠水雞是生活在沼澤地的鳥類。
A gallinule swam gracefully across the pond. 一隻水雞優雅地游過池塘。
Gallinulinae is a subfamily of birds in the rail family. 紅冠水雞亞科是秧雞科的一個亞科。
Researchers studied the breeding habits of Gallinulinae. 研究人員研究了紅冠水雞亞科的繁殖習性。
The bird has gallinuline features, such as its beak shape. 這隻鳥具有紅冠水雞般的特徵，例如牠的喙形。
He observed gallinuline behaviors in the local marsh. 他在當地的沼澤地觀察到了類似紅冠水雞的行為。
The apothecary kept the ointment in a small gallipot. 藥劑師把軟膏放在一個小藥罐裡。
He found an ancient gallipot during the excavation. 在挖掘過程中發現了一個古代的小藥罐。
Gallirallus is a genus of rails found in the Oceania region. 秧雞屬是發現於大洋洲地區的一個秧雞屬。
The flightless Gallirallus species are often endangered. 不會飛的秧雞屬物種通常處於瀕危狀態。

meaning: 澱粉糖化過程中產生的不發酵物質
sentences: Gallisin is an unfermentable substance found in starch sugar. Gallisin 是在澱粉糖中發現的一種不可發酵物質。
Scientists analyzed the chemical properties of gallisin. 科學家分析了 gallisin 的化學性質。
Gallium is a soft, silvery metal that melts at a low temperature. 鎵是一種柔軟的銀白色金屬，在低溫下會熔化。
Gallium nitride is used in high-efficiency LEDs. 氮化鎵被用於高效能 LED 中。
She spent the weekend gallivanting around the city. 她週末都在城市裡到處閒逛。
Stop gallivanting and start doing your homework. 別再到處亂晃了，開始寫功課吧。
He is a real gallivanter, always looking for an adventure. 他是個真正的愛閒逛的人，總是在尋找冒險。
The old gallivanter had many stories from his travels. 那位老遊蕩者有很多旅行中的故事。
The gallivat was used for coastal defense in the past. 這種小艇在過去被用於海岸防禦。
They saw a gallivat sailing near the harbor. 他們看到一艘巡邏艇在港口附近航行。
Certain insects are gallivorous, feeding on plant galls. 某些昆蟲是以五倍子為食的，以植物癭為食。
He studied the lifecycle of gallivorous larvae. 他研究了食癭幼蟲的生命週期。
The galliwasp is a type of lizard found in the Caribbean. 蛇蜥是發現於加勒比地區的一種蜥蜴。
He carefully approached the rare galliwasp. 他小心地靠近那隻罕見的蛇蜥。
Gallnuts are used to produce high-quality ink. 五倍子被用來生產高品質的墨水。
The tannic acid extracted from gallnuts is valuable. 從五倍子中提取的單寧酸很有價值。
Gallocyanin is a dye used in biological staining. 棓青素是一種用於生物染色的染料。
The lab technician prepared a solution of gallocyanin. 實驗室技術員準備了棓青素溶液。
Gallocyanine is often used as a histological stain. 棓青素常被用作組織學染色劑。
Researchers used gallocyanine to visualize cellular structures. 研究人員使用棓青素來觀察細胞結構。
Galloflavine is a chemical compound used in some industrial processes. 棓黃素是某些工業過程中使用的化合物。
The properties of galloflavine were documented in the manual. 手冊中記錄了棓黃素的特性。
The galloglass were elite mercenary warriors in Ireland. Galloglass 是愛爾蘭的精英僱傭兵戰士。
He read a history book about the galloglass of the Middle Ages. 他讀了一本關於中世紀僱傭兵的歷史書。
He was a known Galloman who admired French culture. 他是個著名的親法派人士，非常崇拜法國文化。
The Galloman supported the introduction of French laws. 這位親法派人士支持引進法國法律。
Her Gallomania led her to move to Paris. 她對法國的狂熱促使她搬到了巴黎。
The 18th century saw a rise in Gallomania among European elites. 18 世紀歐洲精英階層對法國文化的狂熱日益增長。
The Gallomaniac spoke only in French to his colleagues. 那位對法國狂熱的人只用法語和同事交談。
As a Gallomaniac, he decorated his entire house in French style. 作為一個法國迷，他把整個房子都裝修成法國風格。
The tanker has a total gallonage of ten thousand. 這輛油罐車的總容量為一萬加侖。
They calculated the monthly gallonage of water used by the factory. 他們計算了工廠每月的用水加侖數。
The milk was stored in a heavy plastic galloner. 牛奶儲存在一個厚重的塑膠加侖容器中。
He used a galloner to measure the liquid fertilizer. 他用加侖量具來測量液體肥料。
The officer's uniform was adorned with gold galloon. 軍官的制服裝飾著金色的裝飾帶。
She sewed a silver galloon onto the edge of the curtains. 她在窗簾邊緣縫上了銀色的鑲邊。
The gallooned draperies added a touch of luxury to the room. 裝飾著飾帶的垂簾為房間增添了一抹奢華感。
He wore a gallooned hat as part of his ceremonial costume. 他戴著一頂用裝飾帶裝飾的帽子作為禮儀服裝的一部分。

meaning: 疾馳；快速跳舞（一種活潑的舞蹈）
sentences: The ball ended with a lively gallopade across the ballroom. 舞會在舞廳裡一場活潑的疾馳舞中結束。
The horses began to gallopade across the open fields. 馬群開始在開闊的田野上疾馳。

meaning: 奔馳者；疾馳的人或馬；輕便大砲
sentences: The horse was a natural galloper and quickly took the lead. 這匹馬天生擅長奔馳，很快就取得了領先。
In the 18th century, a galloper was a light field gun pulled by horses. 在18世紀，galloper 是一種由馬拉動的輕便野戰炮。

meaning: 石鷓鴣屬（一種亞洲產的鷓鴣）
sentences: Galloperdix is a genus of spurfowl found mainly in India and Sri Lanka. 石鷓鴣屬是主要發現於印度和斯里蘭卡的鷓鴣類。
Ornithologists studied the habitat of the various Galloperdix species. 鳥類學家研究了各種石鷓鴣屬物種的棲息地。
As a true Gallophile, he visits Paris every summer. 作為一個真正的親法者，他每年夏天都會去巴黎。
Her Gallophile tendencies were evident in her love for French cinema. 她對法國電影的熱愛顯露了她的親法傾向。

meaning: 親法傾向；崇尚法國文化
sentences: Gallophilism was quite common among the English aristocracy in the 18th century. 在18世紀的英國貴族中，親法傾向相當普遍。
The exhibition celebrated the history of Gallophilism in American art. 該展覽慶祝了美國藝術中的親法文化歷史。
The politician was known as a staunch Gallophobe who opposed all French treaties. 這位政治家以堅定的恐法者著稱，反對所有與法國的條約。
His Gallophobe views were rooted in historical conflicts. 他的仇法觀點源於歷史衝突。
The diplomat worked hard to overcome the Gallophobia present in the local media. 這位外交官努力克服當地媒體中存在的恐法心理。
Historical tensions have occasionally fueled waves of Gallophobia. 歷史上的緊張局勢偶爾會引發仇法浪潮。

meaning: 疾馳的；（病等）急速蔓延的
sentences: We heard the sound of galloping horses in the distance. 我們聽到遠處馬匹疾馳的聲音。
The country suffered from galloping inflation during the crisis. 該國在危機期間遭受了急劇上升的通貨膨脹。
They had a galloptious time at the summer festival. 他們在夏季慶典上度過了一段極妙的時光。
The meal she prepared was absolutely galloptious. 她準備的那頓飯真是太棒了。
Gallotannate is a chemical compound derived from gallotannic acid. 棓丹寧酸鹽是衍生自棓丹寧酸的化合物。
The laboratory synthesized various gallotannate salts for the experiment. 實驗室為實驗合成了各種棓丹寧酸鹽。
Gallotannic acid is found in many plants and used in tanning leather. 棓丹寧酸存在於許多植物中，用於皮革鞣製。
The scientist explained the gallotannic properties of the extract. 科學家解釋了提取物的棓丹寧特性。
Gallotannin is used as a mordant in dyeing processes. 棓丹寧在染色過程中被用作媒染劑。
The high concentration of gallotannin gives the tea its astringent taste. 高濃度的棓丹寧使茶帶有澀味。
Gallous acid is another term for gallic acid in some older texts. 在一些舊文本中，gallous acid 是沒食子酸的另一種稱呼。
The researcher analyzed the gallous content of the oak galls. 研究人員分析了橡癭中的五倍子含量。

meaning: 加洛韋人的；加洛韋的（蘇格蘭地區）
sentences: The Gallovidian landscape is characterized by its rolling hills and rugged coastline. 加洛韋地區的風景以起伏的丘陵和崎嶇的海岸線為特徵。
He is proud of his Gallovidian heritage and ancestors. 他為自己的加洛韋傳承和祖先感到自豪。

meaning: （中世紀蘇格蘭或愛爾蘭的）重裝步兵；侍衛
sentences: The gallowglass were elite mercenary warriors from the Norse-Gaelic clans. Gallowglass 是來自諾斯-蓋爾氏族的精英僱傭兵。
Each Irish chieftain maintained a troop of gallowglass for protection. 每個愛爾蘭首領都維持著一支 gallowglass 部隊以求保護。
The prisoner was led to the gallows at dawn. 囚犯在黎明時分被帶到絞刑架前。
A wooden gallows stood in the center of the town square. 一個木製絞刑架矗立在城鎮廣場的中心。
The gallowsmaker worked through the night to prepare the scaffold for the morning's execution. 絞刑架製造者徹夜工作，為早晨的處決準備斷頭台。
Historically, a gallowsmaker was often a skilled carpenter. 從歷史上看，絞刑架製造者通常是熟練的木匠。

meaning: 絞刑架般的特質；死到臨頭的狂放
sentences: There was a certain gallowsness in his grin as he faced the judge. 當他面對法官時，他的笑容中帶著一種死到臨頭的狂放。
The play captured the dark gallowsness of life during the war. 這部劇捕捉到了戰爭期間生活中那種黑暗且如臨絞刑架般的特質。
The prisoner began his slow, gallowsward march. 囚犯開始了他緩慢的、朝向絞刑架的行軍。
Every step he took felt heavier as he moved gallowsward. 當他向絞刑架走去時，他邁出的每一步都顯得更加沉重。
He had to undergo surgery to remove a large gallstone. 他必須接受手術以移除一顆大膽結石。
A diet high in fat can increase the risk of developing gallstones. 高脂肪飲食會增加患膽結石的風險。
The term Gallus was used by the Romans to refer to the inhabitants of Gaul. 「Gallus」一詞被羅馬人用來指代高盧的居民。
Gallus gallus is the scientific name for the red junglefowl. 「Gallus gallus」是紅原雞的學名。
He wore bright red galluses to hold up his baggy trousers. 他穿著鮮紅色的吊帶以此來固定他寬鬆的褲子。
Old-fashioned galluses are still preferred by some gentlemen today. 如今，一些紳士仍然偏愛老式的吊帶。

meaning: 苦草（指某些苦味的植物，如五葉龍膽）
sentences: Gallweed was once a common ingredient in traditional herbal tonics. 苦草曾經是傳統草藥補劑中的常見成分。
The researcher identified the specimen as a type of gallweed. 研究人員將該標本鑑定為一種苦草。

meaning: 苦草（指某些苦味的植物，如柳穿魚）
sentences: Gallwort was believed to have medicinal properties for treating liver issues. 人們相信苦草具有治療肝臟問題的藥用價值。
The garden was overgrown with various wild plants, including gallwort. 花園裡長滿了各種野生植物，包括苦草。

meaning: 使驚恐；嚇唬（尤指捕鯨時使鯨魚受驚）
sentences: The sailors were careful not to gally the whales before they were in position. 水手們小心翼翼，以免在就位前嚇到鯨魚。
The sudden appearance of the shark seemed to gally the smaller fish. 鯊魚的突然出現似乎嚇到了那些較小的魚。
A tattered gallybagger stood guard in the middle of the turnip field. 一個破舊的稻草人守衛在蕪菁田中央。
Children on the island sometimes call scarecrows gallybaggers. 島上的孩子有時把稻草人稱為「gallybaggers」。

meaning: 稻草人；用以嚇人的鬼怪
sentences: The legend of the gallybeggar was used to keep children from wandering at night. 關於稻草人鬼怪的傳說被用來防止孩子們在晚上亂跑。
He dressed up as a gallybeggar for the local folklore festival. 他為了當地的民俗祭典打扮成稻草人鬼怪。
The gallycrow's hat blew off in the heavy storm. 稻草人的帽子在強烈的風暴中被吹走了。
Farmers often use a gallycrow to protect their newly sown seeds. 農夫經常使用稻草人來保護他們新播下的種子。

meaning: 伽羅瓦的（與數學家伽羅瓦或其理論有關）
sentences: The Galoisian approach revolutionized the study of polynomial equations. 伽羅瓦的方法徹底改變了多項式方程的研究。
He presented a paper on the Galoisian properties of field extensions. 他發表了一篇關於域擴張的伽羅瓦性質的論文。
Don't mind him; he's just a big, clumsy galoot with a kind heart. 別理他；他只是一個心地善良、高大笨拙的傻大個。
The silly galoot tripped over his own feet while trying to dance. 那個愚蠢的傻大個在試圖跳舞時被自己的腳絆倒了。
The energetic galop was the highlight of the evening's ball. 充滿活力的嘉洛舞是當晚舞會的高潮。
Composers often included a galop as a lively finale to their works. 作曲家經常將嘉洛舞曲作為其作品中輕快的終曲。
There were flowers galore in the garden during the spring. 春天時，花園裡有大量的花朵。
The party offered food and drinks galore for all the guests. 派對為所有賓客提供了豐富的食物和飲料。
He slipped on his galoshes before stepping out into the muddy street. 在踏上泥濘的街道之前，他穿上了他的膠鞋。
Galoshes are essential for keeping your feet dry during the rainy season. 在雨季，膠鞋對於保持雙腳乾燥至關重要。

meaning: 吞嚥；張口；大口喝（古語或方言）
sentences: The thirsty traveler would galp down the cold water. 口渴的旅行者會大口大口地喝下冷水。
He could only galp in surprise at the unexpected news. 面對突如其來的消息，他只能驚訝地張大了嘴巴。

meaning: 喧鬧；狂歡；四處遊蕩（蘇格蘭方言）
sentences: They loved to galravage around the countryside during their holidays. 他們喜歡在假期裡在鄉間四處狂歡遊蕩。
The noise of the youths galravaging through the streets woke the neighbors. 青少年在街上喧鬧狂歡的聲音吵醒了鄰居。

meaning: 喧鬧；狂歡；過放蕩的生活（蘇格蘭方言）
sentences: The brothers spent much of their inheritance galravitching in the city. 兄弟倆把大部分遺產都花在了城市的放蕩生活中。
It's time to stop galravitching and start taking your studies seriously. 是時候停止狂歡放蕩，開始認真對待你的學業了。
The wall was built using local galt. 這面牆是用當地的堅硬藍灰色粘土建造的。
Galt is commonly found in certain geological formations. 這種堅硬的粘土常見於某些地質構造中。
The Galtonia flowers are beautiful in the summer. 蓋氏百合在夏天開得很漂亮。
He planted some Galtonia in his garden for their elegant appearance. 他在花園裡種了一些蓋氏百合，因為它們外觀優雅。

meaning: 高爾頓的 (指弗朗西斯·高爾頓及其理論)
sentences: He studied Galtonian statistics in university. 他在大學裡研究了高爾頓統計學。
The Galtonian approach to heredity was groundbreaking in the 19th century. 19 世紀高爾頓對遺傳的研究方法是開創性的。

meaning: 鯊魚皮 (或魟魚皮) 皮革
sentences: The luxury box was covered in green galuchat. 這個奢侈品盒子包覆著綠色的鯊魚皮皮革。
Galuchat is known for its durability and unique texture. 鯊魚皮皮革以其耐用性和獨特的紋理而聞名。
The heavy beast galumphed through the dense forest. 那頭沉重的野獸在茂密的森林中笨重地行走。
Don't galumph around the house and wake the baby! 別在房子裡笨手笨腳地亂跳而吵醒了寶寶！
We had a galumptious feast last night to celebrate the victory. 我們昨晚享用了一頓絕妙的盛宴來慶祝勝利。
This chocolate cake is absolutely galumptious. 這個巧克力蛋糕絕對是美味極了。
Galusha A. Grow was a prominent speaker of the House. 蓋盧沙·A·格羅曾是一位著名的眾議院議長。
They named their son Galusha after a distant relative. 他們以一位遠親的名字為兒子取名為蓋盧沙。

meaning: 流亡, 流浪 (尤指猶太人的流亡)
sentences: The history of galuth is central to Jewish identity. 流亡的歷史對猶太人的認同至關重要。
He wrote a book about the experience of living in galuth. 他寫了一本關於在流亡中生活經歷的書。

meaning: 電流的, 伽伐尼的; 產生電擊般效果的
sentences: The galvanic current was measured by the sensitive device. 該設備測量了微弱的伽伐尼電流。
The news had a galvanic effect on the stock market. 這則消息對股市產生了如電擊般的震撼效果。
He conducted a series of galvanical experiments in the lab. 他在實驗室裡進行了一系列電流實驗。
The galvanical properties of the new alloy were analyzed. 分析了這種新合金的電流性質。

meaning: 騙子, 愛說大話的人
sentences: Don't listen to his stories; he's just a notorious gammoner. 別聽他的故事；他是個臭名昭著的騙子。
The old gammoner tried to sell us a fake antique map. 那個老騙子試圖賣給我們一張假的古代地圖。
The sailor carefully checked the gammoning on the bowsprit. 水手仔細檢查了首斜桅上的繫繩。
The gammoning must be strong enough to withstand heavy winds. 繫首斜桅的繩索必須強韌到足以抵禦強風。

meaning: (肢體) 有殘疾的, 跛的
sentences: He has a gammy leg from a childhood accident. 他因小時候的一場意外而腿部殘疾。
She walked with a slight limp due to her gammy knee. 由於膝蓋有傷，她走路時有些輕微地跛。
The gamobium stage is essential for maintaining genetic diversity. 有性世代階段對於維持遺傳多樣性至關重要。
In some organisms, the gamobium is the dominant life phase. 在某些生物中，有性世代是主要的生命階段。
The stem showed a gamodesmic structure under the microscope. 在顯微鏡下，莖部顯示出維管束癒合的結構。
Gamodesmic plants have vascular bundles fused together. 維管束癒合的植物具有融合在一起的維管束。
Gamodesmy is a characteristic feature in certain plant families. 維管束癒合是某些科植物的特徵。
The evolution of gamodesmy may provide better structural support for the plant. 維管束癒合的演化可能為植物提供了更好的結構支撐。
Gamogenesis involves the fusion of male and female reproductive cells. 有性生殖涉及雄性和雌性生殖細胞的融合。
Many complex species rely on gamogenesis for reproduction. 許多複雜物種依靠有性生殖來繁衍。
They studied the gamogenetic process in various marine life forms. 他們研究了各種海洋生物的有性生殖過程。
Gamogenetic reproduction ensures that offspring have genetic variability. 有性生殖確保了後代具有遺傳變異性。
The gamogenetical traits were carefully documented in the study. 研究中仔細地記錄了有性生殖的特徵。
Further research into gamogenetical development is currently ongoing. 關於有性生殖發育的進一步研究目前正在進行中。

meaning: (生物) 以有性生殖方式地
sentences: The organisms reproduce gamogenetically under favorable conditions in the wild. 這些生物在野外有利的條件下以有性生殖方式繁殖。
Populations that reproduce gamogenetically tend to adapt faster to changing environments. 以有性生殖方式繁殖的種群往往能更快地適應變遷的環境。
Gamogony is a key stage in the life cycle of many protozoa. 有性生殖是許多原生動物生命週期中的關鍵階段。
The process of gamogony involves the formation and fusion of gametes. 配子生殖過程涉及配子的形成和融合。
Gamolepis is a genus of flowering plants in the aster family. 金鱗菊屬是菊科中的一個開花植物屬。
Several species of Gamolepis are native to South Africa. 幾種金鱗菊屬植物原產於南非。
In rare cases, gamomania leads individuals to issue numerous marriage proposals. 在極少數情況下，求婚狂會導致個人提出無數次的求婚。
Psychologists sometimes study gamomania as a form of obsessive behavior. 心理學家有時將求婚狂視為一種強迫行為進行研究。
The gamont eventually divides to produce individual gametes. 配子母細胞最終分裂產生單個配子。
During its development, the parasite transforms into a gamont. 在發育過程中，寄生蟲會轉化為配子母細胞。
Gamopetalae is an older botanical classification for plants with joined petals. 合瓣花類是對於花瓣結合在一起的植物的一種較舊的植物學分類。
Many common garden flowers belong to the subclass Gamopetalae. 許多常見的園林花卉屬於合瓣花亞類。
The morning glory has a gamopetalous corolla, where all petals are fused. 牽牛花具有合瓣的花冠，所有花瓣都融合在一起。
Botanists use the term gamopetalous to describe flowers with united petals. 植物學家使用「合瓣的」一詞來描述花瓣結合的鮮花。
Gamophagia refers to the consumption of gametes by other cells. 食配子現象是指其他細胞對配子的攝取。
Researchers observed gamophagia in certain microbial cultures. 研究人員在某些微生物培養物中觀察到了食配子現象。
The study of gamophagy helps in understanding the survival strategies of some organisms. 對食配子性的研究有助於理解某些生物的生存策略。
Gamophagy can occur in various biological contexts. 食配子性可能發生在各種生物環境中。
A gamophyllous calyx has its sepals united into one piece. 合葉狀的萼片其萼片結合為一體。
The plant is characterized by its gamophyllous bracts. 該植物的特徵是具有合苞的苞片。
The gamori were a powerful landowning class in ancient Sicily. Gamori 是古代西西里島一個強大的地主階級。
Historical records describe the political influence of the gamori. 歷史記錄描述了 Gamori 階級的政治影響力。
Flowers with a gamosepalous calyx have sepals that are joined together. 具有合萼花萼的花，其萼片是結合在一起的。
The gamosepalous structure protects the flower bud more effectively. 合萼結構能更有效地保護花蕾。
A gamostele is formed when several steles in a stem fuse together. 當莖中的幾個中柱融合在一起時，就形成了合生中柱。
The researcher examined the cross-section for a gamostele structure. 研究人員檢查了橫截面以尋找合生中柱結構。
Some ancient fern species exhibit a gamostelic vascular arrangement. 一些古代蕨類植物表現出合生中柱的維管束排列。
The gamostelic nature of the plant was a focus of the anatomical study. 該植物的合生中柱特性是解剖學研究的焦點。
Gamostely is a rare condition in modern vascular plants. 合生中柱式在現代維管植物中是一種罕見的情況。
Evolutionary biologists study gamostely to understand plant diversification. 進化生物學家研究合生中柱式以了解植物的多樣化。
The cells exhibited gamotropic movement toward each other. 細胞表現出互相靠近的趨對運動。
Gamotropic signals play a vital role in the fertilization process. 趨對訊號在受精過程中起著至關重要的作用。
Gamotropism is the tendency of gametes to move toward one another. 趨配偶性是配子互相靠近的傾向。
Chemical attractants are often responsible for gamotropism in fungi. 化學引誘劑通常是真菌趨配偶性的原因。

meaning: 大雨傘（英式英語，非正式）
sentences: He carried a large, black gamp to shield himself from the downpour. 他撐著一把黑色大雨傘以遮擋大雨。
The character in the novel was never seen without her trusty gamp. 小說中的角色總是帶著她那把可靠的大雨傘。
Don't be such a gamphrel and pay attention to what you're doing. 別像個傻瓜一樣，注意你正在做的事。
The old man laughed at the young lad's gamphrel behavior. 老人嘲笑那個年輕伙子的愚蠢行為。
Her performance ran the gamut of emotions, from joy to despair. 她的表演涵蓋了從喜悅到絕望的所有情感範圍。
The new smartphone offers a wide gamut of features for professional users. 這款新智慧型手機為專業用戶提供了廣泛的功能範圍。
The venison had a distinct, gamy flavor that some found too strong. 鹿肉有一種獨特的野味味，有些人覺得太重了。
The small team gave a gamy performance against their much larger opponents. 這支小隊伍在面對強大對手時表現得非常有勇氣。

meaning: 開始（gin 的古語過去式）
sentences: The sun gan to rise over the hills. 太陽開始在山丘上升起。
He gan his journey at the break of dawn. 他在黎明時分開始了他的旅程。
The scholar explained the concept of ganam in ancient texts. 學者解釋了古代文獻中 ganam 的概念。
A ganam represents a collection of similar entities. ganam 代表了一組相似實體的集合。
The lawyer discussed the distribution of ganancial property. 律師討論了夫妻共有財產的分配。
Ganancial rights are protected under certain legal systems. 在某些法律體系下，夫妻共有權受到保護。

meaning: 迦那帕提（印度教象頭神的別名）
sentences: Devotees offered prayers to Ganapati for good luck. 信徒們向迦那帕提祈求好運。
The festival of Ganapati is celebrated with great joy. 迦那帕提節以極大的喜悅慶祝。

meaning: （古代）鉤刑；將人跌落於鉤上處死
sentences: The prisoner was sentenced to be ganched. 囚犯被判處鉤刑。
Historical accounts describe the brutal practice of ganching. 歷史記載描述了鉤刑這種殘酷的行徑。

meaning: 甘達人（烏干達的一支民族）；甘達語
sentences: The Ganda people have a rich cultural heritage. 甘達人擁有豐富的文化遺產。
He is learning to speak the Ganda language. 他正在學習說甘達語。
The ganderess led her goslings to the pond. 雌鵝帶著牠的小鵝走向池塘。
A gander and a ganderess were swimming together. 一隻公鵝和一隻雌鵝正在一起游泳。
The field was dotted with the purple flowers of the gandergoose. 田野裡點綴著早春紅蘭的紫色花朵。
Stop acting like a gandergoose and pay attention. 別再像個傻瓜一樣，專心一點。

meaning: 在妻子待產期間風流的丈夫
sentences: The old village gossip labeled him a gandermooner. 村子裡的老長舌婦標籤他為一個在妻子待產期風流的丈夫。
The term gandermooner is rarely used in modern English. gandermooner 這個詞在現代英語中很少使用。
He was often teased for his ganderteeth as a child. 他小時候常因為他那大且突出的牙齒而被取笑。
Orthodontics can help correct ganderteeth. 牙齒矯正可以幫助改善突出的牙齒。

meaning: 犍陀羅（古國名，位於現今阿富汗及巴基斯坦境內）
sentences: The Gandhara art style shows Greek influence. 犍陀羅藝術風格顯示了希臘的影響。
Gandhara was a major center of Buddhism in ancient times. 犍陀羅在古代是佛教的主要中心。

meaning: 乾闥婆（印度教中的天界音樂家）
sentences: In mythology, a Gandharva is a celestial musician. 在神話中，乾闥婆是一位天界的音樂家。
The music was so beautiful it seemed to be played by a Gandharva. 音樂如此優美，彷彿是由乾闥婆演奏的。
Gandhiism emphasizes non-violence and truth. 甘地主義強調非暴力和真理。
The principles of Gandhiism influenced many civil rights leaders. 甘地主義的原則影響了許多民權領袖。
His political philosophy was rooted in Gandhism. 他的政治哲學根植於甘地主義。
Gandhism remains relevant in today's world of conflict. 在當今充滿衝突的世界中，甘地主義依然具有現實意義。
As a committed Gandhist, he practiced passive resistance. 作為一名堅定的甘地主義者，他實行消極抵抗。
The Gandhist approach to social change is based on love. 處理社會變革的甘地主義方法是基於愛的。
The gandul is a staple food in many tropical regions. 木豆是許多熱帶地區的主食。
She cooked a delicious soup with gandul and rice. 她用木豆和米飯煮了一份美味的湯。
Gandum is the local word for wheat in that region. Gandum 是該地區對小麥的當地稱呼。
The farmer harvested a large crop of gandum. 農民收穫了大量的小麥。

meaning: 甘杜拉（中東及北非地區的一種傳統長袍）
sentences: He wore a white gandurah to the formal event. 他穿著一件白色的甘杜拉參加正式活動。
The gandurah is designed for comfort in hot climates. 甘杜拉的設計旨在熱帶氣候中提供舒適感。

meaning: 去（go 的古語過去分詞，即 gone）
sentences: The days of our youth are gane forever. 我們青春的日子已永遠逝去。
He had gane to the city before the news arrived. 在消息傳到之前，他已經去了城市。

meaning: 小偷；無賴（源自意第緒語）
sentences: The old ganef tried to cheat him out of his money. 那個老無賴試圖騙走他的錢。
Watch out for that ganef; he's not to be trusted. 小心那個小偷，他不值得信任。

meaning: 恆河 (印度最神聖的河流)
sentences: The Ganga is considered sacred by millions of people in India. 恆河被印度數百萬人視為神聖之水。
Hindus often perform rituals along the banks of the Ganga. 印度教徒經常在恆河岸邊舉行儀式。

meaning: 沙雞 (一種生活在乾旱地區的鳥類)
sentences: The ganga is known for its ability to fly long distances to find water. 沙雞以能長途飛行尋找水源而聞名。
We observed several gangas in the desert landscape. 我們在沙漠景觀中觀察到了幾隻沙雞。

meaning: 舌羊齒屬 (已滅絕的種子蕨類植物)
sentences: Gangamopteris fossils are found in Permian rocks of Gondwana. 舌羊齒屬的化石發現於岡瓦納大陸的二疊紀地層中。
The leaves of Gangamopteris lack a central midrib. 舌羊齒屬的葉子缺乏中央中脈。

meaning: 一種西非鼓 (西非傳統的「說話鼓」)
sentences: The musician played the gangan to mimic the tones of human speech. 音樂家演奏西非鼓來模仿人類說話的音調。
The gangan is an essential instrument in Yoruba music. 西非鼓是約魯巴音樂中必不可少的樂器。

meaning: 一種海綿捕撈小船或拖網
sentences: The traditional gangava was used by sponge divers in the Mediterranean. 傳統的海綿捕撈船曾被地中海的海綿潛水員使用。
Fishermen deployed a gangava to collect sponges from the seabed. 漁民使用海綿拖網從海床採集海綿。

meaning: 跳板 (連接船隻與岸邊的木板)
sentences: The sailors lowered the gangboard so the passengers could disembark. 水手們放下跳板，讓乘客可以下船。
Be careful when walking across the narrow gangboard. 走過狹窄的跳板時要小心。
The movie depicts the violent reality of 1920s gangdom. 這部電影描繪了 1920 年代黑社會暴力現實。
He was drawn into the dark world of gangdom at a young age. 他年輕時就被捲入了黑社會的黑暗世界。
The weary traveler began his long gange across the hills. 疲憊的旅人開始了他穿越山丘的漫長旅程。
They were prepared to gange many miles before dawn. 他們準備在黎明前行走多英里。

meaning: 領班；工頭 (一組勞工的負責人)
sentences: The ganger directed the railway workers as they laid the tracks. 領班指導鐵路工人們鋪設軌道。
He worked hard and was eventually promoted to ganger. 他努力工作，最終被晉升為工頭。
The Gangetic plain is one of the most fertile regions in India. 恆河平原是印度最肥沃的地區之一。
Many Gangetic dolphins are found in the lower reaches of the river. 許多恆河豚生活在該河的下游。

meaning: 紅冠鳳頭鸚鵡 (澳洲特有的一種鸚鵡)
sentences: The male ganggang cockatoo has a distinctive bright red crest. 公的紅冠鳳頭鸚鵡擁有獨特的亮紅色冠羽。
We heard the raspy call of a ganggang in the forest. 我們在森林中聽到了紅冠鳳頭鸚鵡嘶啞的叫聲。
The ganging of local youths caused concern in the neighborhood. 當地青少年的結夥行為引起了鄰里的擔憂。
A ganging group of protesters gathered outside the city hall. 一群成群結隊的抗議者聚集在市政廳外。
The city struggled to combat the rise of political gangism. 這座城市努力應對政治幫派主義的抬頭。
Gangism can lead to increased crime rates in urban areas. 幫派主義可能導致城市地區犯罪率上升。
The journalist reported on the internal struggles within gangland. 記者報導了黑社會內部的鬥爭。
He was a notorious figure in the city's gangland. 他是該市黑社會中一名臭名昭著的人物。
The police arrested a prominent ganglander in a morning raid. 警方在晨間突襲中逮捕了一名著名的黑社會成員。
He spent his life as a ganglander before trying to reform. 他在嘗試改過自新之前，一輩子都是黑社會成員。
The peripheral nervous system contains numerous ganglia. 周圍神經系統包含許多神經節。
Sensory ganglia are located along the spinal nerves. 感覺神經節位於脊神經沿線。
The researcher studied the gangliac structures of the insect. 研究人員研究了昆蟲的神經節結構。
Gangliac cells play a role in transmitting nerve impulses. 神經節細胞在傳遞神經衝動中起作用。
Ganglial inflammation can lead to severe pain. 神經節發炎可能導致劇烈疼痛。
The surgeon identified the ganglial mass during the operation. 手術中，外科醫生辨識出了神經節腫塊。
The gangliar network coordinates the organism's movements. 神經節網絡協調生物體的運動。
They observed gangliar degeneration in the lab animals. 他們在實驗動物中觀察到了神經節退化。

meaning: 神經節衰弱 (一種神經系統衰竭或虛弱的舊稱)
sentences: The patient was diagnosed with gangliasthenia due to chronic stress. 病人因慢性壓力被診斷為神經節衰弱。
Historical medical texts describe gangliasthenia as a form of nervous exhaustion. 歷史醫學文獻將神經節衰弱描述為一種神經衰竭形式。
The gangliate nerve structure is complex in this species. 該物種有神經節的神經結構非常複雜。
Researchers studied the gangliate organization of the invertebrate. 研究人員研究了該無脊椎動物的有神經節組織。
The gangliated cord is a key part of the sympathetic nervous system. 有神經節的神經索是交感神經系統的關鍵部分。
Some organisms possess a highly gangliated nervous system. 某些生物擁有高度具神經節的神經系統。
The patient underwent a gangliectomy to relieve chronic pain. 患者接受了神經節切除術以緩解慢性疼痛。
A gangliectomy is sometimes necessary for treating certain neurological disorders. 神經節切除術有時對於治療某些神經系統疾病是必要的。
The nerve showed a gangliform swelling near the joint. 該神經在關節附近呈現神經節狀腫脹。
Scientists observed a gangliform structure in the dissected specimen. 科學家在解剖標本中觀察到神經節狀結構。
Gangliitis can cause significant discomfort and neurological symptoms. 神經節炎可能引起明顯不適和神經系統症狀。
The doctor diagnosed the condition as gangliitis after a series of tests. 醫生在經過一系列檢查後將病情診斷為神經節炎。

meaning: 瘦長笨拙的；手腳長得不相稱的
sentences: He was a gangling teenager who hadn't quite grown into his height. 他是個瘦長笨拙的少年，還沒完全適應自己的身高。
The gangling youth moved with an awkward grace. 那位瘦長的青年動作中帶著一種笨拙的優雅。
The ganglioblast eventually differentiates into mature ganglion cells. 神經節母細胞最終分化為成熟的神經節細胞。
Embryological studies focus on the migration of the ganglioblast. 胚胎學研究專注於神經節母細胞的遷移。
A gangliocyte is a type of nerve cell body found within a ganglion. 神經節細胞是存在於神經節內的一種神經細胞體。
The density of gangliocytes was measured in the histological sample. 組織學樣本中測量了神經節細胞的密度。
The tissue exhibited a ganglioform appearance under the microscope. 組織在顯微鏡下呈現出神經節狀的外觀。
A ganglioform enlargement was noted along the nerve fiber. 沿著神經纖維發現了神經節狀的增大。
The structure was described as ganglioid due to its resemblance to a nerve ganglion. 由於該結構與神經節相似，被描述為類神經節的。
Doctors identified a ganglioid mass during the physical examination. 醫生在體檢過程中發現了一個類神經節的腫塊。
A ganglioma is a rare tumor that arises from ganglion cells. 神經節瘤是一種源自神經節細胞的罕見腫瘤。
The MRI scan revealed a small ganglioma near the spinal cord. 核磁共振掃描顯示脊髓附近有一個小的神經節瘤。
A ganglion is a cluster of nerve cell bodies in the peripheral nervous system. 神經節是周圍神經系統中的神經細胞體群。
She had a painful ganglion on her wrist that required medical attention. 她的手腕上有一個疼痛的腱鞘囊腫，需要醫療處理。
The ganglionary layer of the retina is crucial for vision. 視網膜的神經節層對視覺至關重要。
He studied the ganglionary connections in the brain. 他研究了腦部的神經節連接。
The ganglionate nerve trunk was examined for abnormalities. 檢查了有神經節的神經幹是否有異常。
Many mollusks have a ganglionate nervous system. 許多軟體動物都有有神經節的神經系統。
Ganglionectomy is a surgical procedure to remove a ganglion. 神經節切除術是切除神經節的手術。
The surgeon performed a ganglionectomy to treat the patient's condition. 外科醫生進行了神經節切除術以治療患者的病情。
The ganglioneural pathways were mapped in the research project. 研究項目中繪製了神經節神經的通路圖。
Scientists are investigating ganglioneural communication in insects. 科學家正在研究昆蟲體內的神經節神經通訊。
Each ganglioneure plays a specific role in transmitting nerve impulses. 每個神經節細胞在傳遞神經衝動中都發揮著特定的作用。
The morphology of the ganglioneure was analyzed using advanced imaging. 使用先進的影像技術分析了神經節細胞的形態。
A ganglioneuroma is typically a benign and slow-growing tumor. 神經節神經瘤通常是一種良性且生長緩慢的腫瘤。
Most patients with a ganglioneuroma do not experience any symptoms. 大多數患有神經節神經瘤的患者不會出現任何症狀。
The ganglioneuron receives signals from various parts of the body. 神經節神經元接收來自體內各部位的信號。
Researchers are studying the survival of ganglioneurons under stress. 研究人員正在研究壓力下神經節神經元的存活情況。
Autonomic nerves are categorized into preganglionic and postganglionic fibers. 自律神經被分為節前纖維和節後纖維。
Ganglionic blocking agents are used to control blood pressure. 神經節阻斷劑用於控制血壓。
The patient was diagnosed with ganglionitis after experiencing localized pain. 病人在感到局部疼痛後被診斷出患有神經節炎。
Ganglionitis can be caused by viral infections or autoimmune responses. 神經節炎可能由病毒感染或自身免疫反應引起。
The researcher identified a ganglionless segment in the nervous system. 研究人員在神經系統中發現了一個無神經節的片段。
Some simple organisms have ganglionless structures that perform basic functions. 一些簡單的生物具有執行基本功能的無神經節結構。
The ganglioplexus coordinates signals between different nerve centers. 神經節叢協調不同神經中心之間的信號。
A complex ganglioplexus was observed during the anatomical study. 在解剖研究中觀察到一個複雜的神經節叢。
He was a gangly teenager who hadn't quite grown into his long limbs. 他是一個身材高瘦笨拙的青少年，四肢還沒完全發育協調。
The gangly dog tripped over its own feet while running. 那隻高瘦的狗在跑步時被自己的腳絆倒了。

meaning: (鐵路或礦山) 一組工人的成員
sentences: The gangman worked tirelessly to repair the damaged tracks. 那位鐵路工人不辭辛勞地修理受損的軌道。
Each gangman in the crew has a specific task to perform. 每位小組工人在團隊中都有特定的任務要執行。
The gangmaster was responsible for recruiting seasonal farm workers. 勞工承包商負責招募季節性的農場工人。
Authorities are monitoring the practices of the gangmaster to ensure fair treatment. 當局正監控該勞工承包商的行為以確保公平待遇。
Passengers walked across the gangplank to board the cruise ship. 乘客們走過舷梯登上郵輪。
Make sure the gangplank is secure before anyone tries to cross it. 在任何人試圖跨過之前，確保跳板是穩固的。
The old gangrel wandered from town to town looking for work. 那個老流浪者在城鎮之間徘徊尋找工作。
He lived the life of a gangrel, sleeping under the stars. 他過著流浪者的生活，睡在星空下。
The wound became gangrenescent due to lack of proper treatment. 由於缺乏適當治療，傷口開始趨於壞疽。
Doctors monitored the gangrenescent tissue closely for signs of spread. 醫生密切監測壞疽組織是否有擴散跡象。
The surgeon had to remove the gangrenous limb to save the patient's life. 外科醫生不得不切除壞疽的肢體以挽救病人的生命。
