Gangrenous infections can be life-threatening if not treated immediately. 如果不立即治療，壞疽感染可能會危及生命。
The gangsman directed the crew as they laid the new foundation. 領班在團隊鋪設新地基時進行指揮。
As a gangsman, he is in charge of safety on the construction site. 作為一名領班，他負責建築工地的安全。
The city is struggling to combat the rise of gangsterism. 這座城市正努力對抗幫派行為的興起。
His involvement in gangsterism led to several years in prison. 他參與歹徒活動導致被判入獄幾年。
Historically, people held processions during gangtide to bless the crops. 歷史上，人們在羅加蒂節週舉行遊行以祈求農作物豐收。
Gangtide is an old name for the week of Rogation. Gangtide 是羅加蒂週的一個舊稱。
The gangue is separated from the valuable ore during the refining process. 在精煉過程中，脈石與有價值的礦石分離。
Miners often have to process large amounts of gangue to get a small amount of gold. 礦工通常必須處理大量的脈石才能獲得少量的黃金。
The Ganguela people have a rich cultural heritage in Angola. 剛格拉人在安哥拉擁有豐富的文化遺產。
Scholars are studying the traditional music and dance of the Ganguela. 學者們正在研究剛格拉人的傳統音樂和舞蹈。
Please keep the gangway clear for other passengers. 請保持通道暢通，以便其他乘客通行。
The sailor stood at the gangway to greet the visitors. 水手站在船的出入口迎接訪客。
The gangwayman checked the identification of everyone boarding the ship. 梯口守衛檢查了每一位登船人員的身分證件。
The role of a gangwayman is crucial for maintaining security on the dock. 梯口守衛的角色對於維持碼頭安全至關重要。
Ganister is used to line the inside of high-temperature furnaces. 硅質耐火岩被用來襯墊高溫爐的內部。
The geologist identified a layer of ganister in the rock formation. 地質學家在岩層中發現了一層硅質耐火岩。
The possession of ganja is illegal in many countries. 在許多國家，持有大麻是非法的。
He was arrested for attempting to smuggle ganja across the border. 他因企圖跨境走私大麻而被捕。
The old ganner led the flock of geese across the field. 那隻老雄鵝帶領鵝群穿過田野。
In local dialect, a male goose is sometimes called a ganner. 在當地語中，雄鵝有時被稱為 ganner。
The gannet dived into the ocean to catch a fish. 鰹鳥衝入海中捕魚。
Gannets are large seabirds with white plumage and black-tipped wings. 鰹鳥是大型海鳥，擁有白色羽毛和黑尖翅膀。
Ganocephala is an extinct group of primitive amphibians. 頦頭類是一群已滅絕的原始兩棲動物。
Fossil records of Ganocephala provide insight into early tetrapod evolution. 頦頭類的化石記錄為早期四足動物的演化提供了見解。
The ganocephalan fossils were found in the Carboniferous strata. 頦頭類動物的化石被發現於石炭紀地層中。
He studied the ganocephalan skull structure. 他研究了頦頭類動物的頭骨結構。
The ganocephalous amphibians had armored heads. 頦頭類兩棲動物擁有裝甲般的頭部。
They analyzed the ganocephalous traits in the specimen. 他們分析了標本中的頦頭類特徵。
The ganodont mammals lived during the Eocene epoch. 硬齒類哺乳動物生活在始新世時期。
Ganodont teeth are characterized by their thick enamel. 硬齒類動物牙齒的特點是其厚實的琺瑯質。
Ganodonta is an extinct order of mammals from North America. 硬齒目是來自北美洲的一群已滅絕哺乳動物。
The classification of Ganodonta has been debated by paleontologists. 硬齒目的分類一直受到古生物學家的爭論。
Ganodus is a genus of extinct cartilaginous fish. 硬齒魚屬是一個已滅絕的軟骨魚屬。
Specimens of Ganodus are often found in Jurassic deposits. 硬齒魚屬的標本常被發現於侏羅紀沉積物中。
The sturgeon is a well-known example of a ganoid fish. 鱘魚是硬鱗魚的一個著名例子。
Ganoid scales are diamond-shaped and very hard. 硬鱗是菱形的，非常堅硬。
The ganoidal scales provided protection for the fish. 硬鱗為魚類提供了保護。
Some primitive fishes have ganoidal coverage. 一些原始魚類擁有硬鱗覆蓋。
Ganoidean fishes were once very common in ancient oceans. 硬鱗魚曾在古代海洋中非常普遍。
He studied the ganoidean lineage in his ichthyology course. 他在魚類學課程中研究了硬鱗魚血統。
Ganoidei is a traditional grouping of bony fishes. 硬鱗總目是硬骨魚的一個傳統分類群。
The relevance of Ganoidei as a scientific category has changed over time. 硬鱗總目作為一個科學類別的相關性隨著時間而改變。
The ganoidian structure is unique to certain fish groups. 硬鱗魚結構對某些魚群來說是獨特的。
He examined the ganoidian traits of the fossil. 他檢查了化石的硬鱗魚特徵。
Ganoin is a glassy, enamel-like substance covering some fish scales. 硬鱗質是一種覆蓋在某些魚鱗上的玻璃狀、像琺瑯質的物質。
The composition of ganoin is similar to teeth enamel. 硬鱗質的成分與牙齒琺瑯質相似。
Ganomalite is a rare lead-barium silicate mineral. 矽鉛鋇礦是一種罕見的鉛鋇矽酸鹽礦物。
The crystals of ganomalite are usually colorless or white. 矽鉛鋇礦的晶體通常是無色或白色的。
Ganophyllite is a complex manganese silicate mineral. 粒葉石是一種複雜的錳矽酸鹽礦物。
Geologists identified ganophyllite in the metamorphic rock. 地質學家在變質岩中鑑定出了粒葉石。
Ganosis was a process used in ancient Greece to dull the shine of marble. 塗蠟法是古希臘用來降低大理石光澤的一種工藝。
The sculptor applied ganosis to give the statue a more natural appearance. 雕塑家應用了塗蠟法使雕像看起來更自然。
The Ganowanian system of relationship was described by Lewis Henry Morgan. 蓋諾瓦尼亞的親屬系統是由劉易斯·亨利·摩根描述的。
He studied Ganowanian kinship terms in North American Indian tribes. 他研究了北美印第安部落中的蓋諾瓦尼亞親屬術語。
The word gansel is sometimes used as a variant of gansey. gansel 這個字有時被用作 gansey 的變體。
He wore a thick gansel to stay warm. 他穿著一件厚實的針織套衫來保暖。
The fisherman wore a warm gansey to protect himself from the cold wind. 漁夫穿著溫暖的針織套衫以防冷風。
Traditional gansey patterns were often unique to specific fishing villages. 傳統針織套衫的圖案通常是特定漁村所獨有的。
He put on his gansy before heading out to the boat. 他在出海前穿上了他的針織套衫。
The word gansy is a common variation of gansey. gansy 這個字是 gansey 的常見變體。

meaning: 呵欠（蘇格蘭方言）；瘦削的（同 gaunt）
sentences: He couldn't help but gant during the long lecture. 他在長篇講座中禁不住打了個呵欠。
His face looked gant and tired after days of travel. 經過幾天的旅行，他的臉顯得瘦削而疲憊。

meaning: 甘達（菲律賓傳統容量單位，約等於3公升）
sentences: The merchant measured out a ganta of rice for the customer. 商人為顧客量出了一甘達的米。
Historically, the ganta was a common unit of measure in Philippine markets. 從歷史上看，甘達是菲律賓市場上常見的計量單位。

meaning: 甘當（東南亞容量單位，約等於4.5公升）
sentences: A gantang of oil was traded at the local market. 當地市場交易了一甘當的油。
The weight of a gantang can vary depending on the commodity being measured. 一甘當的重量可能因所測量的商品而異。

meaning: （鐵路）套軌；（懲罰用的）兩排夾道
sentences: The train passed through the gantlet track near the construction site. 火車經過了施工現場附近的套軌。
He had to run the gantlet of angry protesters to reach the building. 他必須穿過憤怒的抗議者排成的夾道才能到達大樓。

meaning: （航海）吊繩，用於起吊器材或人員的繩索
sentences: The sailor used a gantline to hoist the equipment onto the mast. 水手使用吊繩將設備吊上桅杆。
Ensure the gantline is securely fastened before attempting to lift the cargo. 在嘗試吊起貨物之前，請確保吊繩已牢固系好。
Ganton is an alternative spelling for the gantang unit used in Southeast Asia. Ganton 是東南亞使用的甘當單位的另一種拼法。
Old records occasionally use the term ganton for grain measurements. 舊記錄中偶爾使用 ganton 一詞來衡量穀物。

meaning: 龍門架；起重機架（gantry 的複數）
sentences: Multiple gantries were installed over the highway to support the electronic signs. 公路上安裝了多個龍門架以支撐電子標誌。
The shipyard features several massive gantries for moving heavy ship components. 船廠擁有幾個巨大的龍門架，用於移動沉重的船舶部件。

meaning: 龍門架；起重機架；（火箭）發射台架
sentences: The rocket stood tall next to the massive gantry before launch. 火箭發射前，高高地立在巨大的發射台架旁。
An overhead gantry is used to move containers in the port. 龍門起重機用於在港口移動集裝箱。
The gantryman carefully moved the heavy container from the ship to the truck. 龍門架操作員小心地將沉重的集裝箱從船上移到卡車上。
A skilled gantryman is essential for the efficient operation of the container terminal. 一位熟練的龍門架操作員對於集裝箱碼頭的高效運作至關重要。

meaning: 小鵝（意第緒語，gans 的指小詞）
sentences: The word gantsl is a rare term referring to a small goose in some dialects. gantsl 是一個罕見的詞，在某些方言中指小鵝。
Scholars of Yiddish may encounter the term gantsl in older literature. 意第緒語學者可能會在舊文學作品中遇到 gantsl 一詞。

meaning: 蓋尼米德（希臘神話中的美少年）；木衛三（木星最大的衛星）
sentences: Ganymede is the largest moon of Jupiter and the solar system. 木衛三是木星及太陽系中最大的衛星。
In Greek mythology, Ganymede was chosen to be the cupbearer of the gods. 在希臘神話中，蓋尼米德被選為眾神的侍酒者。

meaning: 蓋尼米德（Ganymede 的另一種拼法）
sentences: Ganymedes was a beautiful Trojan prince in Greek mythology. 在希臘神話中，蓋尼米德是一位美麗的特洛伊王子。
The constellation Aquarius is sometimes identified with Ganymedes. 水瓶座有時被認為與蓋尼米德有關。

meaning: 甘薩（巴西打擊樂器，一種金屬沙錘）
sentences: The musician played the ganza to maintain the rhythm of the samba. 音樂家演奏甘薩以保持森巴舞的節奏。
A ganza consists of a metal cylinder filled with beads or pebbles. 甘薩由一個裝滿珠子或鵝卵石的金屬圓筒組成。

meaning: 毛衣（蘇格蘭方言，guernsey 的變體）
sentences: He wore a thick ganzie to stay warm in the cold Scottish wind. 他穿著一件厚毛衣以在寒冷的蘇格蘭風中保暖。
The traditional blue ganzie was a common garment for fishermen. 傳統的藍色毛衣是漁民常用的服裝。
The thief was sentenced to six months in gaol. 小偷被判處六個月監禁。
Conditions in the old Victorian gaol were notoriously harsh. 舊維多利亞時代監獄的條件非常惡劣。

meaning: 囚犯；慣犯（英式拼法，同 jailbird）
sentences: He was known as a gaolbird who had spent most of his life behind bars. 他被公認為是一個慣犯，一生大部分時間都在監牢度過。
The old gaolbird knew exactly how to navigate the prison system. 那個老慣犯完全知道如何應對監獄系統。

meaning: 獄卒；監獄看守（英式拼法，同 jailer）
sentences: The gaoler kept a close watch on the prisoners at night. 獄卒在晚上嚴密監視著囚犯。
The prisoner begged the gaoler for a small favor. 囚犯乞求獄卒幫個小忙。

meaning: 高昂（猶太法典科學院的首長職稱）；天才
sentences: The Gaon of Vilna was a famous Jewish scholar. 維爾納高昂是一位著名的猶太學者。
He was recognized as a Gaon for his extraordinary mathematical abilities. 他因其非凡的數學才能而被公認為天才。

meaning: 高昂的職位、任期或體制
sentences: The period of the Gaonate was a significant era in Jewish history. 高昂體制時期是猶太歷史上一個重要的時代。
The influence of the Gaonate spread throughout the Jewish world. 高昂體制的影響力傳遍了整個猶太世界。
Many important legal rulings were made during the Gaonic period. 許多重要的法律裁決是在高昂時期做出的。
The Gaonic literature provides deep insights into medieval Jewish life. 高昂時期的文學作品為中世紀猶太人的生活提供了深刻見解。
The dog was covered in garapatas after walking through the tall grass. 這隻狗在走過高草叢後，身上爬滿了蜱。
Garapata is a common term for ticks in certain regions. 在某些地區，Garapata 是蜱的常用稱呼。

meaning: 敬重、尊敬 (尤指在佛教語境中)
sentences: Garava is considered an important quality for a student of the Dhamma. 敬重被認為是佛法學習者的一項重要品質。
He showed great garava towards his teachers. 他對他的老師們表現出極大的尊敬。
Garavance is an old English name for the chickpea. Garavance 是鷹嘴豆的古英語名稱。
He bought a sack of garavances at the local market. 他在當地市場買了一袋鷹嘴豆。

meaning: 蘇丹草 (一種高粱屬植物)
sentences: Garawi is often grown as a forage crop for livestock. 蘇丹草常被種植作為牲畜的飼料作物。
The farmer planted garawi in the field during the rainy season. 農夫在雨季期間在田裡種植了蘇丹草。

meaning: 華達呢、軋別丁 (一種耐用的斜紋織物)
sentences: The trench coat was made of high-quality garbardine. 這件風衣是由高品質的華達呢製成的。
Garbardine is known for its durability and water-resistant properties. 華達呢以其耐用和防水性能而聞名。

meaning: 篩選、清理 (古語，指去除雜質)
sentences: Historically, merchants would garbel their spices before selling them. 歷史上，商人在出售香料之前會對其進行篩選清理。
To garbel meant to sift out the refuse from the good material. 篩選的意思是從好的材料中濾掉廢物。
The old records describe how they used to garbell the grain. 舊記錄描述了他們過去如何篩選穀物。
They had to garbell the mixture to ensure its purity. 他們必須篩選混合物以確保其純度。
He was assigned to garbill the collected herbs. 他被指派去篩選收集到的草藥。
The process of garbill required patience and precision. 篩選過程需要耐心和精確。

meaning: 斷章取義、曲解、竄改 (訊息或文字)
sentences: The bad telephone connection garbled his message. 糟糕的電話連接使他的訊息變得模糊不清。
You shouldn't garble the facts to suit your argument. 你不應該為了迎合你的論點而竄改事實。
The unencrypted data is easily garbleable during transmission. 未加密的數據在傳輸過程中很容易被竄改。
Some complex philosophical texts are highly garbleable by amateur translators. 一些複雜的哲學文本很容易被業餘翻譯者曲解。

meaning: 斷章取義者、竄改者、篩選者 (歷史意義)
sentences: The critic was accused of being a garbler of the author's true intentions. 該評論家被指責為作者真實意圖的斷章取義者。
In medieval London, a garbler was an official who inspected spices. 在中世紀的倫敦，篩選員是檢查香料的官員。

meaning: 無竄改的、清晰且未被曲解的
sentences: The report provided a garbless account of the event. 該報告對事件進行了清晰且無曲解的描述。
We need a garbless transmission of the signal for accurate results. 我們需要信號的無失真傳輸以獲得準確的結果。

meaning: 斷章取義、歪曲、竄改 (行為)
sentences: The garbling of the witness's statement led to a misunderstanding. 對證人陳述的歪曲導致了誤解。
Excessive garbling of data can make it useless for analysis. 數據的過度竄改會使其無法用於分析。

meaning: 龍骨翼板、船底板 (緊靠龍骨的第一列板)
sentences: The shipwright inspected the garboard for any signs of rot. 造船工檢查了龍骨翼板是否有任何腐爛跡象。
The garboard strake is the most important part of the ship's bottom. 龍骨翼板是船底最重要的部分。
The sudden news threw the entire city into a garboil. 突然的消息使整個城市陷於混亂。
Shakespeare used the word 'garboil' to describe a state of tumult. 莎士比亞曾使用 'garboil' 一詞來描述騷亂的狀態。

meaning: 捲心菜濃湯 (一種傳統的法國濃湯)
sentences: We enjoyed a warm bowl of garbure on a cold winter evening. 在寒冷的冬日夜晚，我們享用了一碗溫暖的捲心菜濃湯。
Garbure is a hearty soup typical of Southwestern France. 捲心菜濃湯是法國西南部典型的豐盛湯品。
The word 'garce' was once an archaic term for a young woman. 'Garce' 曾是年輕女性的古稱。
In old texts, you might find a reference to a garce working in the kitchen. 在古文中，你可能會發現提到在廚房工作的少女。

meaning: 藤黃屬 (一種常綠喬木或灌木，包括山竹)
sentences: Garcinia mangostana is the scientific name for the purple mangosteen. 山竹的學名是 Garcinia mangostana。
Some species of Garcinia are used in traditional medicine. 某些藤黃屬植物被用於傳統醫學。

meaning: (紋章學中動物) 轉頭向前的、正面的
sentences: The coat of arms features a lion gardant. 該紋章的特徵是一隻轉頭向前的獅子。
In heraldry, a beast gardant is looking toward the spectator. 在紋章學中，正面像的獸類正看著觀眾。

meaning: 監護人、保護者 (guardian 的古語或方言變體)
sentences: He acted as the boy's gardeen after his parents passed away. 在男孩的父母去世後，他擔任了男孩的監護人。
The old document mentioned a legal gardeen for the estate. 舊文件提到了該遺產的法定監護人。
The soil in the backyard is very fertile and highly gardenable. 後院的土壤非常肥沃，非常適合開闢為花園。
They looked for a house with a gardenable plot of land. 他們在尋找一間帶有一塊適於造園的土地的房子。
She demonstrated impressive gardencraft in her backyard transformation. 她在後院改造中展示了令人印象深刻的園藝技術。
Ancient gardencraft often combined aesthetics with herbal medicine. 古代的園藝技術常將美學與草藥醫學相結合。

meaning: 有花園的；已開墾為花園的
sentences: The well-gardened estate attracted many visitors. 這座開墾良好的花園莊園吸引了許多訪客。
After hours of work, the messy plot finally looked gardened. 經過數小時的勞作，這塊雜亂的土地終於看起來像個花園了。
He attained great skill through years of dedicated gardenership. 經過多年專注的園藝工作，他獲得了高超的技能。
The gardenership of the public park is managed by the city council. 公立公園的園丁職務由市議會管理。
The architect designed a gardenesque landscape for the new resort. 建築師為新度假村設計了園林風格的景觀。
His painting captured the gardenesque beauty of the English countryside. 他的畫作捕捉了英國鄉村如花園般的美景。
The children picked a gardenful of flowers for their mother. 孩子們為母親採了滿滿一園的花。
After the rain, a gardenful of scents filled the air. 雨後，空氣中充滿了滿園的芬芳。
He felt a sense of belonging within the local gardenhood. 他在當地的園藝界中找到了一種歸屬感。
The transition from childhood to gardenhood was natural for the young botanist. 對於這位年輕的植物學家來說，從童年進入園藝界是自然而然的事情。
Gardenin is a chemical compound that can be extracted from certain Gardenia species. 梔子素是一種可以從某些梔子屬植物中提取的化合物。
Researchers studied the properties of gardenin for its potential health benefits. 研究人員研究了梔子素的特性，以探討其潛在的健康益處。

meaning: 使花園化；將...開闢成花園
sentences: They decided to gardenize the vacant lot next to their house. 他們決定將房子旁邊的空地開闢成花園。
Efforts to gardenize urban spaces have improved the city's air quality. 將城市空間花園化的努力改善了城市的空氣品質。
Living in a gardenless apartment made her miss the countryside. 住在一間沒有花園的公寓裡讓她想念鄉村。
The city is planning to create more parks for gardenless residents. 城市正計劃為沒有花園的居民建造更多公園。
The indoor atrium had a pleasant, gardenlike atmosphere. 室內中庭有一種令人愉悅、像花園般的氣氛。
Her office was filled with so many plants it felt gardenlike. 她的辦公室裡擺滿了植物，感覺就像花園一樣。
She wore a gardenly hat to protect herself from the sun. 她戴了一頂適合在花園戴的帽子來遮陽。
His gardenly devotion to the roses was evident in their bloom. 他對玫瑰花如園丁般的奉獻顯現在它們的盛開中。
The famous gardenmaker was hired to design the palace grounds. 這位著名的造園家被聘請來設計宮殿的場地。
Every gardenmaker knows the importance of soil quality. 每一位造園者都知道土壤品質的重要性。
Gardenmaking is a hobby that requires both patience and creativity. 造園是一項既需要耐心又需要創造力的愛好。
She took a course in gardenmaking to improve her backyard. 她參加了造園課程來改善她的後院。
He turned his gaze gardenwards to watch the birds. 他將目光轉向花園看鳥。
The path led gardenwards through a series of arches. 這條小路穿過一系列拱門通往花園。

meaning: 就花園而言；以花園的方式
sentences: Gardenwise, the property has a lot of potential for improvement. 就花園而言，這處房產有很多改進的潛力。
He is very knowledgeable gardenwise and can identify almost any plant. 他在園藝方面非常博學，幾乎能辨認任何植物。

meaning: 像花園的；有花園氣息的
sentences: The tea shop had a very gardeny feel with its floral decorations. 這家茶館裝飾著花卉，給人一種非常有花園氣息的感覺。
I love the gardeny scent of this perfume. 我喜歡這款香水帶有的花園芬芳。

meaning: 盥洗室；衣帽間；廁所（尤指中世紀建築中的）
sentences: The medieval castle featured a garderobe built into the outer wall. 這座中世紀城堡的特徵是建在外牆上的廁所。
She stored her finest gowns in the garderobe. 她將她最精美的禮服存放在衣帽間裡。
The antique gardevin was filled with rare vintages. 這件古董酒櫃裝滿了稀有的年份酒。
He kept a small gardevin in his study for entertaining guests. 他在書房裡放了一個小酒櫃用來招待客人。
He raised his gardy to shield his eyes from the glare. 他舉起手臂遮擋強光。
In old Scots, 'gardy' refers to the arm. 在古蘇格蘭語中，「gardy」指的是手臂。

meaning: （舊時蘇格蘭倒污水時的警告聲）倒污水囉！
sentences: Residents would shout "gardyloo" before emptying their buckets out of the window. 居民在將桶子裡的水往窗外倒之前會大喊「倒污水囉！」
The phrase "gardyloo" comes from the French "gare de l'eau". 「gardyloo」一詞源自法語的「注意水」。
The wool was mixed with gare, making it lower in quality. 羊毛中混雜了粗毛，導致品質下降。
Sorters must remove the gare from the fine fleece. 分選工必須從優質羊毛中去除粗毛。

meaning: 大海雀（已滅絕的一種鳥類）
sentences: The garefowl was a large, flightless bird that lived in the North Atlantic. 大海雀是生存在北大西洋的一種大型、不會飛的鳥類。
Hunting by humans led to the extinction of the garefowl in the 19th century. 人類的獵殺導致大海雀在 19 世紀滅絕。
He suffered from gareh, a skin condition mentioned in ancient biblical texts. 他患有疥癬，這是一種古代聖經文獻中提到的皮膚病。
The term gareh is used to describe a scabby or itchy skin disease. 「gareh」一詞用於描述一種有結痂或發癢的皮膚病。
The sentinel stood inside the stone garetta to stay dry from the rain. 哨兵站在石製的小哨所內以避雨。
Ancient fortresses often had garettas at each corner. 古代的堡壘角落通常設有小哨所。
The garewaite patrolled the city walls throughout the night. 守衛整晚在城牆上巡邏。
Every garewaite was expected to be vigilant against intruders. 每一位看守者都被要求對入侵者保持警惕。
The garfish has a long, slender body and a beak-like jaw filled with sharp teeth. 尖嘴魚有著細長的身體和長滿尖牙的鳥喙狀顎部。
Fishermen often find garfish in coastal waters. 漁民經常在沿海水域發現尖嘴魚。
The garganey is a small dabbling duck that migrates over long distances. 白眉鴨是一種會長途遷徙的小型鑽水鴨。
The male garganey is easily identified by the broad white stripe over its eye. 雄性白眉鴨很容易透過眼部上方寬闊的白色條紋來辨識。

meaning: 巨人卡岡都亞；巨大的事物
sentences: Gargantua is a famous giant in the works of Rabelais. 卡岡都亞是拉伯雷著作中著名的巨人。
The massive machine was a true Gargantua of modern engineering. 這台巨大的機器堪稱現代工程界的龐然大物。
The company faced a gargantuan task in restructuring its operations. 該公司在重組業務方面面臨著巨大的任務。
He had a gargantuan appetite after the long hike. 長途健行後，他有著驚人的胃口。
The farmer used a traditional remedy to treat the cow's garget. 農民使用傳統療法來治療母牛的乳腺炎。
Garget is also a name for the pokeweed plant in some regions. 在某些地區，「garget」也是美商陸這種植物的名稱。
The milk from the gargety cow was discarded. 患有乳腺炎母牛的奶被丟棄了。
The veterinarian examined the gargety tissue of the animal. 獸醫檢查了動物患有乳腺炎的組織。
Gargle with warm salt water to help soothe a sore throat. 用溫鹽水漱口有助於緩解喉嚨痛。
The doctor advised him to gargle twice a day. 醫生建議他每天漱口兩次。
The gargol infection spread quickly through the pigsty. 豬瘟感染在豬圈中迅速蔓延。
Farmers took measures to prevent the outbreak of gargol. 農民採取措施預防豬瘟的爆發。

meaning: 滴水嘴獸；（建築上的）怪物狀滴水嘴
sentences: The gothic cathedral is famous for its intricate stone gargoyles. 這座哥德式大教堂以其複雜的石製滴水嘴獸而聞名。
Water poured from the mouth of the gargoyle during the storm. 暴風雨期間，水從滴水嘴獸的口中湧出。
The gargoyled walls of the old mansion looked eerie at night. 舊宅邸飾有滴水嘴獸的牆壁在晚上看起來很陰森。
Architects designed a gargoyled facade for the new library. 建築師為新圖書館設計了一個飾有滴水嘴獸的正門。
The old man had a gargoyley face with a large, hooked nose. 那位老人有一張像滴水嘴獸般的臉，還有一個巨大的鷹鉤鼻。
The clouds formed a gargoyley shape in the sky. 天空中的雲朵形成了一個像滴水嘴獸的形狀。
He let out a gargoylish grin that made everyone uncomfortable. 他露出了像石像鬼般古怪的笑容，讓每個人都感到不舒服。
The shadows on the wall took on a gargoylish appearance. 牆上的影子呈現出像石像鬼般古怪的外觀。

meaning: 像滴水嘴獸般地；古怪地
sentences: The statues were placed gargoylishly along the roofline. 雕像沿著屋頂線以古怪的方式擺放。
He posed gargoylishly for the photo. 他在拍照時擺出了一個像石像鬼般的古怪姿勢。

meaning: 黏多醣症（一種因面部特徵像石像鬼而得名的遺傳病）
sentences: Gargoylism is characterized by skeletal abnormalities and coarse facial features. 黏多醣症的特徵是骨骼異常和粗獷的面部特徵。
Modern medicine usually refers to gargoylism as Hurler syndrome. 現代醫學通常將黏多醣症稱為賀勒氏症候群。
Garhwali is an Indo-Aryan language spoken in the Garhwal region. 嘉瓦利語是嘉瓦利地區使用的一種印歐語系語言。
He is a Garhwali and proud of his cultural heritage. 他是嘉瓦利人，並為自己的文化遺產感到自豪。
The garial is known for its long, thin snout. 長吻鱷以其長而細的吻部而聞名。
We saw a garial basking on the riverbank. 我們看到一隻長吻鱷在河岸上曬太陽。
The term gariba is often used to describe someone who is poor or humble. gariba 一詞常用來描述貧窮或謙卑的人。
He lived the life of a gariba, content with very little. 他過著窮苦人的生活，對極少的物質感到滿足。

meaning: 加里波第魚；加里波第衫
sentences: The bright orange garibaldi is the state marine fish of California. 明亮的橙色加里波第魚是加利福尼亞州的州海洋魚。
She wore a red garibaldi shirt to the festival. 她穿著一件紅色的加里波第衫去參加節日。

meaning: 加里波第的；加里波第追隨者的
sentences: The Garibaldian soldiers were known for their red shirts. 加里波第士兵以其紅衫而聞名。
He studied the Garibaldian movements during the Italian unification. 他研究了義大利統一期間的加里波第運動。
The room was garishly decorated with bright neon lights. 房間用明亮的霓虹燈裝飾得非常俗麗。
She was garishly dressed for such a formal occasion. 在如此正式的場合，她的穿著顯得過於花哨。
The garishness of the costumes was overwhelming. 服裝的俗麗程度令人震撼。
He disliked the garishness of modern advertising. 他不喜歡現代廣告的俗麗。
The pillars were adorned with beautiful garlandage. 柱子裝飾著美麗的花環。
The festive garlandage added a touch of elegance to the hall. 節日的花環裝飾為大廳增添了一抹優雅。
The statue stood garlandless after the ceremony. 儀式結束後，雕像上沒有花環。
A garlandless door looked plain during the festival. 節日期間，沒有花環裝飾的門看起來很簡樸。
The vines grew in a garlandlike pattern around the tree. 藤蔓在樹周圍以像花環般的圖案生長。
She wore a garlandlike wreath in her hair. 她頭上戴著一個像花環般的頭冠。
The hall was filled with colorful garlandry. 大廳裡佈滿了五彩繽紛的花環裝飾。
He specialized in the art of garlandry. 他專攻花環裝飾藝術。
The lights were hung garlandwise across the street. 燈光如花環般地掛在街道兩旁。
The flowers were arranged garlandwise on the table. 花朵在桌上如花環般排列著。

meaning: 斑紋；（製作奶油時）因手溫過高而弄壞
sentences: The old cow had a white garle on its flank. 那頭老牛的側腹有一道白色斑紋。
Be careful not to garle the butter while kneading it. 揉捏奶油時要小心，不要因為手溫過高而弄壞它。
The sauce has a strong, garlicky flavor. 這醬汁有很濃的大蒜味。
He loves garlicky bread with his pasta. 他喜歡吃義大利麵配大蒜麵包。
Some wild plants have a garliclike smell. 一些野生植物有像大蒜般的味道。
The bulb had a garliclike appearance but was actually a different species. 該鱗莖外觀像大蒜，但實際上是不同的物種。

meaning: 賣大蒜的人；（貶義）庸俗的人
sentences: The garlicmonger set up his stall in the morning market. 賣大蒜的人在早市擺好了攤位。
In Shakespeare's time, 'garlicmonger' was sometimes used as an insult. 在莎士比亞時代，「賣大蒜的人」有時被用作侮辱性的詞語。
Garlicwort is often found growing in shaded areas. 蒜味草通常生長在陰涼處。
The leaves of the garlicwort can be used in salads. 蒜味草的葉子可以用於沙拉。
The statue was depicted as a garmentless figure. 這座雕像被描繪成一個沒穿衣服的人物。
He felt exposed and garmentless in the dream. 在夢中，他感到赤裸裸且沒穿衣服。
The local garmentmaker provides jobs for many people in the town. 當地的成衣業者為鎮上許多人提供了工作。
She decided to work as a garmentmaker after finishing design school. 完成設計學校的學業後，她決定擔任服裝製造商。
The elaborate garmenture of the king was made of silk and gold. 國王精緻的衣服是由絲綢和金子製成的。
His modest garmenture reflected his humble lifestyle. 他簡樸的服裝反映了他謙卑的生活方式。
The garmentworker spent long hours in the factory sewing shirts. 這位成衣工人在工廠裡花了很長時間縫製襯衫。
Many garmentworkers are fighting for better working conditions. 許多成衣工人正在爭取更好的工作條件。
He bought some garn for his weaving project. 他為他的織造項目買了一些紗線。
Garn is a term sometimes used in textile manufacturing. Garn 是紡織製造中偶爾使用的術語。
The biologist studied the garnel found in the shallow waters. 生物學家研究了在淺水區發現的蝦。
Garnel is a rare term for certain types of small crustaceans. Garnel 是某些類型的小型甲殼類動物的罕見術語。
The farm's garnerage was full after a successful harvest. 成功收穫後，農場的穀倉儲藏已滿。
Proper garnerage is essential to protect the grain from pests. 適當的儲藏對於保護穀物免受害蟲侵害至關重要。
The garnetberry is known for its deep red fruit. 石榴石莓以其深紅色的果實而聞名。
Birds often feed on the garnetberry during the autumn. 鳥類在秋天經常以石榴石莓為食。
The garneter processed the waste wool into reusable fibers. 開鬆機工人將廢羊毛加工成可重複使用的纖維。
Skill is required for a garneter to maintain the machine's efficiency. 開鬆機工人需要具備一定的技能才能維持機器的效率。
The geologists discovered a garnetiferous rock formation in the mountains. 地質學家在山中發現了含石榴石的岩層。
Garnetiferous schist is common in certain metamorphic regions. 含石榴石的片岩在某些變質地區很常見。
The necklace was adorned with several beautiful red garnets. 項鍊上裝飾著幾顆美麗的紅石榴石。
Garnets are used both as gemstones and for industrial abrasives. 石榴石既可用作寶石，也可用於工業磨料。
The textile mill installed a new garnett to recycle fabric scraps. 紡織廠安裝了一台新的開鬆機來回收織物碎料。
A garnett machine is essential for processing hard-to-fiber materials. 開鬆機對於處理難以纖維化的材料至關重要。
The experienced garnetter monitored the machine for any jams. 經驗豐富的開鬆機工人監控機器是否有任何堵塞。
The role of a garnetter is vital in the textile recycling industry. 開鬆機工人的角色在紡織品回收行業中至關重要。
The museum displayed ancient garnetwork from the Victorian era. 博物館展示了維多利亞時代的古代石榴石製品。
Her expertise lies in identifying intricate garnetwork in jewelry. 她的專長在於鑑定珠寶中複雜的石榴石製品。
The historian explained how the garnetz was used in ancient trade. 歷史學家解釋了迦涅茨在古代貿易中是如何使用的。
One garnetz is equivalent to approximately 3.28 liters. 一個迦涅茨大約等於 3.28 公升。
The old cookbook used the garnice as a standard unit of measure. 舊食譜使用迦尼斯作為標準計量單位。
References to the garnice can be found in historical records of the region. 該地區的歷史記錄中可以找到關於迦尼斯的記載。
The garniec was a common unit of measure in Poland for centuries. 幾個世紀以來，迦匿一直是波蘭常用的計量單位。
He needed to convert the garniec measurements into modern metric units. 他需要將迦匿的測量值轉換為現代公制單位。
Garnierite is an important ore of nickel found in New Caledonia. 矽鎂鎳礦是新喀里多尼亞發現的重要鎳礦石。
The mineral garnierite often has a distinctive green color. 矽鎂鎳礦通常具有獨特的綠色。

meaning: 可裝飾的; 可扣押的
sentences: The plate was garnishable with fresh herbs and lemon slices. 盤子可以用新鮮香草和檸檬片裝飾。
Under certain laws, a portion of the debtor's wages is garnishable. 根據某些法律，債務人的一部分工資是可以扣押的。

meaning: 裝飾過的; 被扣押的
sentences: The chef served a garnished platter of roasted vegetables. 廚師端出一盤裝飾過的烤蔬菜。
His wages were garnished to pay off his outstanding debts. 他的工資被扣押以償還未清償的債務。
The bank acted as the garnishee in the legal dispute. 銀行在法律糾紛中充當被扣押財產保管人。
The court decided to garnishee the employee's salary. 法院決定扣押該員工的薪水。
The garnisheement of his bank account came as a shock to him. 他的銀行賬戶被扣押對他來說是一個打擊。
The elegant garnisheement of the hall made it perfect for the wedding. 大廳優雅的裝飾使其非常適合舉行婚禮。
As a garnisher, her job was to add final touches to the pastries. 作為一名裝飾者，她的工作是為糕點添加最後的修飾。
The law defines the rights and responsibilities of a garnisher. 法律規定了扣押者的權利和責任。

meaning: 判決第三人應直接向原告支付被告欠款。
sentences: The term garnishment refers to A judgment that a third party should pay money owing to a defendant directly to a plaintiff. 扣押一詞是指第三方應將被告欠款直接支付給原告的判決。
We learned the meaning of garnishment today. 今天我們了解了扣押的意思。
The term garnishry refers to adornment. 裝飾一詞指的是裝飾。
We learned the meaning of garnishry today. 今天我們了解了裝飾的含義。

meaning: 裝飾的東西；裝飾、裝飾或點綴
sentences: The term garniture refers to Something that garnishes; a decoration, adornment or embellishment. 術語「garniture」指的是裝飾物；裝飾品、裝飾品或裝飾品。
We learned the meaning of garniture today. 今天我們了解了garniture的意思。

meaning: 梅加拉亞邦、阿薩姆邦、特里普拉邦、那加蘭邦和孟加拉國鄰近地區的藏緬族成員。
sentences: The term Garo refers to A member of a Tibeto-Burman ethnic group in Meghalaya, Assam, Tripura, Nagaland, and neighboring areas of Bangladesh. 「加羅」一詞指的是梅加拉亞邦、阿薩姆邦、特里普拉邦、那加蘭邦和孟加拉國鄰近地區的藏緬族成員。
We learned the meaning of Garo today. 今天我們了解了Garo的意思。
The term garoo refers to 加魯. 加魯一詞指的是加魯。
We learned the meaning of garoo today. 今天我們了解了garoo的意思。
The term garookuh refers to 加魯庫. 「garookuh」一詞指的是「加魯庫」。
We learned the meaning of garookuh today. 今天我們了解了garookuh的意思。
The term garrafa refers to 加拉法. garrafa一詞指的是加拉法。
We learned the meaning of garrafa today. 今天我們了解了garrafa的意思。
The term garran refers to 加蘭. garran一詞指的是加蘭。
We learned the meaning of garran today. 今天我們了解了garran的意思。
The term Garret refers to 閣樓. Garret一詞指的是閣樓。
We learned the meaning of Garret today. 今天我們了解了Garret的含義。

meaning: 位於房屋屋頂下方的閣樓或半成品房間。
sentences: The term garret refers to An attic or semi-finished room just beneath the roof of a house. 閣樓一詞是指位於房屋屋頂下方的閣樓或半成品房間。
We learned the meaning of garret today. 今天我們了解了閣樓的含義。
The report describes the result as garreted. 報告將結果描述為「被絞死」。
Everyone noticed the garreted tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的語氣。
The term garreteer refers to One who lives in a garret. garreteer一詞指的是住在閣樓裡的人。
We learned the meaning of garreteer today. 今天我們了解了 garreteer 的意思。
The term garretmaster refers to 閣樓主人. 閣樓主人一詞指的是閣樓主。
We learned the meaning of garretmaster today. 今天我們了解了garretmaster的意思。

meaning: 威廉·勞埃德·加里森思想的支持者。
sentences: The term Garrisonian refers to A supporter of William Lloyd Garrison's ideas. 「加里森派」一詞指的是威廉·勞埃德·加里森思想的支持者。
We learned the meaning of Garrisonian today. 今天我們了解了加里森尼亞的意思。

meaning: 美國記者、婦女參政論者和社會改革家威廉·勞埃德·加里森（William Lloyd Garrison，1805-1879 年）的廢奴主義信仰。
sentences: The term Garrisonism refers to The abolitionist beliefs of William Lloyd Garrison (1805–1879), American journalist, suffragist, and social reformer. 加里森主義一詞指的是美國記者、婦女參政論者和社會改革家威廉·勞埃德·加里森（William Lloyd Garrison，1805-1879 年）的廢奴主義信仰。
We learned the meaning of Garrisonism today. 今天我們了解了駐軍主義的涵義。

meaning: 用於收緊繃帶的棍子或小木筒，以壓迫肢體的動脈。
sentences: The Army doctor used a garrot to stop the bleeding from the injured soldier's wound. 軍醫用絞刑繩為受傷士兵的傷口止血。
The term garrot refers to A stick or small wooden cylinder used for tightening a bandage, in order to compress the arteries of a limb. 術語「絞刑管」是指用於收緊繃帶以壓迫肢體動脈的棍子或小木筒。

meaning: 用於勒死的東西，尤其是繩子或金屬絲。
sentences: The mob boss was known for having his enemies executed with a garrote of piano wire. 這位黑幫老大因用鋼琴絲絞刑處決他的敵人而聞名。
The term garrote refers to Something, especially a cord or wire, used for strangulation. 術語“絞刑”指的是用於勒死的東西，尤其是繩索或金屬絲。
The term garroter refers to A person who uses a garrote. 術語「絞刑者」是指使用絞刑者的人。
We learned the meaning of garroter today. 今天我們了解了絞刑架的意思。
The term Garrulinae refers to 鵝亞科. Garrulinae 一詞指的是鵝亞科。
We learned the meaning of Garrulinae today. 今天我們了解了 Garrulinae 的意思。
The term garruline refers to 鵝耳櫪. garruline一詞指的是鵝耳櫪。
We learned the meaning of garruline today. 今天我們了解了garruline的意思。
The old man's garrulity often tired his listeners. 那位老人的喋喋不休常讓聽眾感到疲倦。
She was known for her garrulity on every subject imaginable. 她以對任何想像得到的內容都能喋喋不休而聞名。
He spoke garrulously about his childhood memories. 他喋喋不休地講述著童年的回憶。
They chatted garrulously throughout the entire flight. 他們在整個飛行過程中都喋喋不休地聊天。
His garrulousness made it difficult for others to get a word in. 他的饒舌讓別人很難插得上話。
The teacher tried to curb the student's garrulousness during class. 老師試圖在課堂上抑制學生的喋喋不休。
Garrulus is a genus of jays in the crow family. 松鴉屬是鴉科中的一個屬。
The Eurasian Jay belongs to the genus Garrulus. 歐亞松鴉屬於松鴉屬。
The fisherman caught a large garrupa off the coast. 漁夫在岸邊捕獲了一條巨大的石斑魚。
Garrupa is a common name for several species of grouper. Garrupa 是幾種石斑魚的常用名稱。
Garrya elliptica is often grown for its long, decorative catkins. 絲穗木常因其長而具裝飾性的葇荑花序而被栽種。
The genus Garrya consists of evergreen shrubs. 絲穗木屬由常綠灌木組成。
Garryaceae is a small family of flowering plants. 絲穗木科是一個小型的開花植物科。
Botanists study the unique characteristics of Garryaceae. 植物學家研究絲穗木科的獨特特徵。
The hillside was covered in yellow-flowering garse. 山坡上覆蓋著開黃花的金雀花。
Garse is a prickly shrub common in Western Europe. 金雀花是西歐常見的一種多刺灌木。

meaning: 卡什尼（用敘利亞字母書寫的阿拉伯語）
sentences: Garshuni was historically used by Syriac Christians. 卡什尼在歷史上由敘利亞基督徒使用。
The manuscript was written in Garshuni script. 這份手稿是用卡什尼文字書寫的。
They gathered garsil from the forest floor for the fire. 他們從森林地面收集柴火來生火。
A bundle of garsil was stacked neatly by the hearth. 一捆柴火整齊地堆在壁爐旁。
The cattle were kept in the village garston. 牛群被關在村莊的圍場裡。
He inherited a small garston on the edge of town. 他在鎮邊繼承了一小塊牧場。
The word garten appears in many German-influenced place names. garten 這個詞出現在許多受德國影響的地名中。
She spent the afternoon working in her small garten. 她整個下午都在她的小花園裡勞作。
She adjusted her silk garter before leaving. 她在出發前調整了她的絲綢吊襪帶。
The Order of the Garter is a prestigious British order of knighthood. 嘉德勳位是英國著名的騎士勳位。
The dancers wore colorful, gartered stockings. 舞者們穿著色彩鮮艷、繫著襪帶的長筒襪。
He was dressed in traditional attire with gartered socks. 他穿著傳統服飾，襪子上繫著襪帶。
The dressmaker used elastic for the gartering. 裁縫用彈性帶製作吊襪帶。
She bought a roll of lace for gartering. 她買了一卷蕾絲用來做吊襪帶。
Modern stockings often have stay-up tops, making them garterless. 現代長筒襪通常有防滑頂端，使其不需要吊襪帶。
She preferred garterless hosiery for comfort. 為了舒適，她更喜歡不帶吊襪帶的絲襪。

meaning: 庭院管理人；魚塘管理人
sentences: The garthman was responsible for maintaining the monastery garden. 庭院管理人負責維護修道院的花園。
As a garthman, he looked after the fish ponds on the estate. 作為一名魚塘管理人，他照看莊園裡的魚池。
Garuda is the mount of the Hindu god Vishnu. 迦樓羅是印度教神祇毗濕奴的座騎。
The national emblem of Indonesia features the mythical Garuda. 印尼的國徽上有神話中的大鵬金翅鳥。

meaning: 魚醬（古羅馬的一種調味料）
sentences: Garum was a popular fermented fish sauce in ancient Rome. 魚醬是古羅馬流行的一種發酵魚露。
Archaeologists found jars that once contained garum. 考古學家發現了曾經裝有魚醬的罐子。
Garvanzo beans are a great source of protein. 鷹嘴豆是極佳的蛋白質來源。
He added some garvanzo to the salad for extra crunch. 他在沙拉中加入了一些鷹嘴豆以增加口感。

meaning: 一種平底、方頭的淺水小船，最初由紐澤西州的漁民使用
sentences: The fisherman steered his garvey through the shallow coastal waters. 漁夫駕駛著他的平底小船穿過淺海沿岸水域。
Garveys are known for their stable design in calm bays. 平底小船以其在平靜海灣中的穩定設計而聞名。

meaning: 小型的海洋魚類（如小鯡魚）；蘇格蘭的一處地方名
sentences: The local fishermen caught a large number of garvock this season. 當地漁民本季捕獲了大量小鯡魚。
Garvock is also a historic parish in Scotland. 加沃克也是蘇格蘭一個具有歷史意義的教區。

meaning: 蓋瑞（男子名）；美國印第安納州的一個城市
sentences: Gary is a common given name in English-speaking countries. 蓋瑞在英語國家是一個常見的名字。
The city of Gary, Indiana, was once a major center for steel production. 印第安納州的蓋瑞市曾是主要的鋼鐵生產中心。

meaning: 加桑（男子名，源於阿拉伯語）；菲律賓馬林杜克省的一個市鎮
sentences: Gasan is a scenic municipality known for its cultural festivals. 加桑是一個以文化節慶聞名的風景秀麗的市鎮。
The name Gasan has various meanings across different cultures. 加桑這個名字在不同文化中有多種含義。

meaning: 饒舌者，愛吹牛的人；裝煤氣的袋子
sentences: Don't listen to that old gasbag; he just likes to hear himself talk. 不要聽那個老饒舌者的話；他只是喜歡聽自己說話。
The balloon was filled using a large leather gasbag. 氣球是用一個大型皮製煤氣袋填充的。

meaning: 加斯科涅（法國西南部的一個舊省，現通稱 Gascony）
sentences: Gascoigny was a former province in southwestern France. 加斯科涅是法國西南部的一個舊省。
Historical records often use the archaic spelling Gascoigny. 歷史記錄經常使用古老的拼寫方式 Gascoigny。

meaning: 加斯科涅人；自大的人；誇大的
sentences: The Gascon soldiers were known for their bravery and pride. 加斯科涅士兵以其勇敢和自豪聞名。
He gave a Gascon answer, full of unnecessary boasting. 他給出了一個加斯科涅式的回答，充滿了不必要的吹噓。
His speech was nothing more than empty gasconade. 他的演講不過是空洞的吹牛。
He likes to gasconade about his imaginary achievements. 他喜歡對自己虛構的成就大言不慚。
No one believed the gasconader's tall tales. 沒有人相信那個吹牛者的荒誕故事。
He was known in the village as a harmless gasconader. 他在村子裡被公認為是一個無害的吹牛者。

meaning: 加斯科涅方言；誇大的措辭
sentences: The author used several Gasconisms to give the character an authentic voice. 作者使用了幾個加斯科涅方言來賦予角色真實的聲音。
His writing style is often criticized for its excessive Gasconisms. 他的寫作風格常因過度誇大的措辭而受到批評。

meaning: 加型犁（蘇格蘭高地傳統的手腳並用犁地工具）
sentences: The crofter used a gascromh to till the stony ground. 佃農使用加型犁在多石的土地上耕作。
A gascromh is a traditional Gaelic foot-plow. 加型犁是一種傳統的蓋爾式足犁。
The experiment measured the gaseity of the substance at high temperatures. 該實驗測量了該物質在高溫下的氣體性質。
Gaseity is one of the physical states of matter. 氣態是物質的物理狀態之一。

meaning: 煤氣吊燈（專門設計用於燃燒煤氣的吊燈）
sentences: The Victorian parlor was illuminated by a grand gaselier. 維多利亞時代的客廳由一盞豪華的煤氣吊燈照亮。
Old gaseliers were often converted to use electricity. 舊的煤氣吊燈通常被改裝成使用電能。
The scientist studied the gaseosity of the newly discovered planet's atmosphere. 科學家研究了新發現行星大氣的氣態性質。
High gaseosity in the liquid can cause bubbles to form. 液體中過高的氣態含量會導致氣泡形成。
The gaseousness of the fuel makes it easy to transport through pipes. 燃料的氣體性質使其易於通過管道運輸。
We observed the transition from liquid to gaseousness. 我們觀察了從液態到氣態的轉變。

meaning: 氣體燃燒，使用瓦斯加熱
sentences: The gasfiring furnace reached the required temperature quickly. 瓦斯加熱爐迅速達到了所需溫度。
Gasfiring is a cleaner alternative to coal-based heating. 瓦斯加熱是煤炭加熱的一種更乾淨的替代方案。
The accident left several deep gashes on the car's door. 事故在汽車門上留下了幾道深深的切口。
He gashes the tree bark to collect the resin. 他在樹皮上割開切口以收集樹脂。
The old ruins had a gashful appearance in the moonlight. 古老的廢墟在月光下顯得陰森可怕。
He told a gashful story about a ghost in the woods. 他講了一個關於森林中幽靈的可怕故事。
The gashliness of the scene made him turn away. 場景的恐怖讓他轉過頭去。
The makeup artist achieved a perfect level of gashliness for the horror movie. 化妝師為這部恐怖片營造了完美的恐怖程度。
His face looked gashly pale after the shock. 震驚之後，他的臉色顯得慘白得可怕。
The gashly figure stood silently at the end of the hallway. 那個可怕的身影靜靜地站在走廊盡頭。

meaning: 瓦斯儲氣槽, 儲氣罐
sentences: The massive gasholder dominated the industrial skyline. 巨大的瓦斯儲氣槽佔據了工業區的天際線。
Gas is stored at a constant pressure within the telescopic gasholder. 瓦斯以恆定的壓力儲存在伸縮式儲氣罐中。
The old gashouse was converted into a modern art gallery. 舊的煤氣廠被改造成了一個現代美術館。
Smoke billowed from the chimneys of the Victorian gashouse. 維多利亞時代的煤氣廠煙囪冒出陣陣煙霧。

meaning: 有深長傷口的, 像裂口的
sentences: The soldier returned with a gashy wound on his shoulder. 士兵帶著肩膀上一個深長的傷口回來了。
The landscape was marked by gashy ravines cut by the erosion. 地表上佈滿了因侵蝕而形成的如裂口般的峽谷。
Bio-waste is a highly gasifiable material used for renewable energy. 生物廢料是用於再生能源的高度可氣化材料。
Only certain types of coal are considered easily gasifiable. 只有特定類型的煤被認為是容易氣化的。
Coal gasification is a process that converts coal into synthesis gas. 煤炭氣化是將煤炭轉化為合成氣的過程。
The company invested in advanced gasification technology to reduce emissions. 該公司投資了先進的氣化技術以減少排放。
The biomass gasifier produces fuel from agricultural waste. 生物質氣化爐利用農業廢棄物生產燃料。
Engineers are working to improve the efficiency of the industrial gasifier. 工程師們正致力於提高工業氣化器的效率。
At high temperatures, the metal exists in a gasiform state. 在高溫下，該金屬以氣態形式存在。
The gasiform substance expanded rapidly to fill the container. 氣態物質迅速膨脹以填滿容器。
The laboratory equipment can gasify solid samples for analysis. 實驗室設備可以將固體樣品氣化以進行分析。
High pressure is required to gasify the liquid fuel efficiently. 需要高壓才能有效地使液體燃料氣化。
A blown head gasket can cause the car engine to overheat. 汽缸墊片燒壞會導致汽車引擎過熱。
Make sure the rubber gasket is properly seated before tightening the bolts. 在擰緊螺栓之前，確保橡膠墊圈已正確就位。

meaning: (馬的) 脛部, 飛節上方的一段
sentences: The horse had strong gaskins, indicating great jumping potential. 這匹馬的脛部肌肉發達，顯示出巨大的跳躍潛力。
The veterinarian examined the swelling on the stallion's gaskin. 獸醫檢查了公馬脛部上的腫脹。
The plumber used gasking to seal the joints of the old pipes. 水管工使用填料來密封舊管道的接頭。
Traditional gasking materials have been replaced by modern synthetic seals. 傳統的密封填料已被現代合成密封件所取代。

meaning: 寬鬆的長褲, 寬大的褲子
sentences: He wore a pair of rough wool gaskins for his farm work. 他穿著一條粗羊毛寬長褲做農活。
The character in the play was dressed in colorful, baggy gaskins. 劇中的角色穿著色彩鮮艷、寬鬆的長褲。

meaning: 無瓦斯的, 不產生瓦斯的
sentences: The kitchen was temporarily gasless due to a pipe leak nearby. 由於附近管道洩漏，廚房暫時沒有瓦斯可用。
Some hikers prefer gasless stoves that use wood or alcohol as fuel. 一些登山者喜歡使用木柴或酒精作為燃料的無瓦斯爐具。
The streets of London were once illuminated by flickering gaslight. 倫敦的街道曾被閃爍的煤氣燈光照亮。
The soft glow of the gaslight added a nostalgic atmosphere to the room. 煤氣燈柔和的光芒為房間增添了懷舊的氣息。

meaning: 用煤氣燈照亮的; (心理學) 被情緒操縱的
sentences: The dark alley was dimly gaslighted by a single lamp. 陰暗的小巷由一盞煤氣燈微弱地照亮著。
She felt gaslighted by her partner, who constantly denied her reality. 她覺得自己被伴侶情緒操縱了，對方不斷否認她的現實感。

meaning: 煤氣燈效應, 心理操縱
sentences: Gaslighting is a form of emotional abuse that makes victims doubt their sanity. 煤氣燈效應是一種情感虐待，會使受害者懷疑自己的心智是否正常。
Recognizing the signs of gaslighting is the first step toward recovery. 辨識出心理操縱的跡象是邁向康復的第一步。
The gaslit streets of the old town felt like a scene from a movie. 舊城區煤氣燈照亮的街道感覺就像電影中的場景。
They walked through the gaslit corridors of the ancient mansion. 他們走過古老宅邸中由煤氣燈照亮的走廊。
A gaslock in the fuel pump prevented the engine from starting. 燃油泵中的氣鎖導致引擎無法啟動。
Mechanics had to clear the gaslock to restore fuel flow to the carburetor. 技工必須清除氣鎖以恢復流向化油器的燃油。

meaning: 煤氣製造者, 煤氣發生器
sentences: The gasmaker monitored the pressure levels in the production facility. 煤氣製造者監測生產設施中的壓力水平。
This portable gasmaker can convert charcoal into fuel for small engines. 這種便攜式煤氣發生器可以將木炭轉化為小型發動機的燃料。

meaning: 煤氣廠工人, 煤氣表抄表員
sentences: The gasman came to read the meter early this morning. 抄表員今天一大早就來抄煤氣表了。
My grandfather worked as a gasman for the city council for thirty years. 我祖父在市議會當了三十年的煤氣廠工人。
The gasogenic process was studied in the lab. 實驗室研究了產生氣體的過程。
Bacterial activity can be gasogenic in soil. 土壤中的細菌活動會產生氣體。
The antique gasoliery hung from the ceiling of the Scottish mansion. 古董煤氣燈支架懸掛在蘇格蘭大宅的天花板上。
They converted the old gasoliery to electricity. 他們將舊的煤氣燈支架改裝為電力驅動。
The price of gasoline has risen recently. 汽油價格最近上漲了。
He filled the car with gasoline before the long trip. 他在長途旅行前給車加滿了汽油。
The gasolineless engine runs entirely on electricity. 這種無汽油引擎完全依靠電力運行。
We are moving toward a gasolineless future for transportation. 我們正邁向交通運輸不使用汽油的未來。
The gasoliner pulled into the station to refuel. 汽油車駛入了加油站加油。
He worked as a gasoliner for many years in the city. 他在城市裡當了多年的汽油商。
The gasometer measured the fuel consumption for the building. 氣量計計量了這棟建築的燃料消耗量。
A large gasometer stands near the old industrial site. 工業遺址附近矗立著一個大型儲氣槽。
Gasometric analysis is used to determine the purity of the air. 氣體定量分析用於確定空氣的純度。
The gasometric data was recorded carefully by the scientist. 氣體定量數據被科學家仔細記錄。
They used gasometrical methods in the complex experiment. 他們在複雜的實驗中使用了氣體定量方法。
The gasometrical results were consistent across multiple trials. 氣體定量的結果在多次試驗中都是一致的。
Gasometry is essential in the field of chemical engineering. 氣體定量法在化學工程領域中至關重要。
Advances in gasometry have improved the safety of the plant. 氣體定量法的進步提高了工廠的安全性。
Gaspar is traditionally known as one of the Three Wise Men. 傳統上，加斯帕被認為是東方三博士之一。
My friend Gaspar lives in a small village in Spain. 我的朋友加斯帕住在西班牙的一個小村莊。

meaning: 琴葉珊瑚屬植物 (一種熱帶植物)
sentences: The gasparillo tree is native to the Caribbean islands. Gasparillo 樹原產於加勒比群島。
We observed the beautiful flowering gasparillo in the botanical garden. 我們在植物園裡觀察到了美麗的開花 gasparillo。
The runner was a gasper after finishing the intense sprint. 衝刺賽後，那名跑者氣喘吁吁。
In the old movie, the detective lit up a cheap gasper. 在那部老電影中，偵探點燃了一根廉價香菸。
Gaspereau swim upstream in the spring to spawn in freshwater. 灰西鯡在春天溯流而上，到淡水中產卵。
The local fishermen caught a net full of gaspereau this morning. 當地漁民今天早上捕獲了一網的灰西鯡。
The gaspergou is a popular game fish found in the Southern United States. 淡水石首魚是美國南方常見的受歡迎游釣魚。
They fried the fresh gaspergou for a traditional family dinner. 他們炸了新鮮的淡水石首魚作為傳統家庭晚餐。
Her gaspiness indicated a severe lack of oxygen after the climb. 登山後，她的喘氣狀態表明嚴重缺氧。
The intense heat increased the young runner's gaspiness. 酷熱增加了年輕跑者的喘氣程度。
He was gasping for breath after the exhausting race. 賽後他喘不過氣來。
The gasping fish was quickly returned to the water. 那條喘著氣的魚被迅速放回了水裡。
She spoke gaspingly after running up the five flights of stairs. 爬上五層樓梯後，她喘著氣說話。
He reached the mountain top gaspingly but triumphant. 他氣喘吁吁地到達了山頂，但充滿了勝利感。
The soldiers were equipped with modern gasproof suits. 士兵們裝備了現代化的防毒氣服。
Please ensure the storage container is completely gasproof. 請確保儲存容器是完全防氣的。
The old engine made a gaspy sound as it struggled to start. 舊引擎在艱難啟動時發出喘氣般的聲音。
He felt gaspy and lightheaded in the high altitude. 在高海拔地區，他感到呼吸急促且頭暈。

meaning: 吹牛者；產生氣體的人/物
sentences: He is known as a bit of a gasser at neighborhood parties. 他在鄰里派對上以愛吹牛聞名。
The new chemical reactor is an exceptionally efficient gasser. 新的化學反應器是一個非常高效的氣體產生器。
The cattle were treated for garapata. 這些牛隻接受了蜱蟲治療。
In many cultures, garava is shown to elders. 在許多文化中，對長輩表現出敬重。
Garavance is a key ingredient in hummus. 鷹嘴豆是鷹嘴豆泥的主要成分。
The farmer planted garawi for cattle feed. 農民種植蘇丹草作為牛飼料。
He wore a suit made of fine garbardine. 他穿著一套由優質華達呢製成的西裝。
They needed to garbel the spices before sale. 他們需要在出售前篩選香料。
The old process was to garbell the grain. 舊的工序是篩選穀物。
To garbill meant to remove the impurities. garbill 意指去除雜質。
Don't garble my words to suit your agenda. 不要為了迎合你的目的而曲解我的話。
The radio signal was weak and garbleable. 無線電信號微弱且容易被曲解。
The critic was accused of being a garbler. 評論家被指責為斷章取義者。
We need a garbless account of the event. 我們需要對該事件進行未經歪曲的敘述。
Garbling of facts is common in propaganda. 事實的歪曲在宣傳中很常見。
The garboard strake is the first plank next to the keel. 龍骨翼板是緊靠龍骨的第一塊木板。
The room was in a state of garboil. 房間裡一片混亂。
Garbure is a traditional French soup. Garbure 是一種傳統的法國濃湯。

The museum display showed several smooth gastroliths found with the skeleton. 博物館展出了與骨架一起發現的幾塊光滑胃石。

meaning: 腹囊豆屬（澳洲的一種有毒植物屬）
sentences: Gastrolobium species are known for containing toxic sodium fluoroacetate. 腹囊豆屬物種因含有有毒的氟乙酸鈉而聞名。

The gastrologer recommended a change in diet and lifestyle. 胃病專家建議改變飲食和生活方式。

meaning: 胃占卜（一種古代占卜法，或指腹語術）
sentences: In ancient times, gastromancy was used to predict the future. 在古代，胃占卜被用來預測未來。

The case of gastromelus was documented in a medical journal. 這例腹肢畸胎被記錄在一本醫學期刊中。
Gastromenia is a form of vicarious menstruation occurring from the stomach. 胃代償性月經是發生在胃部的一種代償性月經形式。

The patient was treated with antifungal medication for gastromycosis. 患者因胃真菌病接受了抗真菌藥物治療。

Gastronephritis involves simultaneous inflammation of the stomach and kidneys. 胃腎炎涉及胃和腎臟的同時發炎。

The gastronomist wrote a glowing review of the new restaurant. 這位美食家對這家新餐廳寫了一篇讚不絕口的評論。
Being a gastronomist requires a refined palate. 成為一名美食家需要敏銳的味覺。
Gastronosus is an archaic term for a disease of the stomach. Gastronosus 是胃部疾病的一個古老用語。

The gastropancreatic fold is a prominent anatomical feature. 胃胰襞是一個顯著的解剖特徵。

Gastropancreatitis involves inflammation of both the stomach and the pancreas. 胃胰腺炎涉及胃和胰臟的發炎。

Gastroparesis is a condition that affects the stomach muscles. 胃輕癱是一種影響胃部肌肉的疾病。

Gastropathic conditions can vary in severity. 胃病狀況的嚴重程度各不相同。

The magazine caters to gastrophiles looking for unique recipes. 該雜誌迎合尋找獨特食譜的美食愛好者。

The gastrophilist organized a tasting event for local chefs. 這位美食家為當地廚師組織了一場品鑑活動。
Every gastrophilist appreciates the importance of fresh ingredients. 每一位美食家都體認到新鮮食材的重要性。
The term gastrophilite is a rare synonym for someone who loves good food. Gastrophilite 這個詞是愛好美食者的罕見同義詞。

The gastrostomy procedure was successful. 胃造口術程序很成功。

meaning: 胃腸血管的；消化循環的
sentences: Cnidarians have a gastrovascular cavity for both digestion and circulation. 刺胞動物有一個兼具消化和循環功能的胃皮層腔。

meaning: （群體水螅類的）營養個體；胃個員
sentences: The gastrozooid is responsible for capturing food for the colony. 營養個體負責為群體捕捉食物。

The gasworker maintained the pipes in the city. 煤氣工人維護城市裡的管道。

meaning: 護士鯊；（菲律賓）椰奶菜餚
sentences: The diver saw a gata resting on the ocean floor. 潛水員看到一隻護士鯊在海底休息。
She prepared a delicious dish with coconut milk, known as gata. 她準備了一道美味的椰奶料理，被稱為 gata。
The walls were decorated with intricate gatch carvings. 牆上裝飾著精細的灰泥雕刻。
Gatch is a common material used in traditional Persian architecture. 灰泥是傳統波斯建築中常用的材料。
The palace is famous for its beautiful gatchwork. 這座宮殿以其美麗的石膏裝飾而聞名。
Skilled artisans spent months completing the gatchwork. 熟練的工匠花了數月時間完成灰泥工程。
The cabinet was made from expensive gateado wood. 櫃子是用昂貴的虎木製成的。
Gateado is known for its durability and distinctive grain. 虎木以其耐用性和獨特的紋理而聞名。
Merchants had to pay gateage before entering the city. 商人在進入城市之前必須支付入城費。
The historical records show the amount of gateage collected. 歷史記錄顯示了收取的閘門稅數額。
They walked through a gateless entrance into the garden. 他們穿過一個無門的入口進入花園。
The gateless barrier symbolized open access for all. 無門的障礙象徵著對所有人開放。
The rock formation had a natural gatelike appearance. 岩石結構具有天然的像門一樣的外觀。
A gatelike structure stood at the end of the path. 路的盡頭立著一個像門一樣的結構。
The gatemaker crafted a beautiful iron gate for the estate. 造門匠為莊園製作了一扇美麗的鐵門。
He followed in his father's footsteps as a gatemaker. 他跟隨父親的腳步成為一名造門者。
The gateman checked the identification of everyone who entered. 看門人檢查了每個進入者身分。
As a railway gateman, he was responsible for the safety of the crossing. 作為一名鐵路守閘員，他負責平交道的安全。
The gater stood at the entrance to welcome the guests. 門衛站在入口處歡迎客人的到來。
He was known as a loyal gater who never missed an event. 他被公認為是一個忠實的參加者，從不缺席任何活動。
The gatetender opened the gates for the approaching carriage. 守門人為即將到來的馬車打開了大門。
She worked as a gatetender at the industrial park. 她在工業園區擔任看門人。

meaning: 朝向大門的；守門人（古語）
sentences: He cast a gateward glance as he left the castle. 他離開城堡時向大門投去了一瞥。
The gateward stood guard throughout the night. 守門人整晚都在站崗。
The crowd moved gatewards as the ceremony ended. 儀式結束後，人群向大門移動。
She walked gatewards to meet her arriving friends. 她走向大門去迎接即將到來的朋友。
The gatewayman signaled the driver to stop. 門衛示意司機停車。
A vigilant gatewayman watched over the entrance. 一名警覺的守門人監視著入口。
The panels were arranged gatewise across the opening. 面板像門一樣排列在開口處。
The structure opened gatewise to allow passage. 該結構像門一樣打開以允許通行。
The gatewoman greeted everyone with a kind smile. 女看門人帶著親切的微笑向每個人打招呼。
She has been the gatewoman at the estate for years. 她在莊園擔任女守門人已有多年。
The city's largest gateworks produced thousands of units annually. 該市最大的造門廠每年生產數千個單位。
Many locals are employed at the neighborhood gateworks. 許多當地人在附近的造門廠工作。
The gatewright was known for his exceptional craftsmanship. 這位造門匠以其卓越的工藝而聞名。
Ancient texts mention the importance of the local gatewright. 古代文獻提到當地造門匠的重要性。

meaning: 偈頌；伽陀；（瑣羅亞斯德教）伽薩
sentences: The monk chanted a Gatha during the morning meditation. 僧侶在晨間冥想時誦讀了一段偈頌。
The Gathas are the most sacred texts of Zoroastrianism. 《伽薩》是瑣羅亞斯德教最神聖的文本。
The fallen leaves are easily gatherable with a rake. 掉落的葉子可以用耙子輕鬆收集。
There is plenty of gatherable evidence for the case. 案件有大量可蒐集的證據。
He studied the Gathic hymns of the Avesta. 他研究了《阿維斯陀》中的迦塔讚美詩。
Gathic Avestan is an ancient East Iranian language. 迦塔阿維斯陀語是一種古代東伊朗語言。
The gating system controls the flow of molten metal. 澆注系統控制熔融金屬的流動。
The software uses a gating technique to filter noise. 該軟體使用門控技術來過濾噪音。
He went to the pub for a pint of gatter. 他去酒館喝了一品脫啤酒。
They spent the evening drinking gatter and talking. 他們喝著酒聊天度過了晚上。
The gatteridge tree has bright red berries in autumn. 歐洲衛矛在秋天結出鮮紅色的漿果。
Wood from the gatteridge was traditionally used for spindles. 歐洲衛矛的木材傳統上用於製作紡錘。
She wore a beautiful silver gau around her neck. 她脖子上戴著一個漂亮的銀製嘎烏。
A gau often contains a small statue or a prayer scroll. 嘎烏通常裝有小佛像或經文捲軸。
The gaub tree is native to India and Southeast Asia. 胚乳柿原產於印度和東南亞。
Extract from gaub fruit is used for tanning fishing nets. 胚乳柿果實的提取物用於鞣製漁網。
Don't be such a gauby, pay attention! 別當個傻瓜，注意點！
He was acting like a total gauby at the party. 他在派對上表現得像個十足的笨蛋。
He gauchely knocked over a vase while trying to reach for a snack. 他在拿零食時笨拙地撞倒了一個花瓶。
She smiled gauchely when introduced to the celebrity. 當被介紹給那位名人時，她笨拙地笑了笑。
His gaucheness made him feel uncomfortable in social situations. 他的笨拙讓他在社交場合感到不自在。
She tried to hide her gaucheness with a forced laugh. 她試圖用勉強的笑聲來掩飾自己的笨拙。

meaning: 笨拙的舉止；失禮的行為
sentences: Spilling wine on the host was a major gaucherie. 把酒灑在主人身上是一個嚴重的失禮行為。
Despite his gaucherie, everyone found him charming. 儘管他舉止笨拙，但大家都覺得他很有魅力。
The Gaucho rode his horse across the vast pampas. 高喬人騎馬穿過廣闊的潘帕斯草原。
Traditional Gaucho attire includes a wide-brimmed hat and a poncho. 傳統的高喬人裝束包括寬邊帽和斗篷。

meaning: 華而不實的裝飾品；花哨的小玩意
sentences: The market stall was filled with cheap gauds and trinkets. 市場攤位上擺滿了廉價的花哨飾品和小玩意。
She ignored the golden gauds and chose a simple silver ring. 她無視那些金色的俗氣飾品，選擇了一枚簡單的銀戒指。

meaning: 華麗而俗氣的服飾；花哨的裝飾
sentences: The room was decorated with excessive gaudery for the festival. 為了節日，房間裡裝飾得過於花哨俗氣。
He disliked the gaudery of the modern stage production. 他不喜歡現代舞台劇那種華而不實的裝飾。

meaning: 喜樂主日（將臨期第三主日）
sentences: Gaudete Sunday is marked by the lighting of the rose-colored candle. 喜樂主日的標誌是點燃玫瑰色的蠟燭。
The choir practiced the Gaudete carol for the service. 合唱團為禮拜練習了《喜樂》頌歌。

meaning: 充滿歡樂的；愉快的（古語）
sentences: It was a gaudful occasion for the whole family. 這對全家人來說都是一個充滿歡樂的場合。
They spent a gaudful evening singing and dancing. 他們度過了一個唱歌跳舞的愉快夜晚。
The hotel lobby was gaudily decorated in gold and purple. 飯店大廳裝飾得金紫交輝，非常俗氣。
She was gaudily dressed for what was supposed to be a quiet dinner. 她穿得很花哨去參加原本應該是安靜的晚餐。
The gaudiness of the neon signs was overwhelming. 霓虹燈招牌的俗麗讓人感到受不了。
He was criticized for the gaudiness of his jewelry. 他因首飾過於花哨而受到批評。
She preferred a gaudless style of dress. 她偏好樸素無華的著裝風格。
The gaudless walls of the monastery provided a sense of peace. 修道院樸素的牆壁給人一種寧靜感。
The gaudsman used his stick to keep the cattle in line. 牧牛人揮動棍棒讓牛群排好隊。
He worked as a gaudsman on the large estate. 他在那片大莊園裡擔任牧牛人。
She used a special iron to gaufer the edges of the lace. 她用一把特製的熨斗在蕾絲邊緣壓出褶皺。
The edges of the paper were gaufered for a decorative effect. 紙張邊緣經過壓花處理以達到裝飾效果。
Victorian collars were often meticulously gauffered. 維多利亞時期的衣領通常經過精心熨褶。
The tailor applied a gauffer to the cuffs of the shirt. 裁縫在襯衫袖口做了褶邊。
She wore a bonnet with a gauffered frill. 她戴著一頂帶有褶邊裝飾的軟帽。
The gauffered edges of the book's pages were gilded. 書頁的壓花邊緣鍍了金。
He ordered a gauffre with cream and strawberries. 他點了一份配有鮮奶油和草莓的華夫餅。
The gauffre pattern on the fabric was very delicate. 布料上的壓花圖案非常細緻。
They enjoyed fresh gaufres at the street market in Brussels. 他們在布魯塞爾的街頭市場享用了新鮮的華夫餅。
The velvet was gaufred to create a textured surface. 天鵝絨經過壓花處理以營造出有質感的表面。

meaning: 法式薄餅；網狀切片（尤指馬鈴薯）
sentences: The dessert was served with a crispy gaufrette. 甜點配有一塊酥脆的法式薄餅。
Gaufrette potatoes are a fancy way to serve chips. 網狀切片馬鈴薯是提供炸薯條的一種精緻方式。
The success of the project is easily gaugeable through sales figures. 該專案的成功很容易透過銷售數據來衡量。
Is the depth of the water gaugeable from this point? 從這個點可以測量水深嗎？
The gauger inspected the barrels of spirits in the warehouse. 稅務官檢查了倉庫裡的烈酒桶。
He worked as a gauger for the customs department. 他在海關部門擔任測量員。
He applied for the gaugership in the local district. 他申請了當地區域的測量員職位。
The duties of the gaugership included checking all imported liquids. 測量員職位的職責包括檢查所有進口液體。
Accurate gauging of the pressure is vital for safety. 準確測量壓力對安全至關重要。
The expert spent the day gauging the potential value of the land. 專家花了一整天時間評估這片土地的潛在價值。
