The gasterosteid fishes are known for their bony plates and spines. 刺魚類魚類以其骨板和刺而聞名。
He studied the gasterosteid population in the coastal waters. 他研究了沿海水域的刺魚類種群。
Gasterosteidae includes several species of sticklebacks found in both fresh and salt water. 刺魚科包括在淡水和鹹水中發現的多種刺魚。
The family Gasterosteidae is characterized by the presence of isolated spines on the back. 刺魚科的特徵是背部有孤立的刺。
The specimen exhibited typical gasterosteiform features. 該標本展現了典型的刺魚狀特徵。
Gasterosteiform fishes are widely distributed across the Northern Hemisphere. 刺魚目的魚類廣泛分布於北半球。
They analyzed the gasterosteoid lineage using DNA sequencing. 他們使用 DNA 定序分析了類刺魚的譜系。
The gasterosteoid group includes some very specialized fish. 刺魚超科群體包括一些非常特化的魚類。
Gasterosteus aculeatus is the scientific name for the three-spined stickleback. Gasterosteus aculeatus 是三刺魚的科學名稱。
Members of the Gasterosteus genus are often used in behavioral studies. 刺魚屬的成員常用於行為研究。

meaning: 腹鞘（某些昆蟲蛹的腹部外殼）
sentences: The gasterotheca protects the developing abdomen of the pupa. 腹鞘保護著發育中的蛹腹部。
Biologists examined the structure of the gasterotheca under a microscope. 生物學家在顯微鏡下檢查了腹鞘的結構。
The gasterothecal markings are distinct in this species of moth. 這種蛾類的腹鞘標記非常明顯。
They observed gasterothecal changes during the late pupal stage. 他們觀察了蛹期晚期的腹鞘變化。
Gasterotricha is a phylum of microscopic animals found in aquatic environments. 腹毛動物門是在水生環境中發現的微觀動物門。
Animals in the phylum Gasterotricha are often called gastrotrichs. 腹毛動物門的動物通常被稱為腹毛蟲。
The gasterotrichan body is covered with scales or spines. 腹毛動物的身體覆蓋著鱗片或刺。
She identified several gasterotrichan species in the pond sample. 她在池塘樣本中鑑定出了幾種腹毛動物。

meaning: 營養體（水螅型群體中負責攝食的個體）
sentences: The gasterozooid is responsible for capturing food for the entire colony. 營養體負責為整個群體捕捉食物。
In many siphonophores, the gasterozooid has a single long tentacle. 在許多管水母中，營養體有一條長觸手。
The samples were stored in a gastight container to prevent contamination. 樣本儲存在氣密容器中以防止污染。
Ensure the valve is gastight before starting the experiment. 在開始實驗前確保閥門是不透氣的。
The gastightness of the seal was tested under high pressure. 密封件的氣密性在高壓下進行了測試。
Engineers improved the gastightness of the storage tank. 工程師提高了儲罐的不透氣性。

meaning: 冠恐鳥屬（一種大型滅絕鳥類）
sentences: Gastornis was a flightless bird that lived millions of years ago. 冠恐鳥是數百萬年前生活的一種不飛鳥類。
Fossils of Gastornis have been found in both Europe and North America. 冠恐鳥的化石在歐洲和北美都有發現。
The family Gastornithidae includes some of the largest birds of their time. 冠恐鳥科包括當時一些體型最大的鳥類。
Studies of Gastornithidae provide insight into early avian evolution. 對冠恐鳥科的研究為早期鳥類進化提供了見解。
Gastradenitis can cause severe stomach pain and indigestion. 胃腺炎可能引起嚴重的胃痛和消化不良。
The doctor diagnosed the patient with chronic gastradenitis. 醫生診斷病人患有慢性胃腺炎。
The development proceeded gastraead during the embryonic stage. 在胚胎階段，發育向原腸方向進行。
He described the gastraead movement of the cells. 他描述了細胞向原腸方向的運動。
The gastraeal cavity forms during the process of gastrulation. 原腸腔在原腸形成過程中產生。
Gastraeal development is a fundamental process in many animals. 原腸發育是許多動物的基本過程。

meaning: 原腸；腹面（某些無脊椎動物）
sentences: The gastraeum is an important structure in early development. 原腸是早期發育中的一個重要結構。
He examined the gastraeum of the flatworm specimen. 他檢查了扁蟲標本的腹面。
He suffered from gastralgic episodes after eating spicy food. 吃完辛辣食物後，他會遭遇胃痛發作。
The patient complained of constant gastralgic discomfort. 病人抱怨持續的胃痛不適。
Gastralgy is often a symptom of underlying digestive issues. 胃痛通常是潛在消化系統問題的症狀。
She took some herbal tea to relieve her gastralgy. 她喝了一些草本茶來緩解胃痛。
Gastraneuria can lead to abnormal stomach contractions. 胃神經衰弱可能導致異常的胃收縮。
The medical student researched the causes of gastraneuria. 醫學生研究了胃神經衰弱的病因。
Gastrasthenia makes it difficult for the stomach to digest food properly. 胃弱使得胃難以正常消化食物。
A light diet is recommended for individuals with gastrasthenia. 對於胃弱的人，建議採用清淡飲食。
Gastratrophia can result in reduced secretion of gastric juices. 胃萎縮可能導致胃液分泌減少。
The doctor monitored the patient for signs of gastratrophia. 醫生監測病人的胃萎縮跡象。
Gastrectasis is a condition where the stomach becomes abnormally large. 胃擴張是胃變得異常大的一種狀況。
Severe cases of gastrectasis require immediate medical attention. 嚴重的胃擴張病例需要立即就醫。
Gastrelcosis can be caused by bacteria or excessive acid production. 胃潰瘍可能由細菌或過量胃酸分泌引起。
He was treated for gastrelcosis with medication and lifestyle changes. 他接受了藥物治療和生活方式改變來治療胃潰瘍。
Chronic gastricism can affect a person's quality of life. 慢性胃病會影響一個人的生活品質。
He consulted a specialist to address his gastricism. 他諮詢了專家來處理他的胃部不適。
Some bees are gastrilegous, carrying pollen on their abdominal hairs. 某些蜜蜂是腹部採粉的，將花粉攜帶在腹部毛髮上。
The scientist categorized the insect as a gastrilegous species. 科學家將該昆蟲分類為腹部採粉的物種。
The performer had remarkable gastriloquial skills. 表演者擁有非凡的腹語技巧。
They were amazed by the gastriloquial illusion. 他們對腹語術的錯覺感到驚訝。
Gastriloquism is an ancient art form used for entertainment. 腹語術是用於娛樂的古老藝術形式。
He practiced gastriloquism for years to master the technique. 他練習了多年的腹語術以掌握這項技術。
The gastriloquist made the puppet appear to speak on its own. 腹語表演者讓木偶看起來像是在自己說話。
A famous gastriloquist performed at the city theater. 一位著名的腹語表演者在城市劇院表演。

meaning: 山桃草屬 (柳葉菜科的一屬植物)
sentences: The Gaura plant is known for its delicate white and pink flowers. 山桃草以其精緻的白色和粉紅色花朵而聞名。
Many gardeners include Gaura in their landscapes for its airy appearance. 許多園丁因其輕盈的外觀而在景觀中種植山桃草。
The Gaurian languages are a subgroup of Indo-Aryan languages. 高爾語支是印度-雅利安語支的一個分支。
He studied Gaurian architecture during his trip to India. 他在印度旅行期間研究了高爾式建築。

meaning: 高斯 (gauss 的變體或拼寫錯誤)
sentences: The term 'gaus' is often seen as a misspelling of the magnetic unit 'gauss'. 「gaus」一詞通常被視為磁單位「gauss」的拼寫錯誤。
In some old texts, you might find gaus used instead of gauss. 在一些舊文本中，你可能會發現使用 gaus 而非 gauss。
A gauss is a unit of magnetic induction in the CGS system. 高斯是厘米-克-秒制中的磁感應強度單位。
The magnetic field strength was measured in gauss. 磁場強度是以高斯為單位測量的。

meaning: 以高斯計量的磁感應強度
sentences: The scientist calculated the gaussage of the electromagnet. 科學家計算了該電磁鐵的高斯磁感應強度。
A higher gaussage indicates a stronger magnetic field. 較高的高斯值表示較強的磁場。

meaning: 高斯山岩 (一種富含亮石的火山岩)
sentences: Gaussbergite was first identified on Mount Gauss in Antarctica. 高斯山岩最初是在南極洲的高斯山發現的。
Geologists studied the mineral composition of the gaussbergite sample. 地質學家研究了高斯山岩樣本的礦物成分。
The Gaussian distribution is also known as the normal distribution. 高斯分佈也稱為正態分佈。
They applied a Gaussian filter to smooth the digital image. 他們應用了高斯濾波器來平滑數位圖像。
He liked to gauster with his friends at the local pub. 他喜歡在當地的酒吧和朋友們大聲閒聊。
Stop gaustering and get back to work! 別再吹牛了，回去工作吧！
The town gausterer was always telling tall tales. 鎮上的吹牛大王總是在講離譜的故事。
He was known as a loud gausterer who never knew when to stop. 他被公認為一個大聲閒聊且不知何時該停止的人。
The traveler crossed the mountain gaut before sunset. 旅人在日落前穿越了山間山口。
People gathered at the gaut to bathe in the holy river. 人們聚集在河岸台階（碼頭）處，在聖河中沐浴。

meaning: 斜閃煌斑岩 (一種火成岩)
sentences: Gauteite is a fine-grained, porphyritic igneous rock. 斜閃煌斑岩是一種細粒的斑狀火成岩。
The researcher found deposits of gauteite in the valley. 研究人員在山谷中發現了斜閃煌斑岩的沉積物。

meaning: 像紗布一樣的；薄而透明的
sentences: She wore a gauzelike scarf that fluttered in the breeze. 她戴著一條像紗布一樣輕薄的圍巾，在微風中飄動。
The morning mist had a gauzelike quality over the lake. 湖面上的晨霧呈現出一種薄如蟬翼的質感。
The gauzewing insect is beneficial for organic gardens. 這種薄翅昆蟲對有機花園是有益的。
We observed the delicate structure of the gauzewing's flight. 我們觀察了薄翅昆蟲飛行時的精緻結構。
The curtains were gauzily translucent, letting in the soft light. 窗簾薄透如紗，讓柔和的光線透進來。
The dancer was gauzily dressed in layers of silk. 舞者穿著層層薄如蟬翼的絲綢。
The gauziness of the fabric made it ideal for summer wear. 布料的輕薄感使其成為夏季穿著的理想選擇。
The photographer captured the gauziness of the dragonfly's wings. 攝影師捕捉到了蜻蜓翅膀那如薄紗般的透明感。
A gauzy mist covered the valley in the early morning. 清晨，一層薄紗般的霧氣籠罩著山谷。
She chose a gauzy gown for the garden party. 她為花園派對選擇了一件輕薄透明的禮服。
He used to gavall about the city all night long. 他以前常常整晚在城市裡到處閒逛。
Don't just gavall around; find something useful to do. 別只是到處遊蕩，找點有用的事情做。
She gave him a book for his birthday. 她送給他一本書作為生日禮物。
The teacher gave the students clear instructions. 老師給了學生們明確的指示。

meaning: 木槌 (主席或法官用)；地租 (古語)
sentences: The judge banged his gavel to bring the court to order. 法官敲擊木槌，要求法庭保持秩序。
In medieval times, 'gavel' could refer to a type of rent or tribute. 在中世紀，「gavel」可以指一種租金或貢品。

meaning: 稅金或地租的收受者或繳納者 (古語)；採礦官員
sentences: The gaveler was responsible for collecting mining dues. 採礦官員負責收取採礦規費。
A gaveler in the forest of Dean held specific administrative powers. 迪恩森林的採礦官員擁有特定的行政權力。

meaning: 諸子均分繼承制 (一種古老的土地繼承制度)
sentences: Gavelkind was a common land-tenure system in Kent, England. 諸子均分繼承制是英格蘭肯特郡常見的土地所有制系統。
Under gavelkind, land was divided equally among all sons. 在諸子均分繼承制下，土地在所有兒子之間平均分配。

meaning: 諸子均分制下的土地持有者
sentences: The gavelkinder maintained the family lands through generations. 諸子均分制下的土地持有者世世代代維護著家族土地。
Historians studied the legal rights of the gavelkinder. 歷史學家研究了諸子均分制下土地持有者的法律權利。
The gavelman paid his dues to the lord of the manor. 諸子均分制下的佃農向莊園主繳納費用。
Each gavelman had a specific portion of land to cultivate. 每個諸子均分制下的佃農都有一塊特定的土地進行耕作。
He used a gavelock to pry open the heavy stone slab. 他用鐵槓撬開了沉重的石板。
Ancient warriors sometimes carried a gavelock into battle. 古代戰士有時會攜帶標槍參加戰鬥。
The Gavia genus includes several species of loons. 潛鳥屬包括幾種潛鳥（loon）。
Gavia immer is the common loon found in North America. 普通潛鳥是北美常見的潛鳥屬鳥類。
Gaviae was once used to classify all loons and their relatives. Gaviae 曾被用來分類所有的潛鳥及其親緣動物。
The suborder Gaviae has been largely replaced in modern taxonomy. 在現代分類學中，Gaviae 亞目已在很大程度上被取代。
The gavial is distinguished by its long, thin snout. 長吻鱷的特徵是其細長的吻部。
Efforts are being made to conserve the endangered gavial in India. 印度正在努力保護瀕危的長吻鱷。

meaning: 長吻鱷屬 (爬行動物的一屬)
sentences: Gavialis is the type genus of the family Gavialidae. 長吻鱷屬是長吻鱷科的模式屬。
The only living species in the Gavialis genus is the gharial. 長吻鱷屬中唯一現存的物種是長吻鱷（gharial）。

meaning: 類長吻鱷的；像長吻鱷的
sentences: The fossil had gavialoid features, suggesting it lived in water. 該化石具有類長吻鱷的特徵，表明它生活在水中。
They identified a gavialoid crocodilian from the Eocene epoch. 他們鑑定出一種始新世的類長吻鱷類鱷魚。
Gaviiformes consists of highly specialized aquatic birds. 潛鳥目由高度特化的水生鳥類組成。
Loons are the primary representatives of the order Gaviiformes. 潛鳥是潛鳥目的主要代表。

meaning: 嘉禾舞曲 (18世紀法國的一種中速舞蹈)
sentences: The orchestra played a graceful gavotte. 管弦樂隊演奏了一首優雅的嘉禾舞曲。
Learning the steps of a gavotte takes practice. 學習嘉禾舞曲的舞步需要練習。

meaning: 伽維尤提 (古印度長度單位，約3.2至3.7公里)
sentences: The ancient text mentions a distance of one gavyuti. 古文獻中提到了一伽維尤提的距離。
A gavyuti is traditionally the distance at which a cow's lowing can be heard. 伽維尤提傳統上是指能聽到牛鳴聲的距離。

meaning: 小溝；排水溝 (主要見於蘇格蘭方言)
sentences: Water drained slowly through the gaw in the field. 水沿著田裡的小溝緩慢排出。
He cleared the gaw to prevent flooding. 他清理了排水溝以防止淹水。
Don't be such a gawby! 別當那樣的傻瓜！
The gawby lost his way in the small town. 那個笨蛋在小鎮裡迷路了。

meaning: 豐滿的；愉快的；莊重的 (蘇格蘭語，同 gawsie)
sentences: She was a gawcie woman with a kind heart. 她是個豐滿愉快、心腸很好的女人。
The gawcie appearance of the host made everyone feel welcome. 主人莊重愉快的樣子讓每個人都感到受歡迎。
Don't just stand there and gawk at the accident. 別只是在那裡發呆看著事故。
He is such a gawk that he often trips over his own feet. 他是個呆子，經常自己絆倒自己。
The gawkhammer broke the vase by accident. 那個笨手笨腳的人不小心打破了花瓶。
Stop acting like a gawkhammer. 別表現得像個笨蛋。
His gawkihood was apparent to everyone in the room. 房裡的每個人都看出了他呆頭呆腦的樣子。
She laughed at the gawkihood of the young boy. 她嘲笑那個男孩笨拙的模樣。
He walked gawkily across the stage. 他笨拙地走過舞台。
The teenager answered the question gawkily. 那個青少年呆頭呆腦地回答了問題。
His gawkiness made him feel self-conscious in public. 他的笨拙讓他公眾場合感到侷促不安。
The puppy's gawkiness was rather charming. 小狗笨拙的樣子相當迷人。
He was a gawkish youth with long limbs. 他是一個四肢修長、舉止笨拙的青年。
Her gawkish behavior at the party was noticed by many. 她在派對上笨拙的行為被許多人注意到了。
She gawkishly tried to dance. 她笨拙地嘗試跳舞。
The intern gawkishly handled the delicate equipment. 實習生笨拙地操作著精密的設備。
He tried to hide his gawkishness behind a smile. 他試圖用微笑來掩飾他的笨拙。
The movie captures the gawkishness of adolescence. 這部電影捕捉了青春期的笨拙。
The boy was tall, thin, and gawky. 那男孩又高又瘦，而且舉止笨拙。
She felt gawky in her new dress. 她穿著新洋裝感到很不自在。
He stood there to gawm at the tall building. 他站在那裡發呆看著那棟大樓。
I can't gawm what he is saying. 我聽不懂他在說什麼。
He carried a gawn of water to the garden. 他提著一小桶水去花園。
The gawn was filled with fresh milk. 小桶裡裝滿了新鮮的牛奶。
That gawney doesn't know what he's doing. 那個傻瓜不知道自己在做什麼。
Don't listen to that gawney. 別聽那個笨蛋的話。

meaning: 豐滿的；愉快的；莊重的 (蘇格蘭語)
sentences: He was a gawsie man, full of life. 他是個愉快莊重、充滿活力的人。
The gawsie old lady told us many stories. 那位豐滿愉快的長者給我們講了許多故事。

meaning: 大額牛 (東南亞的一種半馴化牛)
sentences: The gayal is an important animal in certain Asian cultures. 大額牛在某些亞洲文化中是重要的動物。
We saw a herd of gayal in the forest. 我們在森林裡看到了一群大額牛。

meaning: 伽耶特黎 (吠陀經中最神聖的咒語之一)
sentences: The Gayatri mantra is chanted daily by many. 許多人每天都會吟誦伽耶特黎咒。
She studied the spiritual meaning of the gayatri. 她研究了伽耶特黎的靈性意義。

meaning: 蔦蘿 (旋花科植物，花朵鮮艷)
sentences: The gaybine climbed up the trellis. 蔦蘿爬上了格子架。
Vibrant flowers bloomed on the gaybine. 蔦蘿上開出了鮮艷的花朵。

meaning: 流浪漢新手 (不以流浪為職業的人)
sentences: The experienced hobo gave some advice to the gaycat. 經驗豐富的流浪漢給了那個新手一些建議。
He was just a gaycat traveling for adventure. 他只是個為了冒險而旅行的流浪漢新手。

meaning: 安南的一種小船 (越南地區的傳統帆船)
sentences: The gaydiang sailed smoothly along the coast. 那艘安南小船沿著海岸平穩航行。
Fishermen used the gaydiang for their daily work. 漁民們使用安南小船進行日常工作。

meaning: 略微快樂的；稍微華麗的
sentences: She wore a gayish hat to the garden party. 她戴了一頂略顯華麗的帽子去參加遊園會。
He felt in a gayish mood after the news. 聽到消息後，他的心情變得有些愉快。

meaning: 山桑子屬 (杜鵑花科的一屬植物)
sentences: Gaylussacia species are often found in acidic soils. 山桑子屬植物常生長在酸性土壤中。
The berries of Gaylussacia are edible. 山桑子屬植物的漿果是可以食用的。
The geologist identified the crystals as gaylussite. 地質學家鑑定出這些晶體是碳鈉鈣石。
Gaylussite is found in certain lake deposits. 碳鈉鈣石存在於某些湖泊沉積物中。
Her gayment sparkled under the candlelight. 她的飾物在燭光下閃閃發光。
The museum displays ancient gayments. 博物館展示了古代的華麗飾物。
The gayness of the flowers brightened the room. 花朵的鮮艷讓房間亮了起來。
He expressed his gayness openly. 他公開表達了自己的同性戀身份。

meaning: 海鸚或海雀 (一種色彩鮮艷的海鳥)
sentences: The Gaypoo bird nested on the high cliffs. 那種海鳥在高高的懸崖上築巢。
Observers spotted a Gaypoo near the shore. 觀察者在岸邊發現了一隻那種海鳥。
The children sang a gaysome song. 孩子們唱著一首愉快的歌。
It was a gaysome occasion for everyone. 對每個人來說，這都是一個快樂的場合。
Gaywings are delicate wildflowers found in North American forests. 翼狀遠志是北美森林中發現的精緻野花。
The pink flowers of gaywings bloom in the spring. 翼狀遠志的粉色花朵在春天綻放。
The gayyou is a traditional vessel used in the Philippines. 菲律賓雙桅小船是菲律賓使用的一種傳統船隻。
Fishermen steered the gayyou through the calm waters. 漁民駕駛著這艘菲律賓雙桅小船穿過平靜的水面。

meaning: 葛次（波斯長度單位或糖果）
sentences: The merchant measured the cloth using a gaz. 商人使用葛次作為長度單位來測量布料。
He brought home some sweet gaz from his travels in Iran. 他從伊朗旅行帶回了一些甜美的葛次糖。
Some tall gazabo was standing in our way. 有個高大的傢伙擋住了我們的去路。
Who is that strange gazabo over there? 那邊那個奇怪的傢伙是誰？
Gazangabin is a type of medicinal manna found in Persia. 波斯甘露是發現於波斯的一種藥用甘露。
The resin known as gazangabin is collected from shrubs. 被稱為波斯甘露的樹脂是從灌木中收集的。
Gazania is a genus of flowering plants native to Southern Africa. 勳章菊屬是原產於南部非洲的一個開花植物屬。
The bright colors of Gazania make it a popular garden choice. 勳章菊屬明亮的色彩使其成為受歡迎的園藝選擇。
We sat in the gazebo to escape the afternoon sun. 我們坐在涼亭裡躲避下午的陽光。
A small wooden gazebo stood in the center of the park. 公園中心矗立著一座小型木製涼亭。
The celebrity felt uncomfortable being the gazee of so many people. 這位名人對於成為這麼多人的注視對象感到不舒服。
In this experiment, the gazee is asked to report their feelings. 在這個實驗中，被注視者被要求報告他們的感受。
A greyhound is a well-known type of gazehound. 靈犬是一種著名的視獵犬。
Gazehounds hunt by sight rather than by scent. 視獵犬靠視覺而非嗅覺狩獵。
He wrote a beautiful gazel dedicated to his love. 他寫了一首美麗的迦扎勒詩獻給他的愛人。
The traditional gazel has a specific rhyming pattern. 傳統的迦扎勒詩具有特定的押韻模式。
She stared into the distance with a gazeless expression. 她帶著空洞無光的表情凝視著遠方。
The gazeless eyes of the statue seemed to follow me. 雕像那沒有神采的眼睛似乎在跟著我。
The genus Gazella includes several species of small antelopes. 瞪羚屬包含幾種小型羚羊。
Zoologists studied the migration patterns of Gazella. 動物學家研究了瞪羚屬的遷徙模式。
The gazelle ran swiftly across the African savanna. 瞪羚在非洲大草原上迅捷地奔跑。
We saw a herd of gazelles near the watering hole. 我們在水坑附近看到了一群瞪羚。
The dancer's movements had a graceful, gazelline quality. 舞者的動作具有一種優美如瞪羚般的特質。
He admired the gazelline beauty of the wildlife. 他欣賞野生動物如瞪羚般的美感。
The beautiful view was worthy of long gazement. 美麗的景色值得長久注視。
His constant gazement made her nervous. 他不斷的注視讓她感到緊張。
The star gazer spent all night looking through his telescope. 那位觀星者花了一整晚透過望遠鏡觀看。
She ignored the gazers as she walked down the street. 她走在街上時無視那些注視著她的人。
The new law came into effect after its gazettal. 這項新法律在政府公報刊登後生效。
Official gazettal is required for all government appointments. 所有政府任命都需要在公報上正式刊登。
I consulted the gazetteer to find the exact location of the village. 我查閱了地名辭典以尋找該村莊的確切位置。
A comprehensive gazetteer is an essential tool for historians. 詳盡的地名辭典是歷史學家的重要工具。
The library houses an impressive collection of gazetteerage. 圖書館館藏了令人印象深刻的地名辭典全集。
His research involved studying the entire gazetteerage of the region. 他的研究涉及研究該地區的所有地名辭典。
The travel guide was a bit too gazetteerish and lacked personal stories. 這本旅遊指南有點太像地名辭典了，缺乏個人故事。
His writing style is very factual and gazetteerish. 他的寫作風格非常寫實且像辭典。
He held the post of gazetteership for twenty years. 他擔任地名辭典編纂官一職長達二十年。
The responsibilities of gazetteership include maintaining accurate records. 地名辭典編纂官的職責包括維護準確的記錄。
The gazi was honored for his bravery in battle. 這位聖戰士因其在戰鬥中的英勇而受到表彰。
Historically, a gazi was a Muslim warrior. 從歷史上看，gazi 是一位穆斯林戰士。
Gazing at the stars can be a peaceful experience. 凝視星空可以是一次平靜的體驗。
She was gazing out the window, lost in thought. 她正凝視著窗外，陷入了沉思。
He looked at her gazingly, full of admiration. 他充滿欽佩地凝視著她。
The children watched the magician gazingly. 孩子們全神貫注地看著魔術師。
He was made a gazingstock by his enemies. 他被敵人變成了眾人的笑柄。
She feared becoming a gazingstock after her public failure. 她擔心在公開失敗後會成為眾矢之的。

meaning: 汽水製造機；煤氣發生爐
sentences: The victorian family used a gazogene to make soda water. 維多利亞時代的家庭使用汽水製造機來製作蘇打水。
During the fuel shortage, some cars were fitted with a gazogene. 在燃料短缺期間，一些汽車加裝了煤氣發生爐。
The gardener carefully laid the gazon on the lawn. 園丁小心地在草坪上鋪上草皮。
A fresh layer of gazon made the garden look complete. 一層新的草皮讓花園看起來更完美。
The gazophylacium held the treasures of the ancient temple. 寶庫中收藏著古老神廟的珍寶。
Researchers studied the inscriptions near the gazophylacium. 研究人員研究了寶庫附近的銘文。
He had a gazy look in his eyes after waking up. 他醒來後眼神中帶著一絲茫然的注視。
The gazy atmosphere of the room felt dreamlike. 房間裡那種注視般的氛圍感覺如夢似幻。

meaning: 葛塞塔（古幣或早期報紙）
sentences: The gazzetta was a small copper coin used in Venice. 葛塞塔是威尼斯使用的一種小型銅幣。
Early newspapers were often called gazzettas because of their price. 早期的報紙常因其售價而被稱為葛塞塔。
Ge is the chemical symbol for germanium. Ge 是化學元素鍺的符號。
The scientist identified Ge in the sample. 科學家在樣本中識別出了鍺。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ge（通常指鍺或相關術語）。
sentences: Writers use ge for rare or specialized English term recorded as ge. 作者將 ge 用於記錄為 ge 的罕見或專業英語術語。
The word ge still appears in older books and notes. ge 這個詞仍出現在較舊的書籍和筆記中。

meaning: 陸生肉食亞目（甲蟲），現通常歸類於肉食亞目
sentences: Geadephaga includes many species of terrestrial carnivorous beetles. 陸生肉食亞目包括許多種陸生肉食性甲蟲。
The study focused on the classification of Geadephaga. 該研究側重於陸生肉食亞目的分類。

meaning: 屬於或關於陸生肉食亞目的
sentences: Geadephagous beetles are primarily found on the ground. 陸生肉食亞目的甲蟲主要出現在地面上。
We observed several geadephagous species in the forest. 我們在森林中觀察到了幾種陸生肉食亞目的物種。

meaning: 地球的；土地的（罕見用法）
sentences: The term geal is an archaic way to describe something terrestrial. geal 是一個用來描述陸生事物的古老詞彙。
Scientists rarely use the word geal in modern reports. 科學家在現代報告中很少使用 geal 這個詞。
The gean tree produces small, sweet cherries. 野櫻桃樹結出甜美的小櫻桃。
Gean blossoms are beautiful in the springtime. 野櫻桃花在春天非常美麗。
The geanticlinal structure was identified by geologists. 地質學家識別出了地背斜結構。
The report described the region's geanticlinal features. 報告描述了該地區的地背斜特徵。

meaning: 地背斜（地殼的大規模寬闊向上褶皺）
sentences: A geanticline is the opposite of a geosyncline. 地背斜是地槽的反向結構。
Over millions of years, the geanticline continued to rise. 經過數百萬年，地背斜持續上升。

meaning: 配有齒輪的；調整後的；連接的
sentences: The machine is geared for high-speed production. 這台機器是為了高速生產而設計調整的。
The bike is geared with multiple speeds. 這輛自行車配有多種變速齒輪。
Gearksutite is a fluoride mineral found in some volcanic areas. 氟鋁鈣石是某些火山地區發現的一種氟化物礦物。
The researchers analyzed the composition of gearksutite. 研究人員分析了氟鋁鈣石的成分。
The gearless motor operates very quietly. 無齒輪馬達運行非常安靜。
They designed a gearless transmission system. 他們設計了一種無齒輪傳動系統。
The gearman inspected the machinery daily. 齒輪工每天檢查機械。
He was hired as a gearman for the factory. 他被聘為工廠的齒輪管理員。
The mechanic replaced the entire gearset. 技工更換了整個齒輪組。
A high-quality gearset is essential for the vehicle. 高品質的齒輪組對車輛至關重要。
He moved the gearshift into second gear. 他將變速桿撥到二檔。
The gearshift in the old car was a bit stiff. 舊車的換檔裝置有點僵硬。
The clock's tiny gearwheel stopped turning. 時鐘的小齒輪停止了轉動。
Engineers measured the diameter of the gearwheel. 工程師測量了齒輪的直徑。

meaning: 鯡魚計量單位（約500條；古語或方言）
sentences: Fishermen used to measure their catch in gease. 漁民過去曾用 gease 來計量捕獲量。
The word gease is rarely heard in modern times. gease 這個詞在現代很少聽到了。
Fresh fruit was geason during the long winter. 在漫長的冬天裡，新鮮水果非常罕見。
The manuscript uses the word geason to mean scarce. 該手稿使用 geason 一詞來表示稀缺。
Geaster is a genus of fungi known as earthstars. 地星屬是一類被稱為地星的真菌。
We found a Geaster specimen in the damp forest. 我們在潮濕的森林中發現了一個地星屬標本。

meaning: 蓋亞特人（北日耳曼部落成員）
sentences: Beowulf was a famous hero of the Geat tribe. 貝武夫是蓋亞特部落著名的英雄。
The Geat culture is part of Scandinavian history. 蓋亞特文化是斯堪地那維亞歷史的一部分。
The sheep passed through the old geat. 羊群穿過那扇舊門。
He opened the geat to let the cart in. 他打開門讓馬車進來。
The Geatas were known for their seafaring skills. 蓋亞特人以其航海技能聞名。
Ancient poems tell the stories of the Geatas. 古詩講述了蓋亞特人的故事。
The gebang palm is used for its fiber in Southeast Asia. 在東南亞，哥白納櫚因其纖維而被利用。
Leaves of the gebang are woven into mats. 哥白納櫚的葉子被編成墊子。
The bag was made from strong gebanga fiber. 這個袋子是由堅韌的哥白納櫚纖維製成的。
He studied the commercial uses of gebanga. 他研究了哥白納櫚纖維的商業用途。
The bird's gebbie was full of seeds. 這隻鳥的嗉囊塞滿了種子。
He complained of a full gebbie after the feast. 宴會後，他抱怨肚子吃得很飽。
The gebur worked on the lord's land. 佃農在領主的土地上勞作。
Life was difficult for a gebur in Anglo-Saxon times. 在盎格魯-撒克遜時代，佃農的生活很艱難。
Gecarcinidae are a family of crabs that live on land. 地蟹科是生活在陸地上的一科螃蟹。
Scientific studies on Gecarcinidae often occur on islands. 對地蟹科的科學研究經常在島嶼上進行。
Gecarcinus is a prominent genus within the land crab family. 地蟹屬是地蟹科中一個著名的屬。
The migration of Gecarcinus crabs is a spectacular sight. 地蟹屬螃蟹的遷徙是一個壯觀的景象。
The cruel boys would geck at the newcomer. 那些殘忍的男孩會嘲笑新來的人。
He was made a geck by his clever friends. 他被他聰明的朋友們當成了傻瓜。
A gecko climbed up the wall of the house. 一隻壁虎爬上了房子的牆壁。
Geckos are known for their ability to stick to surfaces. 壁虎以其附著在表面上的能力而聞名。
The lizard had a geckoid appearance. 這隻蜥蜴具有壁虎狀的外觀。
Researchers studied the geckoid features of the specimen. 研究人員研究了該標本的壁虎狀特徵。
Orange geckotian scales shimmered under the light. 橘色的壁虎類鱗片在燈光下閃爍。
The geckotian features of the lizard were quite prominent. 這隻蜥蜴的壁虎特徵非常明顯。
A small geckotid climbed slowly up the window pane. 一隻小壁虎緩緩爬上窗玻璃。
He studied the geckotid's ability to stick to smooth surfaces. 他研究了壁虎黏在平滑表面的能力。
Geckotidae includes hundreds of different species of geckos. 壁虎科包含數百種不同的壁虎。
The researcher specializes in the evolutionary history of Geckotidae. 這位研究員專精於壁虎科的演化史。
The toy had a geckotoid appearance with large, bulging eyes. 這款玩具有著壁虎狀的外型，還有大大的凸眼。
She found a geckotoid fossil in the ancient sedimentary rock. 她在古代沉積岩中發現了一塊壁虎狀的化石。

meaning: 傑德（人名；傑拉德或傑拉爾德的簡稱）
sentences: Ged was the main character in the fantasy novel. 傑德是那部奇幻小說的主角。
Everyone in the village knew Ged for his kindness. 村裡的每個人都因為傑德的善良而認識他。
The old fisherman caught a large ged in the lake. 老漁夫在湖裡抓到了一條大白斑狗魚。
A silver ged swam quickly through the tall water weeds. 一條銀色的白斑狗魚快速穿過高大的水草。
The organist chose a gedackt stop for the quiet passage. 風琴手在安靜的段落選擇了蓋管音栓。
A gedackt pipe produces a softer, more rounded tone. 蓋管音管會產生較柔和、較圓潤的音色。
Gedanite is often found alongside amber in the Baltic region. 蓋丹樹脂常在波羅的海地區與琥珀一同被發現。
The collector displayed a rare piece of yellow gedanite. 收藏家展示了一塊罕見的黃色蓋丹樹脂。
The town's gedder spent his afternoons wandering the park. 鎮上的遊蕩者整個下午都在公園裡閒逛。
He was known as a restless gedder who never stayed in one place. 他被公認為一個坐不住的遊蕩者，從不在一個地方停留。
He repaired a leaky gedeckt pipe in the church organ. 他修理了教堂風琴中一個漏氣的蓋管音管。
The gedeckt sound added a unique layer to the music. 蓋管音色為音樂增添了獨特的層次。
The new gedecktwork provided a warm foundation for the choir. 新的蓋管音管組為合唱團提供了溫暖的基礎音效。
Maintenance of the gedecktwork requires specialized skills. 蓋管音管組的維護需要專業技能。
The Gederathite was mentioned in the ancient historical records. 那位基德拉人在古代歷史記錄中被提及。
She studied the culture and traditions of the Gederathite people. 她研究了基德拉人的文化與傳統。
He was identified as a Gederite by his traditional clothing. 他因其傳統服飾而被辨認出是基德爾人。
The Gederite leader negotiated a peace treaty with the neighbors. 基德爾領袖與鄰邦談判達成了一項和平協議。
Gedrite crystals are typically dark brown or black. 鋁直閃石晶體通常呈深褐色或黑色。
The geologist identified gedrite in the metamorphic rock sample. 地質學家在變質岩樣本中鑑定出了鋁直閃石。
Gee, I didn't expect to see you here today! 噢，我沒想到今天會在這裡見到你！
Gee, that's a very impressive collection of books. 天哪，那組藏書真是令人印象深刻。
The farmer shouted to make the horse gee toward the field. 農夫大喊讓馬向右轉向田野。
You need to learn how to make the team gee and haw correctly. 你需要學習如何正確讓馬群向右轉和向左轉。
A yellow geebong flower bloomed in the dry Australian bush. 一朵黃色的金棒木花在乾燥的澳洲叢林中綻放。
Birds love to eat the small fruits of the geebong. 鳥類喜歡吃金棒木的小果實。
The geebung shrub is native to many parts of Australia. 金棒木灌木原產於澳洲許多地區。
He collected geebung leaves for his botanical study. 他收集了金棒木葉子進行植物學研究。
The Geechee culture is famous for its unique language and crafts. 基奇文化以其獨特的語言和手工藝聞名。
He visited the islands to learn more about Geechee traditions. 他訪問了這些島嶼以了解更多關於基奇人的傳統。
The toddler pointed at the field and yelled "geejee!" 蹣跚學步的孩子指著田野大喊「馬兒！」
She bought her daughter a small wooden geejee for her birthday. 她買了一個小木馬送給女兒當生日禮物。
The fisherman caught a massive geelbec off the coast of South Africa. 漁夫在南非海岸附近抓到了一條巨大的黃嘴石首魚。
Grilled geelbec is a popular dish in many local restaurants. 烤黃嘴石首魚是當地許多餐廳的熱門菜餚。
The vet diagnosed the sheep with geeldikkop after examining its symptoms. 獸醫在檢查症狀後診斷這隻羊患有頭部腫脹病。
Farmers must watch for geeldikkop when sheep graze on certain weeds. 當羊在某些雜草上吃草時，農夫必須注意防範頭部腫脹病。
Antique furniture made from geelhout is highly valued today. 如今，由黃木製成的古董家具價值極高。
The geelhout tree provides excellent timber for construction. 黃木樹為建築提供了優良的木材。
In the old engineering textbook, mass was sometimes measured in geepounds. 在舊的工程教科書中，質量有時以斯勒格為單位測量。
One geepound is equivalent to about 14.59 kilograms. 一個斯勒格大約等於 14.59 公斤。
His geerah made him very protective of his family's privacy. 他的保護意識使他非常保護家人的隱私。
The concept of geerah is important in certain cultural traditions. 保護性熱忱的概念在某些文化傳統中非常重要。
The geest area was difficult to farm due to its sandy soil. 由於土壤沙化，這片沙荒地很難耕種。
Rare plants were found growing in the dry geest environment. 在乾燥的沙荒地環境中發現了稀有植物。
That's a geet big cake you've baked for the party! 你為派對烤的蛋糕真是巨大！
The weather today is geet cold, so wear a thick coat. 今天天氣非常冷，所以穿件厚外套吧。
Geez, I forgot my keys in the car again! 天哪，我又把鑰匙忘在車裡了！
Geez, that movie was much longer than I expected. 哎呀，那部電影比我預期的長得多。
The astronomer waited for a moonless night to observe the Gegenschein. 天文學家等待一個無月的夜晚來觀察對日照。
Gegenschein appears as a faint glow in the night sky. 對日照在夜空中表現為微弱的光芒。
Don't try to gegg me with those tall tales. 別想用那些荒誕的故事來騙我。

The poor geggee didn't realize he was being tricked. 可憐的被騙者沒有意識到自己正被捉弄。
He played the role of the geggee in their elaborate hoax. 在他們精巧的騙局中，他充當了被騙者的角色。
The gegger was known for his clever but harmless tricks. 這個騙子以他聰明但無害的惡作劇而聞名。
Be careful around that gegger; he loves to deceive people. 小心那個愛開玩笑的人，他喜歡捉弄別人。
The entire event turned out to be a piece of geggery. 整個事件結果證明是一場惡作劇。
He was tired of their constant geggery and lies. 他厭倦了他們不斷的欺騙和謊言。
The Geheimrat advised the prince on matters of state. 樞密顧問官就國家事務向王子提供建議。
He held the prestigious title of Geheimrat in the 19th century. 他在 19 世紀擁有顯赫的樞密顧問官頭銜。
The war zone had become a literal Gehenna for the civilians. 對平民來說，戰爭地區已變成了真正的地獄。
He described the prison as a Gehenna on earth. 他將那座監獄描述為人間地獄。
Gehlenite is often found in contact-metamorphosed limestones. 鈣鋁黃長石常發現於接觸變質的石灰岩中。
The geologist identified the sample as gehlenite. 地質學家將該樣本鑑定為鈣鋁黃長石。
Geikia is an extinct genus of dicynodont from the Permian period. 吉氏獸屬是二疊紀的一種已滅絕的二齒獸類。
Fossils of Geikia were discovered in Scotland. 吉氏獸屬的化石在蘇格蘭被發現。
Geikielite is a rare magnesium titanium oxide mineral. 鎂鈦礦是一種罕見的鎂鈦氧化物礦物。
The mineral geikielite was named after Sir Archibald Geikie. 鎂鈦礦是以阿奇博爾德·蓋基爵士的名字命名的。
The old textbook referred to humic acid as gein. 舊教科書將腐殖酸稱為 gein。
Gein is a substance extracted from organic matter in the soil. Gein 是從土壤有機質中提取的一種物質。
The geira stood perfectly still by the riverbank. 蒼鷺靜靜地立在河岸邊。
In local folklore, seeing a geira was a sign of rain. 在當地民俗中，看到蒼鷺是下雨的徵兆。

The geisha performed a traditional dance for the guests. 藝妓為客人们表演了傳統舞蹈。
Training to become a geisha takes many years of dedication. 訓練成為一名藝妓需要多年的奉獻。
The geison projects outward to protect the temple walls from rain. 簷口向外突出，以保護神廟牆壁免受雨淋。
Architects carefully designed the decorative elements of the geison. 建築師仔細設計了簷口的裝飾元素。
The map showed the geisotherms at various depths. 地圖顯示了不同深度的地等溫線。
Scientists use geisotherms to study the earth's internal heat. 科學家使用地等溫線來研究地球內部的熱量。
The researcher conducted a geisothermal analysis of the region. 研究人員對該地區進行了地等溫分析。
Geisothermal data helps in understanding volcanic activity. 地等溫數據有助於了解火山活動。
Geissoloma is a genus of evergreen shrubs endemic to South Africa. 蓋索隆屬是南非特有的常綠灌木屬。
The botanist studied the unique structure of Geissoloma. 植物學家研究了蓋索隆屬的獨特結構。
Geissolomataceae is a small family containing only one genus. 蓋索隆科是一個僅包含一個屬的小科。
The family Geissolomataceae is part of the Cape Floral Region. 蓋索隆科是開普植物區的一部分。

meaning: 潔瑪（女子名）；貫索四（星名）
sentences: Gemma is the brightest star in the constellation Corona Borealis. 貫索四（Gemma）是北冕座中最亮的恆星。

A gemma can develop into a new individual plant under favorable conditions. 在有利的條件下，胞芽可以發育成長為新的植株。

Gemmaceous scales protect the developing buds during winter. 芽狀的鱗片在冬季保護發育中的芽。
Water droplets help disperse the gemmae from the cup-like structures. 水滴有助於將胞芽從杯狀結構中散播出去。
Scientists observed the growth of gemmae on the moss specimen. 科學家觀察了苔蘚標本上胞芽的生長情況。

The process of gemmation allows the population to expand rapidly. 芽生的過程使種群得以迅速擴大。
The gemmative phase of the life cycle is crucial for colonization. 生命週期中的芽生階段對於殖民生長至關重要。
Researchers identified the gemmative organs of the marine species. 研究人員辨識出該海洋物種的芽生器官。
The beetles exhibited a gemmeous luster on their wings. 這些甲蟲的翅膀展現出如寶石般的光澤。
Ancient treasures often included gemmeous ornaments. 古代的寶藏通常包括寶石裝飾品。
The master gemmer spent months cutting the giant diamond. 那位寶石大師花了幾個月的時間切割這顆巨大的鑽石。

The gemmiferous rock layer was highly sought after by miners. 產寶石的岩層深受礦工們的青睞。

Scientists studied the gemmiferousness of various yeast strains. 科學家研究了各種酵母菌株的發芽（芽生）特性。
Gemmification occurs when environmental conditions are ideal for growth. 當環境條件理想時，就會發生芽化現象。
The experiment monitored the rate of gemmification in the laboratory. 該實驗監測了實驗室中的芽化速率。
The fossil displayed a gemmiform structure that intrigued paleontologists. 化石展現出讓古生物學家感興趣的芽狀結構。
Under the microscope, the cells appeared gemmiform. 在顯微鏡下，這些細胞呈現出芽狀。
The ballroom was gemmily decorated for the royal gala. 宴會廳為皇家慶典裝飾得華麗如寶石一般。
Stars shone gemmily in the clear night sky. 星星在晴朗的夜空中如寶石般熠熠生輝。
The artist aimed to capture the gemminess of the sunset in her painting. 藝術家旨在畫作中捕捉日落時那如寶石般的品質。
The gemminess of the collection attracted many visitors to the museum. 藏品的華美吸引了許多遊客來到博物館。
Gemmingia chinensis is known for its orange flowers with dark spots. 射干（Gemmingia chinensis）以其帶有深色斑點的橙色花朵而聞名。
The roots of Gemmingia have been used in traditional herbal medicine. 射干屬植物的根已被用於傳統草藥中。
The hydra is a well-known example of a gemmipara. 水螅是芽生動物的一個著名例子。

Several gemmipares were observed detaching from the parent organism. 觀察到幾個芽生體從母體生物中分離出來。
Gemmiparity allows these organisms to colonize new surfaces rapidly. 芽生性使這些生物能夠迅速在新的表面上拓殖。
The evolution of gemmiparity provided a survival advantage in stable environments. 芽生性的演化在穩定的環境中提供了生存優勢。
Most sponges are gemmiparous and reproduce through budding. 大多數海綿是芽生的，透過出芽生殖進行繁殖。

The organism reproduces gemmiparously under laboratory conditions. 該生物在實驗室條件下以芽生的方式繁殖。
The crystal had a gemmoid appearance but was actually a synthetic mineral. 這種晶體具有像寶石的外觀，但實際上是合成礦物。

meaning: 小芽；(海綿的) 芽球；胚芽

meaning: 修道院總長職位；將軍職位
sentences: He was appointed to the generalate of the religious order. 他被任命為該修道會的總長。

meaning: 地覺（植物對重力的感應）

meaning: 地芽（種子萌發時留在地下的子葉）

meaning: 地心的；以地球為中心的
sentences: The ancient Greeks believed in a geocentric universe. 古希臘人相信地心說宇宙觀。

meaning: 地心的；以地球為中心的
sentences: Early astronomers used geocentrical models to explain orbits. 早期天文學家使用地心模型來解釋軌道。

meaning: 地心地；以地球為中心地
sentences: The data was analyzed geocentrically for the satellite mission. 為了衛星任務，數據是以地心方式進行分析的。

The geochemical analysis revealed high levels of sulfur. 地球化學分析顯示硫含量很高。

Geochronic data is used to date geological events. 地質年代數據被用來確定地質事件的年代。
The term Gentiana refers to 龍膽屬. Gentiana 這個字指的是龍膽屬。

meaning: 屬於或與其相關的開花植物龍膽科。
sentences: The report describes the result as gentianaceous. 該報告將結果描述為龍膽科的。
Everyone noticed the gentianaceous tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這條訊息的龍膽語氣。
The term Gentianales refers to 龍膽目. Gentianales 一詞指的是龍膽目。
We learned the meaning of Gentianales today. 今天我們了解了 Gentianales 的意思。
The term gentianella refers to 龍膽屬. 龍膽一詞指的是龍膽屬。
We learned the meaning of gentianella today. 今天我們了解了龍膽草的意思。
The term gentianic refers to 龍膽. 術語“龍膽”指的是龍膽。
We learned the meaning of gentianic today. 今天我們了解了龍膽的意思。
The term gentianin refers to 龍膽苷. 術語“龍膽苷”指的是“龍膽膽”。
We learned the meaning of gentianin today. 今天我們了解了龍膽苷的意思。
The term gentianose refers to 龍膽糖. 龍膽糖一詞指的是龍膽糖。
We learned the meaning of gentianose today. 今天我們了解了龍膽的意思。
The term gentianwort refers to 龍膽草. 龍膽草一詞指的是龍膽草。
We learned the meaning of gentianwort today. 今天我們了解了龍膽草的意思。
The term gentile refers to A non-Jewish person. 外邦人一詞指的是非猶太人。
We learned the meaning of gentile today. 今天我們學習了外邦人的意義。
The term gentiledom refers to 氏族制度. 氏族制度一詞指的是氏族制度。
We learned the meaning of gentiledom today. 今天我們了解了紳士制的涵義。
The term gentilesse refers to Courtesy, refinement; gentleness. 「gentilesse」這個字指的是禮貌、優雅；溫柔。
We learned the meaning of gentilesse today. 今天我們了解了gentilesse的意思。
Vito Corleone? What kind of name is Corleone? A gentilic? 维托·柯里昂？柯里昂是什麼名字？一个外邦人？
The term gentilic refers to A personal name derived from a place name. 術語“gentilic”是指源自地名的人名。

meaning: 異教;異教;對異教神的崇拜
sentences: The term gentilism refers to heathenism; paganism; the worship of pagan gods. 「gentilism」這個字是指異教主義。異教;對異教神的崇拜。
We learned the meaning of gentilism today. 今天我們了解了外邦主義的涵義。
The term gentilitial refers to Synonym of gentilicial. 術語“gentilitial”是指“gentilicial”的同義詞。
We learned the meaning of gentilitial today. 今天我們了解了 gentilitial 的意思。
The report describes the result as gentilitian. 報告稱這一結果是「紳士式的」。
Everyone noticed the gentilitian tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的紳士語氣。
The report describes the result as gentilitious. 報告稱這一結果是有禮貌的。
Everyone noticed the gentilitious tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的禮貌語氣。

meaning: 優雅、溫文爾雅、有良好教養或社會地位較高的狀態。
sentences: The term gentility refers to The state of being elegant, genteel, having good breeding, or being socially superior. 紳士一詞是指優雅、有教養、有良好教養或社會地位優越的狀態。
We learned the meaning of gentility today. 今天我們學習了溫柔的意義。

meaning: 製造非猶太產品的過程。
sentences: The term gentilization refers to The process of making something non-Jewish. 「紳士化」一詞指的是使某些事物變得非猶太化的過程。
We learned the meaning of gentilization today. 今天我們了解了紳士化的意義。
People often gentilize when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會變得紳士化。
Learning when to gentilize is important. 學習何時溫和化很重要。
The term gentiobiose refers to 龍膽二糖. 龍膽二糖一詞指的是龍膽二糖。
We learned the meaning of gentiobiose today. 今天我們了解了龍膽二糖的意思。

meaning: 龍膽中發現的苦味糖苷（(5R-反式)-5-乙烯基-6-(b-D-吡喃葡萄糖氧基)-5,6-二氫-1H,3H-吡喃並[3,4-c]吡喃-1-酮)
sentences: The term gentiopicrin refers to A bitter glycoside ((5R-trans)-5-ethenyl-6-(b-D-glucopyranosyloxy)-5,6-dihydro-1H,3H-pyrano[3,4-c]pyran-1-one) found in gentians. 龍膽苦苷一詞是指在龍膽中發現的苦味糖苷（(5R-反式)-5-乙烯基-6-(b-D-吡喃葡萄糖基氧基)-5,6-二氫-1H,3H-吡喃並[3,4-c]吡喃-1-酮)。
We learned the meaning of gentiopicrin today. 今天我們了解了龍膽苦苷的意思。

meaning: 1⋅3⋅7-三羥基氧雜蒽酮，以龍膽根中的甲醚（龍膽素）形式存在，或透過間苯三酚與氫醌羧酸縮合合成獲得。
sentences: The term gentisein refers to 1⋅3⋅7-trihydroxyxanthone, found in the form of its methyl ether (gentisin) in gentian root, or obtained synthetically by condensing phloroglucinol with hydroquinone carboxylic acid. 術語「龍膽黃素」是指 1⋅3⋅7-三羥基氧雜蒽酮，以龍膽根中的甲基醚（龍膽素）的形式存在，或透過間苯三酚與氫醌羧酸縮合合成而獲得。
We learned the meaning of gentisein today. 今天我們了解了gentise的意思。
The term gentisic refers to 龍膽的. 術語“龍膽”指的是龍膽的。
We learned the meaning of gentisic today. 今天我們了解了genistic的意思。
The term gentisin refers to 龍膽甙. 術語「龍膽甙」指的是龍膽甙。
We learned the meaning of gentisin today. 今天我們了解了龍膽甙的意思。
The term gentlefolk refers to People of superior social position. 紳士一詞是指社會地位較高的人。
We learned the meaning of gentlefolk today. 今天我們了解了君子的意義。
The term gentlehearted refers to 心地善良. 溫柔一詞指的是心地善良。
We learned the meaning of gentlehearted today. 今天我們學習了溫柔的意義。
The term gentleheartedly refers to 溫柔地. 「溫柔」這個字指的是溫柔地。
We learned the meaning of gentleheartedly today. 今天我們學習了溫柔的意思。
The term gentleheartedness refers to 溫柔的心. 溫柔這個字指的是溫柔的心。
We learned the meaning of gentleheartedness today. 今天我們學習了溫柔心的意義。

meaning: 出身良好或文雅的存在狀態；良好的繁殖。
sentences: The term gentlehood refers to The state of being of good or gentle birth; good breeding. 溫柔一詞指的是出身善良或溫柔的存在狀態；良好的繁殖。
We learned the meaning of gentlehood today. 今天我們學習了溫柔的意義。
Geochronology helps us determine the age of the Earth. 地質年代學幫助我們確定地球的年齡。
Researchers use radioactive isotopes in geochronology. 研究人員在地質年代學中使用放射性同位素。
The study of geochrony is essential for understanding historical geology. 地質年代學的研究對於理解歷史地質學至關重要。
Geochrony provides a timeline for the Earth's past. 地質年代學為地球的過去提供了時間軸。
Geococcyx is a genus of North American ground-dwelling cuckoos. 走鵑屬是北美洲地面生活的一種杜鵑科鳥類。
The roadrunner belongs to the genus Geococcyx. 走鵑屬於走鵑屬。
Early scientists hypothesized the existence of geocoronium. 早期的科學家曾假設存在地冕氣體。
The concept of geocoronium was later replaced by the hydrogen geocorona. 地冕氣體的概念後來被氫地冕所取代。
The geocratic period was marked by the emergence of new continents. 地塊增大期以新大陸的出現為標誌。
Geocratic movements changed the face of the planet. 地塊增大運動改變了行星的面貌。
Geocronite is a rare lead antimony sulfide mineral. 硫銻鉛礦是一種罕見的硫化鉛銻礦物。
The geologist identified the sample as geocronite. 地質學家將樣本鑑定為硫銻鉛礦。

meaning: 地球環繞的；地球週期的
sentences: The geocyclic path of the satellite was carefully tracked. 衛星環繞地球的軌道路徑受到仔細追蹤。
We studied the geocyclic changes in climate. 我們研究了氣候的地球週期性變化。
Geodaesia involves measuring the size and shape of the Earth. 大地測量學涉及測量地球的大小和形狀。
The professor taught a course on geodaesia and mapping. 教授開設了一門關於大地測量學和繪圖的課程。
The geodal structure contained beautiful quartz crystals. 晶洞結構中含有美麗的石英晶體。
He collected geodal samples from the quarry. 他從採石場採集了晶洞樣本。
I found a hollow geode lined with amethyst. 我發現了一個內襯紫水晶的中空晶洞。
Breaking open a geode can reveal stunning interior crystals. 敲開一個晶洞可以展現出驚人的內部晶體。
The geodesic dome is known for its strength and efficiency. 大地測量圓頂以其強度和效率著稱。
A geodesic line is the shortest path between two points on a curved surface. 短程線是曲面上兩點之間的最短路徑。
She performed geodesical surveys across the region. 她在該地區進行了大地測量調查。
Geodesical data is vital for satellite positioning. 大地測量數據對衛星定位至關重要。
The geodesist accurately mapped the remote island. 大地測量學家精確地繪製了那座偏遠島嶼的地圖。
He worked as a geodesist for the national survey agency. 他在國家測量機構擔任大地測量學家。
Modern geodesy uses satellite technology for precision. 現代大地測量學使用衛星技術來確保精確度。
Geodesy is fundamental to GPS and other navigation systems. 大地測量學是 GPS 和其他導航系統的基礎。
The geodete used a theodolite for the measurement. 大地測量員使用經緯儀進行測量。
As a geodete, she spent months in the field. 作為一名大地測量員，她在野外待了數月。
A geodetic survey was required before construction. 施工前需要進行大地測量。
The geodetic coordinates were recorded accurately. 大地測量座標被精確地記錄下來。
The team used geodetical methods to monitor crustal movement. 該團隊使用大地測量方法來監測地殼運動。
Geodetical instruments are becoming increasingly digital. 大地測量儀器正變得日益數位化。
The two points were geodetically linked. 兩點之間建立了大地測量連結。
The area was geodetically surveyed for the new pipeline. 該地區為了新管道進行了大地測量。
The geodetician presented a paper on global mapping. 大地測量學家發表了一篇關於全球繪圖的論文。
She is a leading geodetician in her field. 她是該領域領先的大地測量學家。
Geodetics is the science of measuring Earth's geometry. 大地測量學是測量地球幾何形狀的科學。
Advanced geodetics helps in disaster management. 先進的大地測量學有助於災害管理。
Geodiatropism causes some roots to grow horizontally. 橫向向地性導致某些根部水平生長。
Researchers studied the mechanisms of geodiatropism in plants. 研究人員研究了植物橫向向地性的機制。
The geodic formation was found in the volcanic rock. 在火山岩中發現了晶洞狀地層。
Geodic cavities often contain mineral deposits. 晶洞狀腔室通常含有礦床。
The geodiferous layer of the rock was carefully excavated. 岩石中含有晶洞的層被仔細挖掘。
The geologist searched for geodiferous stones. 地質學家尋找含有晶洞的石頭。
The geodist verified the elevation data. 大地測量學家核實了海拔數據。
He trained as a geodist in the army. 他在軍隊中接受過大地測量員的培訓。
The geoduck is a large saltwater clam native to the Pacific Northwest. 象拔蚌是原產於太平洋西北地區的一種大型鹹水蛤。
We ordered geoduck sashimi at the seafood restaurant. 我們在海鮮餐廳點了象拔蚌生魚片。
The geodynamic processes lead to mountain building. 地球動力學過程導致山脈的形成。
Geodynamic models simulate the movement of tectonic plates. 地球動力學模型模擬構造板塊的運動。
He analyzed the geodynamical forces affecting the region. 他分析了影響該地區的地球動力學力量。
Geodynamical research is essential for earthquake prediction. 地球動力學研究對於地震預測至關重要。
Geodynamics studies the physical forces that shape the Earth. 地球動力學研究塑造地球的物理力量。
The field of geodynamics has evolved with new sensor data. 隨著新感測數據的出現，地球動力學領域已經發生了演變。
The study examined geoethnic variations in culture. 該研究探討了文化中的地理種族差異。
Geoethnic boundaries often align with physical features. 地理種族邊界通常與物理特徵一致。
Geoff is going to help us move tomorrow. 傑夫明天要幫我們搬家。
My friend Geoff is a talented musician. 我的朋友傑夫是一位才華橫溢的音樂家。
Geoffrey is a classic English name of Germanic origin. 傑弗里是一個源自日耳曼語的經典英文名字。
The author Geoffrey Chaucer is known as the father of English literature. 作家傑弗里·喬瑟被譽為英國文學之父。

meaning: 喬弗羅因 (一種從喬弗羅屬植物樹皮中提取的物質)
sentences: Geoffroyin was historically extracted for its medicinal properties from certain tree barks. 喬弗羅因在歷史上是從某些樹皮中提取出來，因其藥用價值而被使用。
The chemical composition of geoffroyin was studied by early pharmacologists. 早期藥理學家研究了喬弗羅因的化學成分。

meaning: 喬弗羅因鹼 (一種發現於喬弗羅屬植物中的生物鹼)
sentences: Geoffroyine is an alkaloid that can be found in the cabbage tree. 喬弗羅因鹼是一種可以在甘藍樹中找到的生物鹼。
Researchers identified geoffroyine while analyzing tropical plant extracts. 研究人員在分析熱帶植物提取物時鑑定出了喬弗羅因鹼。
The satellite captured the unique geoform of the canyon. 衛星拍攝到了峽谷獨特的地貌。
Erosion is a major factor that shapes every geoform on the planet. 侵蝕是塑造地球上每一種地形的主要因素。
Geogenesis explains the scientific theories behind the creation of our planet. 地球形成說解釋了我們星球創建背後的科學理論。
The lecture focused on the role of heat in geogenesis. 講座重點討論了熱在地球形成過程中的作用。

meaning: 地球形成的；地形成因的
sentences: Scientists studied the geogenetic processes that led to the mountain's formation. 科學家研究了導致該山脈形成的地球形成過程。
The geogenetic characteristics of the soil vary by region. 土壤的地形成因特徵因地區而異。
The high concentration of arsenic in the water is geogenic rather than industrial. 水中高濃度的砷是地質產生的而非工業造成的。
Geogenic factors play a significant role in local mineral distribution. 地源因素在當地礦產分佈中起著重要作用。
Certain fungi are geogenous, meaning they thrive on the soil surface. 某些真菌是生於地上的，這意味著它們在土壤表面茂盛生長。
Botanists categorized the new specimen as a geogenous plant. 植物學家將這個新標本歸類為地上生長植物。
Geogeny is the study of the origin and development of the Earth. 地球成因學是研究地球起源和發展的學問。
Her thesis explored complex topics in modern geogeny. 她的論文探索了現代地球成因學中的複雜課題。
Geoglossaceae is a family of fungi commonly known as earth tongues. 地舌菌科是一類俗稱為「地舌」的真菌科。
The identification of species within Geoglossaceae requires microscopic analysis. 辨識地舌菌科內的物種需要顯微分析。
Geoglossum species are typically black or dark brown and found in woodlands. 地舌菌屬的物種通常呈黑色或深褐色，生長在林地中。
We found a rare specimen of Geoglossum during our field trip. 我們在野外考察中發現了一個罕見的地舌菌屬標本。
The Nazca Lines are famous geoglyphic figures in Peru. 納斯卡線是秘魯著名的地面巨畫圖案。
Geoglyphic art provides insights into ancient cultural practices. 地面巨畫藝術為古代文化習俗提供了深刻見解。

meaning: 地質學 (側重地球構造和組成)
sentences: In the 18th century, geognosis was the term used for the study of the Earth's structure. 在 18 世紀，geognosis 是用於研究地球構造的術語。
The professor discussed the transition from geognosis to modern geology. 教授討論了從地質構造學到現代地質學的轉變。
The geognosist spent years mapping the rock layers of the region. 這位地質學家花了多年時間繪製該地區岩層的圖表。
Early geognosists laid the groundwork for our understanding of stratigraphy. 早期的地質學家為我們對地層學的理解奠定了基礎。
Abraham Gottlob Werner was a famous geognost of his time. 亞伯拉罕·戈特洛布·維爾納是他那個時代著名的地質學家。
The geognost carefully examined the mineral composition of the sample. 地質學家仔細檢查了樣本的礦物成分。
A geognostic survey was conducted to determine the underlying strata. 進行了地質調查以確定地下地層。
The textbook contains several geognostic diagrams. 這本教科書包含幾幅地質構造圖。
His geognostical observations were recorded in a detailed journal. 他的地質觀察結果記錄在一本詳細的日記中。
The mountain range has several unique geognostical features. 該山脈具有幾個獨特的地質構造特徵。
The region is geognostically diverse, with many different rock types. 該地區在地質構造上非常多樣，擁有許多不同類型的岩石。
They analyzed the landscape geognostically to find potential mining sites. 他們從地質構造的角度分析了景觀，以尋找潛在的礦址。

meaning: 地質學 (研究地球組成部分的構造和佈置)
sentences: Geognosy was once considered a branch of mineralogy. 地質學曾被認為是礦物學的一個分支。
Students of geognosy study how different geological formations are arranged. 學習地質學的學生研究不同地質構造是如何排列的。
The geogonic myths of ancient civilizations are fascinating. 古代文明的地球形成神話非常引人入勝。
He published a paper on geogonic theories in the late 19th century. 他在 19 世紀末發表了一篇關於地球形成理論的論文。
Geogonical studies attempt to explain how the Earth attained its current shape. 地球形成研究試圖解釋地球如何獲得其目前的形狀。
The museum features an exhibit on geogonical history. 博物館有一個關於地球形成歷史的展覽。
Geogony deals with the doctrine of the formation of the Earth. 地球形成論涉及地球形成的學說。
The philosopher's views on geogony were highly controversial. 這位哲學家對地球形成論的觀點極具爭議。
The geographer used GIS technology to map the urban sprawl. 地理學家使用 GIS 技術繪製城市擴張地圖。
As a geographer, she travels the world to study different climates. 作為一名地理學家，她周遊世界以研究不同的氣候。
The two countries are geographically close but culturally very different. 這兩個國家在地理上很接近，但在文化上卻大不相同。
The species is geographically restricted to a single island. 該物種在地理上僅限於單一島嶼。
The geographics of the region make it difficult for large-scale farming. 該地區的地理特徵使其難以進行大規模農業經營。
He is an expert in the geographics of the Arctic. 他是北極地理方面的專家。
Geographism suggests that the environment shapes human society. 地理決定論認為環境塑造了人類社會。
Critics argue that geographism oversimplifies complex historical events. 批評者認為地理決定論過度簡化了複雜的歷史事件。

meaning: 以地理學角度研究或描述
sentences: To geographize a region involves documenting its physical and human features. 以地理學角度描述一個地區涉及記錄其自然和人文特徵。
They sought to geographize the newly discovered territories. 他們試圖對新發現的領土進行地理研究。
The geohydrologist analyzed the groundwater flow in the aquifer. 水文地質學家分析了含水層中的地下水流動。
Consulting a geohydrologist is essential before building the new dam. 在建造新大壩之前，諮詢水文地質學家是必不可少的。
Geohydrology is the branch of geology that studies the distribution of water in the soil. 水文地質學是研究土壤中水份分佈的地質學分支。
Advances in geohydrology have helped solve water shortage problems. 水文地質學的進步有助於解決缺水問題。

meaning: 大地水準面 (指地球平均海平面的延伸面)
sentences: The geoid is a model of global mean sea level used to measure precise surface elevations. 大地水準面是用於測量精確地表高程的全球平均海平面模型。
Gravitational variations cause the geoid to be irregular. 重力變化導致大地水準面不規則。
The geoidal surface is used as a reference for measuring elevations. 大地水準面被用作測量高程的參考。
Geoidal heights vary depending on the local gravity field. 大地水準面高度因當地的重力場而異。
A geoisotherm connects points of equal temperature within the Earth's crust. 地等溫線連接了地殼內溫度相等的點。
The depth of a geoisotherm can indicate geothermal activity. 地等溫線的深度可以指示地熱活動。
Ancient cultures practiced geolatry, personifying the Earth as a goddess. 古代文化實行地神崇拜，將地球人格化為女神。
Geolatry reflects the deep respect early humans had for the environment. 地神崇拜反映了早期人類對環境的深切尊重。
In the 19th century, the term geologer was sometimes used instead of geologist. 在19世紀，「geologer」一詞有時被用來代替「geologist」。
The old geologer carefully examined the rock strata. 那位老地質學家仔細檢查了岩層。
He was known as a brilliant geologian of his time. 他被公認為當時傑出的地質學家。
Early geologians debated the age of the Earth based on fossil evidence. 早期的地質學家根據化石證據爭論地球的年齡。
The region has a complex geological history. 該地區擁有複雜的地質歷史。
Geological surveys are essential for mining operations. 地質調查對採礦作業至關重要。
Geologically speaking, the island is quite young. 從地質學上來說，這座島嶼非常年輕。
The area is geologically stable and free from earthquakes. 該地區地質穩定，沒有地震。
The geologician presented a new theory on plate tectonics. 這位地質學家提出了一個關於板塊構造的新理論。
As a geologician, she spent months in the field collecting samples. 作為一名地質學家，她在野外花了幾個月的時間收集樣本。

meaning: 進行地質研究；研究地質
sentences: They spent their summer geologizing in the mountains. 他們整個夏天都在山區進行地質研究。
It is fascinating to geologize along the rugged coastline. 在崎嶇的海岸線上研究地質是件迷人的事。
Geomagnetic storms can disrupt satellite communications. 地磁風暴可能會干擾衛星通訊。
The geomagnetic field protects the Earth from solar radiation. 地磁場保護地球免受太陽輻射。
The geomagnetician analyzed data from the polar regions. 地磁學家分析了來自極地地區的數據。
She became a leading geomagnetician, studying the Earth's core. 她成為了一位領先的地磁學家，致力於研究地核。
Geomagnetics is a branch of geophysics dealing with the Earth's magnetic field. 地磁學是地球物理學的一個分支，研究地球磁場。
Advances in geomagnetics have improved our understanding of pole reversals. 地磁學的進展增進了我們對地磁極反轉的了解。
The geomagnetist predicted an increase in solar wind activity. 地磁學家預測太陽風活動將會增加。
A geomagnetist uses sensitive instruments to measure magnetic fluctuations. 地磁學家使用靈敏的儀器來測量磁力波動。
The geomalic response of roots is crucial for plant growth. 根部的地向性反應對植物生長至關重要。
Researchers studied geomalic tendencies in various plant species. 研究人員研究了各種植物物種的趨地傾向。
Geomalism causes roots to grow downward toward gravity. 地向性導致根部朝著重力方向向下生長。
Experiments in space help us understand how plants behave without geomalism. 太空實驗幫助我們了解植物在沒有地向性的情況下如何表現。
A geomaly in the crust was detected using gravitational measurements. 使用重力測量檢測到了地殼中的地體異常。
The researchers mapped the geomaly to better understand the local geology. 研究人員繪製了地體異常圖，以更好地了解當地的地質情況。
In some cultures, priests would geomance to find the best site for a temple. 在某些文化中，祭司會進行占卜以尋找寺廟的最佳選址。
He attempted to geomance using patterns in the sand. 他試圖利用沙子中的圖案進行占卜。
The king consulted a geomancer before building the palace. 國王在建造宮殿前諮詢了一位占卜師。
In Taiwan, a geomancer is often called to arrange house layouts for good luck. 在台灣，人們常請風水師來安排房屋佈局以求好運。
Geomancy is an ancient method of divination based on the Earth's features. 土占術是一種基於地球特徵的古代占卜方法。
The practice of feng shui is a form of Chinese geomancy. 風水的實踐是中國地理占卜的一種形式。
The geomant read the signs in the earth to predict the harvest. 占卜者讀取土地中的徵兆來預測收成。
Every village had a geomant who was respected for his wisdom. 每個村莊都有一位因智慧而受人尊敬的占卜者。
The city was built according to geomantic principles. 這座城市是根據風水原則建造的。
Geomantic tools like the compass are used in site analysis. 風水工具（如羅盤）被用於場地分析。
The scroll contained ancient geomantical instructions. 捲軸記載了古代的占卜指令。
He studied geomantical charts to find the perfect burial spot. 他研究風水圖表以尋找完美的安葬地點。
The garden was geomantically arranged to promote harmony. 花園依風水佈置以促進和諧。
He positioned his desk geomantically to improve his career prospects. 他依風水擺放書桌以改善事業前景。
Euclid is one of the most famous geometers in history. 歐幾里得是歷史上最著名的幾何學家之一。
The geometer carefully measured the angles of the property. 土地測量員仔細測量了該物產的角度。
The patterns on the tile were geometrically perfect. 瓷磚上的圖案在幾何學上非常完美。
The population grew geometrically over the decade. 人口在十年間呈幾何級數增長。

meaning: 使幾何化；幾何學地表現
sentences: The artist chose to geometricize the natural landscape in her paintings. 藝術家選擇在她的畫作中將自然景觀幾何化。
Modern architecture often attempts to geometricize space. 現代建築常試圖將空間幾何化。
The geometrid caterpillar is known as an inchworm. 尺蛾的幼蟲被稱為尺蠖。
We observed several geometrid moths resting on the bark. 我們觀察到幾隻尺蛾停在樹皮上。
Geometridae is a large family of moths with over 23,000 species. 尺蛾科是一個擁有超過 23,000 個物種的蛾類大家族。
Taxonomists are still classifying new members of the Geometridae family. 分類學家仍在對尺蛾科的新成員進行分類。
The ancient temple featured geometriform carvings on its pillars. 古廟的柱子上有著幾何形狀的雕刻。
The crystals formed in distinct geometriform patterns. 這些晶體形成了明顯的幾何形狀圖案。
Geometrina is a subgroup within the Geometridae family. 尺蛾亞科是尺蛾科中的一個亞群。
Many moths in the Geometrina group have green wings for camouflage. 尺蛾亞科中的許多蛾類擁有綠色的翅膀以進行偽裝。
The geometrine moth is known for its unique larvae. 尺蛾科的蛾類以其幼蟲獨特而聞名。
The scientists studied the geometrine characteristics of the species. 科學家們研究了該物種的尺蛾科特徵。
Architects often geometrize their designs for better structure. 建築師通常會將其設計幾何化，以獲得更好的結構。
He tried to geometrize the complex natural patterns. 他試圖用幾何學來表示複雜的自然模式。

meaning: 像幾何圖形的；尺蛾總科的
sentences: The building had a geometroid appearance. 這座建築具有類幾何圖形的外觀。
He is an expert on geometroid moths. 他是尺蛾總科蛾類的專家。
Geometroidea is a large superfamily of moths. 尺蛾總科是一個龐大的蛾類總科。
The classification of Geometroidea has been updated recently. 尺蛾總科的分類最近已更新。
The geomoroi were the land-owning farmers in ancient Greece. Geomoroi 是古希臘擁有土地的農民階級。
Historians discussed the social status of the geomoroi. 歷史學家討論了 geomoroi 的社會地位。
The geomorphic features of the valley were shaped by the river. 該山谷的地貌特徵是由河流塑造的。
Geomorphic processes change the earth's surface over time. 地貌過程隨著時間的推移改變著地球表面。
As a geomorphist, she studies how landscapes evolve. 作為一名地貌學家，她研究地貌是如何演變的。
The geomorphist analyzed the soil erosion in the region. 這位地貌學家分析了該地區的土壤侵蝕。
The geomorphogenic history of the mountains is complex. 這些山脈的地貌成因史非常複雜。
They studied the geomorphogenic factors affecting the coastline. 他們研究了影響海岸線的地貌成因因素。
The geomorphogenist explained the origin of the crater. 地貌成因學家解釋了火山口的起源。
He is a leading geomorphogenist in the field of earth science. 他是地球科學領域領先的地貌成因學家。
Geomorphogeny focuses on the origin of landforms. 地貌成因學專注於地貌的起源。
The professor gave a lecture on geomorphogeny. 教授做了一場關於地貌成因學的講座。
They conducted a geomorphological survey of the area. 他們對該地區進行了地貌學調查。
Geomorphological changes can happen very slowly. 地貌學上的變化可能發生得很慢。
Geomorphology is the study of the earth's surface features. 地貌學是研究地球表面特徵的學科。
He decided to major in geomorphology at the university. 他決定在大學主修地貌學。
The geomorphy of the region is very diverse. 該地區的地貌非常多樣化。
Scientists are mapping the geomorphy of the ocean floor. 科學家們正在繪製海底地貌圖。
The geomyid rodents are known for their cheek pouches. 囊鼠科囓齒動物以其頰囊而聞名。
She is studying the geomyid family of gophers. 她正在研究囊鼠科的囊鼠。
Geomyidae includes various species of pocket gophers. 囊鼠科包括各種囊鼠。
The biology of Geomyidae is fascinating to researchers. 囊鼠科的生物學對研究人員來說非常迷人。
Geomys is a genus of pocket gophers found in North America. 囊鼠屬是發現於北美的一種囊鼠屬。
The researchers observed the behavior of Geomys in the wild. 研究人員在野外觀察了囊鼠屬的行為。
In physics, a geon is a hypothetical electromagnetic or gravitational wave. 在物理學中，幾何子是一種假設的電磁波或引力波。
The concept of a geon was proposed by John Wheeler. 幾何子的概念是由約翰·惠勒提出的。
Geonavigation is used by pilots to navigate using landmarks. 飛行員使用地形導航來利用地標進行導航。
Early sailors relied on geonavigation to travel along the coast. 早期水手依靠地形導航沿著海岸旅行。
Plants that grow away from gravity are geonegative. 遠離重力生長的植物具有負向地性。
The stem shows a geonegative response to gravity. 莖對重力表現出負向地性反應。
The Geonic period was a significant era in Jewish history. 猶太教律法導師時期是猶太歷史上一個重要的時代。
They studied Geonic literature in their history class. 他們在歷史課上研究了猶太教律法導師的文獻。
The Geonim were the heads of the rabbinical academies in Babylonia. Geonim 是巴比倫拉比學院的負責人。
The teachings of the Geonim influenced many Jewish communities. Geonim 的教導影響了許多猶太社區。
Geonoma is a genus of small palms native to the Americas. 叢櫚屬是原產於美洲的小型棕櫚屬。
There are many species within the Geonoma genus. 叢櫚屬中有很多物種。
The geonoma palm is often found in tropical rainforests. 叢櫚屬植物通常發現於熱帶雨林中。
She added a geonoma to her collection of indoor plants. 她在她的室內植物收藏中增加了一棵叢櫚屬植物。
Geonyctinastic movements in plants are influenced by both gravity and night. 植物的地性感夜性運動受重力和夜晚的共同影響。
The scientist observed the geonyctinastic behavior of the leaves. 科學家觀察了葉子的地性感夜性行為。
Some plant organs exhibit geonyctitropic characteristics. 一些植物器官表現出地性向夜性的特徵。
The study analyzed the geonyctitropic response of the roots. 該研究分析了根部的地性向夜性反應。
Geoparallelotropic organs grow in a direction parallel to gravity. 平行地向性器官沿著平行於重力的方向生長。
The orientation of the plant part was determined to be geoparallelotropic. 該植物部分的方位被確定為平行地向性的。
Geophagia is the practice of eating earth or soil. 食土癖是食用土地或土壤的行為。
The doctor discussed the health risks associated with geophagia. 醫生討論了與食土癖相關的健康風險。
Geophagism has been observed in various cultures throughout history. 在歷史上的各種文化中都觀察到了食土癖。
The anthropologist wrote a book about geophagism. 人類學家寫了一本關於食土癖的書。
A geophagist is someone who consumes soil-like substances. 食土者是食用類土壤物質的人。
The geophagist explained why they felt compelled to eat clay. 這位食土者解釋了為什麼他們感到不得不吃粘土。
Some animals are naturally geophagous. 某些動物天生就是食土的。
The geophagous behavior of the species was documented in the report. 該物種的食土行為已在報告中記錄。
Geophagy is often observed in certain animals and sometimes in humans. 許多動物甚至人類身上都曾觀察到食土癖現象。
Some cultures believe geophagy has medicinal benefits. 某些文化認為食土癖具有藥用價值。
Geophila is a genus of small, creeping plants. 地海棠屬是一類小型蔓生植物。
Botanists found several Geophila species in the tropical rainforest. 植物學家在熱帶雨林中發現了幾種地海棠屬植物。
The geophilid is a long, slender centipede found in soil. 地蜈蚣是在土壤中發現的一種長而細長的蜈蚣。
We studied the movement patterns of the geophilid. 我們研究了地蜈蚣的運動模式。
Geophilidae species are adapted to life underground. 地蜈蚣科物種適應了地下生活。
This centipede belongs to the family Geophilidae. 這隻蜈蚣屬於地蜈蚣科。
Geophilous insects spend most of their life in the soil. 地棲昆蟲生命的大部分時間都在土壤中度過。
The geophilous nature of these fungi makes them hard to find. 這些真菌的地棲特性使得它們很難被發現。
Geophilus is the type genus for its family. 地蜈蚣屬是該科的模式屬。
He identified the specimen as a member of Geophilus. 他將標本鑑定為地蜈蚣屬的一個成員。
The Geophone is used to record seismic waves during exploration. 地聲接收器用於在探勘過程中記錄地震波。
They placed the Geophone on the ground to monitor vibrations. 他們將地聲接收器放在地面上以監測震動。
A geophone converts ground motion into an electrical signal. 地聲接收器將地面運動轉換為電信號。
Engineers used a geophone to detect leaks in the underground pipes. 工程師使用地聲接收器探測地下管道的洩漏。
The geophysicist analyzed the magnetic field of the Earth. 這位地球物理學家分析了地球的磁場。
She works as a geophysicist for an oil company. 她在一家石油公司擔任地球物理學家。
Geophysics applies physical principles to study the Earth. 地球物理學應用物理原理來研究地球。
He is pursuing a master's degree in geophysics. 他正在攻讀地球物理學碩士學位。
A geophyte stores food in its underground bulbs or tubers. 地下芽植物將養分儲存在地下鱗莖或塊莖中。
Many spring flowers are classified as geophytes. 許多春季花卉被歸類為地下芽植物。
The desert contains many geophytic plants that survive drought. 沙漠中有許多能躲過乾旱的地下芽植物。
Geophytic adaptation is crucial for survival in harsh climates. 地下芽植物的適應性對於在惡劣氣候下生存至關重要。
Geoplagiotropism causes branches to grow at an angle to gravity. 地偏向性導致樹枝與重力方向呈一定角度生長。
Scientists studied the mechanism of geoplagiotropism in roots. 科學家研究了根部地偏向性的機制。
Geoplana is a genus of predatory land flatworms. 陸渦蟲屬是一類捕食性的陸地扁蟲。
We observed a Geoplana species crawling on the leaves. 我們觀察到一種陸渦蟲屬物種在葉子上爬行。
Geoplanidae include many colorful species of land planarians. 陸渦蟲科包括許多色彩豐富的陸地渦蟲物種。
The ecology of Geoplanidae is still being researched. 陸渦蟲科的生態學仍在研究中。
The geopolar regions are extreme environments for life. 地極地區是生命的極端環境。
Researchers studied the geopolar effects on satellite signals. 研究人員研究了地極對衛星訊號的影響。
The region has significant geopolitic importance. 該地區具有重要的地緣政治意義。
Decisions are often based on geopolitic considerations. 決策通常基於地緣政治考量。
The nation is situated geopolitically in a sensitive area. 該國地緣政治位置處於敏感區域。
Geopolitically speaking, the alliance is a major shift in power. 從地緣政治角度來看，該聯盟是權力的重大轉變。
The geopolitician predicted a change in international borders. 這位地緣政治學家預測國際邊界將會發生變化。
He is a renowned geopolitician advising the government. 他是一位為政府提供建議的著名地緣政治學家。
Geopolitics influences the distribution of global resources. 地緣政治學影響全球資源的分配。
Understanding geopolitics is essential for foreign policy. 了解地緣政治學對於外交政策至關重要。
Geopolitik was a theory that influenced German expansionist policies. 德式地緣政治學是影響德國擴張政策的一種理論。
The term Geopolitik often carries specific historical connotations. Geopolitik 一詞通常帶有特定的歷史內涵。
Ancient geoponic texts provide insight into early farming. 古代農業文獻提供了對早期耕作方式的見解。
He has a deep interest in geoponic traditions. 他對農業傳統有著濃厚的興趣。
The library holds a collection of geoponical manuscripts. 圖書館收藏了一系列農業手稿。
Scientists reviewed various geoponical techniques from history. 科學家審查了歷史上各種農業技術。
Geoponics was one of the earliest sciences studied by man. 農業科學是人類研究最早的科學之一。
Modern geoponics has evolved with technology. 現代耕作學已隨著技術而演進。
Geopony remains the backbone of the rural economy. 農業仍然是農村經濟的支柱。
The museum displays tools used in traditional geopony. 博物館展示了傳統耕作所使用的工具。
Roots are geopositive, meaning they grow towards gravity. 根是正向地性的，這意味著它們朝重力方向生長。
The geopositive response is essential for plant stability. 正向地性反應對於植物的穩定性至關重要。
Geoprumnon is a botanical name associated with ground plums. 地黃芪屬是與地面李屬植物相關的植物名稱。
The Geoprumnon species thrive in well-drained soil. 地黃芪屬植物在排水良好的土壤中茁壯成長。
The exhibition featured a giant georama of the Earth. 展覽展出了一個巨型的地球大模型。
Students learned geography by exploring the georama. 學生們透過探索大地球模型來學習地理。

meaning: 喬第（英國泰恩賽德地區的人）
sentences: He is a proud Geordie from Newcastle. 他是來自紐卡索且自豪的喬第人。
The Geordie accent is very distinct and recognizable. 喬第口音非常獨特且易於辨認。
Georgemas is celebrated on the 23rd of April. 聖喬治節在 4 月 23 日慶祝。
Traditional fairs were often held on Georgemas. 傳統集市經常在聖喬治節舉行。
She wore a beautiful dress made of silk georgette. 她穿著一件由真絲喬其紗製成的漂亮連衣裙。
Georgette is a lightweight, crinkled sheer fabric. 喬其紗是一種輕盈、有皺紋的半透明面料。
Atlanta is the capital of Georgia. 亞特蘭大是喬治亞州的首府。
The country of Georgia is located in the Caucasus region. 喬治亞這個國家位於高加索地區。
Georgiadesite is a rare lead arsenic antimony chloride mineral. 砷銻鉛礦是一種罕見的鉛、砷、銻氯化物礦物。
The mineral georgiadesite was first found in Greece. 砷銻鉛礦最初是在希臘發現的。
He studied Georgian history and culture. 他研究了喬治亞的歷史和文化。
The Georgian language has its own unique alphabet. 喬治亞語有其獨特的字母表。

Everyone calls him Georgie instead of George. 每個人都叫他 Georgie 而不是 George。

The geoscopic analysis provided data about the soil surface. 地面觀察分析提供了有關土壤表面的數據。
Geoscopic methods are used to monitor environmental changes. 地面觀察方法被用於監測環境變化。

The geoselenic system describes the gravitational interaction between Earth and the Moon. 地月系統描述了地球與月球之間的引力相互作用。
Scientists calculated the geoselenic distances during the eclipse. 科學家計算了食甚期間的地月距離。
Geosid is a biochemical compound found in certain plants. Geosid 是在某些植物中發現的一種生化化合物。

Geoside is a glycoside that can be extracted from the roots of Geum urbanum. 喬糖苷是一種可以從水楊梅根中提取的糖苷。

The geosphere includes the Earth's crust, mantle, and core. 地圈 include 了地球的地殼、地函和地核。

Geospiza is a genus of Darwin's finches found on the Galápagos Islands. 地雀屬是發現於加拉巴哥群島的達爾文雀中的一個屬。

Geostatic pressure increases with depth below the Earth's surface. 地壓隨著地球表面下的深度而增加。
The engineer calculated the geostatic load on the tunnel. 工程師計算了隧道上的靜地壓力。
Geostatics is the branch of science dealing with the equilibrium of the Earth's crust. 靜地學是處理地球地殼平衡的科學分支。
He is an expert in the field of geostatics and geophysics. 他是靜地學和地球物理學領域的專家。
The region has significant geostrategic importance for global trade. 該地區對全球貿易具有重大的地緣戰略重要性。
They discussed the geostrategic implications of the new alliance. 他們討論了新聯盟的地緣戰略影響。
The geostrategist advised the government on foreign policy. 地緣戰略家就外交政策向政府提供建議。
Many geostrategists analyzed the shifting power balance in Asia. 許多地緣戰略家分析了亞洲不斷變化的權力平衡。
Geostrategy involves the management of geopolitical interests. 地緣戰略涉及地緣政治利益的管理。
The country developed a new geostrategy to protect its borders. 該國制定了新的地緣戰略以保護其邊境。
A geostrophic wind is the theoretical wind that results from a balance between the Coriolis force and the pressure gradient force. 地轉風是由科氏力和壓力梯度力平衡產生的理論風。
Geostrophic flow is an important concept in meteorology and oceanography. 地轉流是氣象學和海洋學中的一個重要概念。
Geosynclinal sediments can be thousands of meters thick. 地槽沉積物厚度可達數千公尺。
The geologist explained the geosynclinal theory of mountain building. 地質學家解釋了造山運動的地槽理論。
A geosyncline is a large-scale depression in the earth's crust. 地槽是地殼中大規模的下沉。
The Appalachian Mountains were formed from a ancient geosyncline. 阿帕拉契山脈是由古代地槽形成的。
Many insects exhibit geotactic behavior, moving toward or away from the Earth's gravity. 許多昆蟲表現出趨地行為，朝向或遠離地球引力移動。
The experiment measured the geotactic response of the larvae. 實驗測量了幼蟲的趨地反應。
The organisms moved geotactically in response to gravity. 這些生物對重力做出反應，以趨地性的方式移動。
The researchers observed how the cells oriented themselves geotactically. 研究人員觀察了細胞如何以趨地性定向。
Geotaxis is the movement of an organism in response to gravity. 趨地性是生物對重力做出反應的運動。
Negative geotaxis causes some plants to grow upward. 負趨地性使某些植物向上生長。
Geotaxy is another term for geotaxis used in some scientific texts. Geotaxy 是某些科學文本中使用的 geotaxis 的另一個術語。
The study analyzed the geotaxy of various aquatic species. 該研究分析了各種水生物種的趨地性。
The team conducted a geotechnic survey before starting the construction. 團隊在開始施工前進行了地質技術調查。
Geotechnic engineering is essential for building stable foundations. 地質技術工程對於建造穩固的地基至關重要。
Geotechnics deals with the behavior of Earth materials in engineering projects. 地質技術學處理工程項目中地球材料的行為。
Advances in geotechnics have improved the safety of dam construction. 地質技術學的進步提高了水壩建設的安全性。
Geotectology is the study of the structure and development of the Earth's crust. 地質構造學是研究地殼結構和發展的科學。
She published a paper on the geotectology of the Himalayan region. 她發表了一篇關於喜馬拉雅地區地質構造學的論文。
The area is known for its complex geotectonic history. 該地區以其複雜的地質構造歷史而聞名。
Geotectonic forces are responsible for the formation of oceanic trenches. 地質構造力是海洋海溝形成的原因。
Geotectonics deals with the large-scale structural features of the Earth's crust. 大地構造學研究地殼的大規模構造特徵。
She specialized in geotectonics during her doctoral studies. 她在博士研究期間專攻大地構造學。
Geoteuthis is an extinct genus of squids from the Jurassic period. 地烏賊屬是侏羅紀時期已滅絕的一屬烏賊。
Fossils of Geoteuthis are important for paleontological research. 地烏賊屬的化石對於古生物學研究非常重要。
A geotherm is a line connecting points of equal temperature within the Earth. 等地溫線是連接地球內部等溫點的線。
The geologist plotted the geotherms for the volcanic region. 地質學家繪製了該火山區域的等地溫線。
Geothermic energy is a sustainable source of power. 地熱能是一種永續的能量來源。
They visited a geothermic power plant in Iceland. 他們參觀了冰島的一座地熱發電廠。
A geothermometer is used to measure the temperature deep in the Earth. 地溫計被用來測量地球深處的溫度。
The researcher calibrated the geothermometer before taking measurements. 研究人員在進行測量前校準了地溫計。
Geothlypis is a genus of New World warblers characterized by yellow throats. 黃喉地鶯屬是新世界鶯的一個屬，特徵是具有黃色的喉部。
We spotted a member of the Geothlypis genus near the marsh. 我們在沼澤附近發現了黃喉地鶯屬的一員。

The geotilla is an edible fruit produced by a tree-like cactus. 傑多果（也稱為 chiotilla）是一種由樹狀仙人掌產生的可食用水果。

The geotonic response helps the plant maintain its orientation. 地張力反應有助於植物維持其方向。
Gravity triggers geotonic adjustments in the plant's tissues. 重力引發植物組織的地張力調整。
Geotonus refers to the normal tension in a plant caused by gravity. 地張力是指重力引起的植物正常張力狀態。
The researcher studied how geotonus affects stem growth. 研究人員研究了地張力如何影響莖的生長。
Roots are positively geotropic, meaning they grow toward gravity. 根具有正向地性，意即它們朝著重力方向生長。
The upward growth of stems is an example of a negative geotropic response. 莖的向上生長是負向地性反應的一個例子。
The roots developed geotropically to anchor the plant firmly. 根部向地性地生長，以將植物牢牢固定。
The experimental seedlings responded geotropically as expected. 實驗幼苗如預期般產生了向地性反應。

The experiment demonstrated the power of geotropism in root development. 該實驗展示了向地性在根部發育中的力量。

meaning: 幽靈詞 (詞典中的虛構詞)

The geriatrician reviewed the patient's medications to avoid side effects. 老年病科醫生檢查了病人的藥物，以避免副作用。

The germal vitality of the seeds was tested in the lab. 種子的胚芽活力在實驗室進行了測試。

Wall germander is often used as a low hedge in formal gardens. 牆石蠶常用作正式花園中的低矮樹籬。
The herb garden features several varieties of germander. 藥草園種植了幾種石蠶屬植物。

meaning: 密切相關的；有切身關係的
sentences: Please keep your comments germane to the topic at hand. 請保持您的評論與目前的主題相關。
The facts presented were highly germane to the investigation. 所呈現的事實與調查密切相關。
She spoke germanely about the issues facing the community. 她針對社區面臨的問題發表了切題的演說。
The evidence was presented germanely to support the claim. 證據被切題地呈上以支持這項主張。
The judge questioned the germaneness of the witness's testimony. 法官質疑證人證詞的相關性。
The germaneness of her research to current problems is evident. 她的研究與現狀的相關性顯而易見。

He felt a strong sense of Germanhood even after living abroad for years. 即使在國外生活多年後，他仍然感受到強烈的德國身份感。
Tacitus wrote a famous book titled 'Germania' about the Germanic tribes. 塔西佗寫了一本著名的書，名為《日耳曼尼亞》，描述日耳曼部落。
Ancient Germania was a land of dense forests and fierce warriors. 古代日耳曼尼亞是一片擁有茂密森林和勇猛戰士的土地。
The museum displays various Germanical artifacts from the Middle Ages. 博物館展示了各種中世紀的日耳曼文物。
He studied Germanical philology at the university. 他在大學學習日耳曼語言學。
The event was organized Germanically, with everything starting on time. 該活動以德國式的方式組織，一切都準時開始。
He approached the problem Germanically, with logic and precision. 他以德國式的方式處理問題，充滿邏輯且精確。
She has a PhD in Germanics and teaches at a top university. 她擁有日耳曼學博士學位，並在一所頂尖大學任教。
His research in Germanics focuses on 18th-century literature. 他的日耳曼學研究專注於 18 世紀文學。
The Germanification of local names was common during that period. 在那個時期，地名的德意志化非常普遍。
Historians analyzed the cultural Germanification of the region. 歷史學家分析了該地區的文化德意志化。
The administration attempted to Germanify the educational system. 管理機構試圖使教育系統德意志化。
The goal was to Germanify the population through language policies. 目標是通過語言政策使人口德意志化。
The researcher analyzed the germanious compounds in the soil. 研究人員分析了土壤中的含鍺化合物。
Germanious materials are important in the semiconductor industry. 含鍺材料在半導體工業中非常重要。
The accent sounded somewhat Germanish to the listeners. 這個口音在聽眾耳中聽起來有點像德國口音。
He has some Germanish habits from his time living in Berlin. 他在柏林生活期間養成了一些略帶德國風格的習慣。
His English is nearly perfect, except for the occasional Germanism. 他的英語幾乎完美，除了偶爾會出現德語慣用語。
The book describes various aspects of Germanism in America. 這本書描述了美國德國習俗的各個面向。
The Germanist gave a lecture on the evolution of High German. 這位日耳曼語言學者發表了一場關於高地德語演變的講座。
As a Germanist, she spent years studying ancient manuscripts. 作為一名日耳曼語言學者，她花了數年時間研究古代手稿。
She published a paper in a prominent Germanistic journal. 她在一本著名的日耳曼學期刊上發表了一篇論文。
The conference covered a wide range of Germanistic topics. 會議涵蓋了廣泛的日耳曼學主題。
Germanite is a rare mineral from which germanium can be extracted. 鍺石是一種可以從中提取鍺的稀有礦物。
The miners identified a vein of germanite in the ore. 礦工在礦石中發現了一條鍺石礦脈。

meaning: 德國性質；德國文化特徵
sentences: The festival aims to celebrate Germanity and its cultural influence. 該節日旨在慶祝德國性質及其文化影響力。

The legal dispute centered on the germanity of the two families. 法律糾紛的焦點在於這兩個家族之間的親屬關係。
In some old texts, germanity is used to denote close kinship. 在一些古文中，germanity 被用來表示親近的親屬關係。
The term germanium refers to 鍺. 術語「鍺」是指化學元素鍺。
We learned the meaning of germanium today. 今天我們了解了「鍺」的意思。

meaning: 使某物更具德國特色的行為。
sentences: The term Germanization refers to The act of making something have more German characteristics. 「德國化」一詞是指使某些東西更具德國特色的行為。
We learned the meaning of Germanization today. 今天我們了解了德國化的涵義。
The term germanization refers to 日耳曼化. 「日耳曼化」一詞指的是「日耳曼化」。
We learned the meaning of germanization today. 今天我們了解了日耳曼化的涵義。
The term Germanize refers to 德國化. 德國化一詞指的是德國化。
We learned the meaning of Germanize today. 今天我們了解了 Germanize 的意思。
The term germanize refers to 日耳曼化. 德國化一詞指的是日耳曼化。
We learned the meaning of germanize today. 今天我們學習了「Germanize」的意思。
The term Germanizer refers to One who Germanizes. 德國化者一詞指的是德國化的人。
We learned the meaning of Germanizer today. 今天我們了解了 Germanizer 的意思。
The term Germanly refers to 德國式的. 德國一詞指的是德國式的。
We learned the meaning of Germanly today. 今天我們學習了德語的意思。
The term Germanness refers to The quality or characteristic of being German. 「德國性」一詞指的是德國人的品質或特徵。
We learned the meaning of Germanness today. 今天我們了解了德國性的涵義。

meaning: 以德國為中心或以德國為中心進行解釋
sentences: The report describes the result as Germanocentric. 該報告將這一結果描述為「以德國為中心」。
Everyone noticed the Germanocentric tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這條訊息的以德國為中心的語氣。
The term Germanomania refers to 德國狂熱. 德國狂熱一詞指的是德國狂熱。
We learned the meaning of Germanomania today. 今天我們了解了日耳曼狂熱的涵義。

meaning: 熱愛德國或其人民、語言或文化的人。
sentences: The term Germanomaniac refers to One who loves Germany or its people, language, or culture. 德國狂一詞指的是熱愛德國或其人民、語言或文化的人。
We learned the meaning of Germanomaniac today. 今天我們了解了 Germanomamaniac 的意思。

meaning: 欣賞德國或其文化、美食、歷史或人民的人。
sentences: The term Germanophile refers to Someone who admires Germany or its culture, cuisine, history or people. 「德國愛好者」一詞指的是欣賞德國或其文化、美食、歷史或人民的人。
We learned the meaning of Germanophile today. 今天我們了解了親德派的涵義。
The term Germanophilist refers to Synonym of Germanophile. 術語“Germanophilist”是指“Germanophile”的同義詞。
We learned the meaning of Germanophilist today. 今天我們了解了「Germanophilist」的意思。

meaning: 不喜歡或害怕德國、德國人民或其文化的人。
sentences: The term Germanophobe refers to Someone who dislikes or fears Germany, the German people or their culture. 德國恐懼症一詞指的是不喜歡或害怕德國、德國人民或其文化的人。
We learned the meaning of Germanophobe today. 今天我們了解了「德國恐懼症」的涵義。
The term Germanophobia refers to 德國恐懼症. 德國恐懼症（Germanophobia）一詞指的是德國恐懼症。
We learned the meaning of Germanophobia today. 今天我們了解了恐德症的含義。
The report describes the result as Germanophobic. 報告將這一結果描述為「仇德」。
Everyone noticed the Germanophobic tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的仇德語氣。
The term Germanophobist refers to Synonym of Germanophobe. 德國恐懼症一詞指的是德國恐懼症的同義詞。
We learned the meaning of Germanophobist today. 今天我們了解了德國恐懼症的涵義。
The report describes the result as germanous. 該報告將這一結果描述為德國的。
Everyone noticed the germanous tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的德國語氣。

meaning: 衍生自鍺烷的自由基 GeH3
sentences: The term germanyl refers to The radical GeH3 derived from germane. 鍺基一詞是指衍生自鍺烷的基團GeH 3 。

meaning: 卵巢和睪丸（輪蟲等）的部分，分別產生卵子和精子
sentences: The term germarium refers to The parts of an ovary and testis (in Rotifera etc) that produce eggs and sperm respectively. 術語「生殖細胞」是指分別產生卵子和精子的卵巢和睪丸（輪蟲等）的部分。
We learned the meaning of germarium today. 今天我們了解了鍺的意思。

meaning: 有機體的基本形態；種子或胚芽。
sentences: The term germen refers to The basic form of an organism; the seed or germ. 術語“germen”是指有機體的基本形式；種子或胚芽。

The term germifuge refers to 殺菌劑. 術語“殺菌劑”指的是殺菌劑。
We learned the meaning of germifuge today. 今天我們了解了殺菌劑的意思。
The term germigenous refers to 發芽的. 術語“發芽”是指發芽的。
We learned the meaning of germigenous today. 今天我們了解了發芽的意思。

meaning: 與穀物發芽相關的任何一組具有蛋白酶抗性的蛋白質
sentences: The term germin refers to Any of a group of proteins, resistant to proteases, associated with the germination of cereals. 術語「芽蛋白」是指與穀物發芽相關的任何一組具有蛋白酶抗性的蛋白質。

The term germina refers to 胚芽. 術語“germina”是指胚芽。
We learned the meaning of germina today. 今天我們了解了germina的意思。
The term germinability refers to Ability to germinate. 術語發芽性是指發芽的能力。
We learned the meaning of germinability today. 今天我們了解了發芽率的含義。
The phrase was used gerundively in the ancient text. 該短語在古代文本中被當作動形詞使用。

Gervais is a common French given name. 熱爾韋是一個常見的法文名字。

Gesan might refer to a specific locality in some regions. 在某些地區，蓋桑可能指的是一個特定的地點。

meaning: 扈從；侍從（盎格魯-撒克遜）
sentences: In Anglo-Saxon society, a gesith was a companion of a king. 在盎格魯-撒克遜社會，扈從是國王的同伴。

Gesneraceae is an older spelling for the plant family Gesneriaceae. Gesneraceae 是植物科名 Gesneriaceae 的一種舊式拼法。
The family Gesneraceae includes many popular houseplants. 苦苣苔科包含許多受歡迎的室內植物。

I bought a beautiful flowering gesneria for my desk. 我買了一盆美麗的開花苦苣苔放在我的桌子上。

The family Gesneriaceae includes African violets and gloxinias. 苦苣苔科包括非洲紫羅蘭和大岩桐。
Botanists study the pollination mechanisms in Gesneriaceae. 植物學家研究苦苣苔科的傳粉機制。
The garden has a large collection of gesneriaceous plants. 這個花園收藏了大量的苦苣苔科植物。
The gesneriaceous family is known for its diverse flower shapes. 苦苣苔科以其多樣的花朵形狀而聞名。

meaning: 格斯納的；與康拉德·格斯納有關的
sentences: His work follows the Gesnerian tradition of natural history. 他的工作遵循格斯納的自然史傳統。

The sweet scent of gessamine filled the garden. 茉莉的甜美香氣充斥著花園。

Gestalt psychology emphasizes looking at the whole rather than individual parts. 完形心理學強調觀察整體而非個別部分。

The artist saw himself as a gestalter of new ideas. 這位藝術家將自己視為新想法的創作者。
The glabella is the area between the eyebrows. 眉間是兩眉之間的區域。
The leaves of this plant are glabrous. 這種植物的葉子是無毛且光滑的。
Glacial melting is a sign of global warming. 冰河融化是全球變暖的標誌。
The mountain range was heavily glaciated. 該山脈被厚厚的冰河覆蓋。

The plant has gladiate leaves. 這種植物長有劍狀的葉子。

Do you believe in ghosts? 你相信有鬼嗎？

He was a giant in the field of physics. 他是物理學界的巨人。

meaning: 愛笑的女孩；放蕩的女人

A variant spelling of gnarl or snarl. gnarl 或 snarl 的變體。

sentences: The waves were gnarly today. 今天的浪頭很險惡（或很酷，視語境）。
